অকারণে অকালে মোর পড়ল যখন ডাক\n তখন আম:
I fell prematurely for no reason when called
    I was bedridden then.
The world then stood silent in the light of the stars,
    Whaling was caught at night.
    The people of the house cried more,
   'How do you know the way in the dark?'
I said, 'Let me take my light,
    I have this lamp in my hand.'
The higher the flame, the brighter the lamp
    The light seems to block the eyes,
He who mingles with the shadows and spreads illusions in all directions.
    Darkness meets me more.
    As fast as you walk with pride
    The sky is covered with clouds of dust,
My flame trembles in the gust of wind--
    Paddy is created step by step
অগ্নিবীণা বাজাও তুমি কেমন ক'রে!\n:
How do you play the fire harp!
       The sky trembles with the song of starlight.
Touching my pain with your hands,
    The new creation awakened to understand life-' later.
  Play as bad as you are,
    Oh Lord, all of my soul.
Bisham is my night again and again with your spitting
    If you burn them, they are filled with pain.
অগ্নিশিখা এসো এসো, আনো আনো আলো।\n:
Flames come, come, bring the light.
                Light the lamp from house to house in sadness and happiness.
Bring strength, bring radiance, bring peace, bring contentment,
     Bring sweet love, bring eternal good.
        Come along the virtuous path O Kalyani--
        Good sleep, good awakening body.
       In the dark night, stay awake as a mother
               Pour a smile on the joyous festival.
অচেনাকে ভয় কী আমার ওরে?\n অচেনাকেই চ:
What is the fear of the stranger?
    Life will be filled by knowing strangers.
I know that my acquaintance will never run out,
         Achin Dore will pull me on the trackless path.
    My mother was a stranger, took me in her arms.
    All love is unknown, so the heart flutters.
How many tunes does the heart beat in this unknown world--
         This unknown life is mine,
                The fence is spinning.
অজানা খনির নূতন মণির গেঁথেছি হার,\n:
A new gem from an unknown mine,
     I have tied him to the tireless young harp.
Like the bud of a new forest, like the bud of a new mango,
     The new door of heaven opens in the sky of Magher,
Similarly, in the new youth of my new anger, new love
     Ragini rose and danced on the strings of the harp.
     Words that I have never had to say to anyone
     That is why new dances are written in songs.
Today, for no reason, the melody of the era floats in the air,
     The sound of the forest is heavy on the mind.
As soon as the words were broken, a new rhythm arose.
     You are amazed by the boldness of the tone
অজানা সুর কে দিয়ে যায় কানে কানে।\nভাবনা:
An unknown sound is heard in the ear.
My thoughts are floating in the song.
   In the shadow of a forgotten birth, mourns the lost veena
   The wayward Ragini crying in the wind.
             In the starry water of some spring rendezvous night
             My thoughts are floating in the song.
অধরা মাধুরী ধরেছি ছন্দোবন্ধনে।\n ও যে:
I caught the elusive melody in the rhythm.
  He is a bird from the far east
    The song of the distant night in the house.
       Her colored fan, in the mournful rage of the spring past,
            The smell of flowers is covered in her heart.
oh foreigner
  You call him by name,
         He is your acquaintance.
Who knows the sky of your country, the stars of your night,
      Tomari also responds to Bakulvan's song--
          Dance to the beat of your kankan.
অনন্তের বাণী তুমি, বসন্তের মাধুরী-উৎসবে\:
You are the words of eternity, in the sweet festival of spring
When will you fill the honeypot of happiness?
    Sancharibe Leelachhale in Banjulnikunjatala,
    Banachaya will be thrilled by the scent of the fickle region.
Manjir's humming in a slow Manjul rhythm
The heart of the forest is stirring every now and then.
    Laughter will rise in the eyes,
    Milanmallikamalya Paraibe Paranavallabhe.
অনিমেষ আঁখি সেই কে দেখেছে\n যে আঁখি জগ:
Who saw Animesh Ankhi
  The eyes that are looking at the world.
Rabi Shashi Graha star is nako disahara,
  After that ankhi, they kept ankhi.
  Why are you crying in the dark?
  Why not look at the heart-sky-water?
The constant light that wakes the eyes,
  I understand that the world's clouds have covered my vision.
অনেক কথা বলেছিলেম কবে তোমার কানে কানে\nক:
When I spoke a lot in your ear
How much in the dark, how many secret songs.
Do you remember him, so ask Elem--
They are everywhere in the heart of the night.
When I woke up, I heard that Deep-Neva Mor Batayen
A dream-cloud-wind rushes in moment by moment--
In the clearness of the rain stream in the garden of the garden
The smell of wet soil suddenly reminds me of all that.
অনেক কথা যাও যে ব'লে কোনো কথা না বলি।\nত:
Talk a lot and say nothing.
I hope to understand your language Jalanjali.
He who is there, will penetrate deep into his soul with the arrow of laughter,
     You are curious about drinking tea in your mouth.
     I want to avoid you, let's go back.
In my eyes, the desire to wash is in the Ankhilore--
I can see you, you can't see me.
You have a fog in your mind, you are covered with--
     Don't let yourself be hidden from me
     I want to avoid you, let's go back.
অনেক দিনের আমার যে গান আমার কাছে ফিরে আস:
My old song comes back to me
I ask him, you wander in the wind.
Where can you find the smell of all the flowers that have died?
Whose hope is empty today, wake up the sound around him.
Lost all the houses whose house is yours,
The language brings the union of those who have no end of discord.
Dry eyeballs cry to your tune,
You are the vehicle of innocent days, float your dreams in the distant sky.
অনেক দিনের মনের মানুষ যেন এলে কে\n কোন:
Who is the person of long-term mind
   From some forgotten spring.
       If you leave everything behind and come to find it in your heart,
       You know the way by seeing the sign of familiar flowers.
I understand you have hope--
You will find a home in my pain.
       If you come to see if that harp sounds in the heart
       Are the cables covered in dust?
অনেক দিনের শূন্যতা মোর ভরতে হবে\nমৌনবীণা:
I have to fill the void of many days
The tantra of Mounaveena will wake me up.
  Your flower-blossoming words in Basantasamir
        Ani in Dik Parane--
  Call your Nikhil festival.
          In Milanshtadal
Show the form of your love on earth.
Meet me with everyone, forget pride,
           Open the door
       Fill it with praise.
অনেক দিয়েছ নাথ,\n আমায় অনেক দিয়েছ:
Nath, you have given a lot.
     Nath, you have given me a lot.
My desire is still not fulfilled--
Dindasha didn't blink, didn't wipe tears,
The thirst of the deep soul was not quenched, it was not quenched.
You have given life, heart, dear family,
Sudhasnigdha Samiran, Neelkanth Ambar, Shyamshova Dharani.
If you give this much, you will have to pay more.
If you don't find me, I won't return, I won't return.
অনেক পাওয়ার মাঝে মাঝে কবে কখন একটুখানি প:
Sometimes you get a lot, sometimes you get a little.
         That's what the south wind wakes up.
Day after day passed as if they were floating in the current of the road,
         They come and go from outside.
When a morning comes, he makes his home in my house.
         He is my eternal desire.
Among the lost light, I picked up particles
         Gantha remained at the rate of my life.
That is the garland of my broken day's fragmented light
         I will decorate my dish with that today--
Like the twinkling of an eye, the light of a momentary lamp,
         Half a day at once
অন্তর মম বিকশিত করো অন্তরতর হে--\nনির্মল:
Develop the inner soul, O inner soul--
Make it pure, make it bright, make it beautiful.
Wake up, wake up, be fearless.
Do good, be relentless and doubtless.
Connect O with all, free O close.
Spread your calm rhythm in all actions.
O Lord, make the lotus feet of the mother pulsate.
Praise, praise, praise O.
অন্তরে জাগিছ অন্তরযামী\nতবু সদা দূরে ভ্র:
You are an introvert in your heart
But I am always wandering away.
I have made the family happy,
But you are the life of my mother.
Unknowingly wandering the way
Your pride in the infinite world.
Still, the eyes of love wake up forever,
But good wishes have come Nami.
অন্ধজনে দেহো আলো, মৃতজনে দেহো প্রাণ--\nত:
The body is light to the blind, the body is life to the dead--
You give mercy to Karunamritsindu.
    A dry heart, a hard stone,
Sinchah dry eyes in Premsalildhar.
Call him who does not call you.
You keep him who goes away from you.
    Those who are thirsty return to the shore of Sudhasagarat
Add to him your lover, make sudha O drink.
I have found you, never to lose,
When do you sleep, you lose your eyes in the dark.
    I will tell you, who will comfort me?
Years go by, no love story is lost--
Darshan give O, give O give, cries
অবেলায় যদি এসেছ আমার বনে দিনের বিদায়ক:
If you have come to my forest at the end of the day
Don't sing, don't sing the fickle song, tired of this song.
              In the faint path of the dense forest
              The flower that fades
That's why you lose, you feel ashamed.
Don't want, don't want to lean on my humility.
Come, come tomorrow, at the end of the dawn, at the door of the morning light.
Don't go, don't go prematurely to the morning call.
              Come come if it is good time
              Brings his full savings,
If Chirnabeen wins, the arrangement is filled with riches.
     Don't take it, don't take it, my son
অভয় দাও তো বলি আমার\n উইশ কী--\nএকট:
Please tell me
      Wish Key--
A splash of soda water
    Ripe Three Scotch Whiskey
অভিশাপ নয় নয়,\n অভিশাপ নয় নয়--\n আন:
damn no no
     damn no no--
  Bringing my birth,
     The gate of death is opening.
        broken door
            broken wall
                The lie of birth was broken.
     oh my doom
           oh my everything
                 you came
           At the peak of my humiliation.
     Keep me above the darkness
             But the feet are bright.
অমন আড়াল দিয়ে লুকিয়ে গেলে চলবে না।\nএ:
Do not hide under such cover.
Now kiss it hidden in the middle of the heart, no one will know, no one will tell.
        How many times your hideous travels in the world--
Now tell me that you will catch the corner of my mind, you will not deceive me.
        I know he's not worthy of my hard heart...
Friend, if you feel the wind, will not melt your soul?
        No, I don't have sadhana--drops of your grace
Will the flower not bloom immediately, and the fruit will not bear fruit?
অমল কমল সহজে জলের কোলে আনন্দে রহে ফুটিয়া:
Amal Kamal bloomed easily in the lap of water, happily.
He didn't return, he said, 'Where is the gold?'
           So easily delighted
           God is immersed in your midst,
Pujashtdal, you have broken all the doubts he developed.
Where are you, you will not find a way, you will not correct a path--
I will return to your midst, Lord, when I return to the direction.
           When I walk in your sky
           Your nectar flow will be felt in the body,
Your sun will come to your bosom with love like a friend.
অমল ধবল পালে লেগেছে মন্দ মধুর হাওয়া\n:
Amal Dhabal felt the evil sweet breeze
   I have not seen a bird that I have not seen.
      What distant treasure brings from across the ocean--
                The mind wants to drift away,
      I want to leave everything I want on this edge.
The water is pouring down behind, Guru Guru Deya is calling,
   Arun Kiran fell in the gap between the broken clouds.
      Oh Kandari, who are you, who is the treasure of laughter
                My heart dies thinking--
      To what tune will the instrument be played today, what mantra will be sung.
অয়ি বিষাদিনী বীণা, আয় সখী, গা লো সেই-স:
Ay Vishadini Veena, Ay Sakhi, sing those old songs
       Don't fill the dark soul with long-hidden dreams.
       Oh my god, I remember you had that one day
       I am Aryalakshmi in this Himalayas, I play this Binodini Veena
       The world was shocked to hear the song that I sang.
       I am Arjuna, I have given breast to Yudhisthira.
       Sitting on this lap, Valmiki sang Punya Ramayana.
                Abhagini today is an orphan
       Hide hide hide silently cry silently
       Lest mother's death
অয়ি ভুবনমনোমোহিনী, মা,\nঅয়ি নির্মলসূর্:
O Bhuvanmanomohini, Mother,
Oh, pure and sunny Dharani Janakajananijanani.
Nilsindhujaldhoutcharantal, unvibrated-green-zone,
Amber-kissed Valhimachal, Subhratushar Kiritini.
The first dawn rises in the sky, the first dawn rises in the sky,
How much poetry is written in Banabhaban.
Blessed are you, ever-benevolent, distributing food abroad--
Janhvijmuna melted mercy Punypiyushastanyavahini ॥
অরূপ, তোমার বাণী\nঅঙ্গে আমার চিত্তে আমা:
Arup, your words
He brought my freedom to my heart.
Everyday festival is the Diwali of the world--
I am just a clay lamp, light its flame
       Nirvana's shining light is at your will.
As your spring song can be written
Color in color, flower in flower, forest, forest, direction
Breathe in the center of my soul,
May the emptiness be filled with the melody
      Let the disturbance be his virtue, but Dakshinpani.
অরূপবীণা রূপের আড়ালে লুকিয়ে বাজে,\n:
Arupaveena hides behind form,
     That harp rose in the middle of the heart.
The world is filled with my music, the gap is broken near and far,
     That ragini is in all my work.
     All ties of hand-paw eye-desire
     Today, all the crying is successful.
Lost in the juice of the melody is to see, that is to find--
     Birah milan met today in equal clothes.
অলকে কুসুম না দিয়ো, শুধু শিথিল কবরী:
Don't give kusum to alk, just tie a loose kabri.
Give a blow to the heart with the fresh eyes without kajal.
Snares of death on the path of longing--
Do not leave it in your mind, achieve it silently.
Come and come, no fault, no fault.
Whatever comes, cut the form carelessly.
Hani Utala Hridayo Dhandyo only in the smiling corner.
অলি বার বার ফিরে যায়, অলি বার বার ফি:
Olly goes back again and again, Olly goes back again and again--
               But the flowers are growing.
Kali wants to bloom, does not bloom, dies of shame, dies of fear.
Forget values ​​and insults, mind and soul, stay by Nishidin's side.
Ogo, give up hope, but keep hope in the hearts of hearts.
Come back, come back--Bon Modit Fulbase.
Aji Birharjani, yellow flowers float in the dew.
অল্প লইয়া থাকি, তাই মোর যাহা যায় তাহা যা:
I carry only a little, so what goes to me goes.
  If he loses the particle, he takes it and dies 'Hay Hay'.
    Like a river, only vainly clinging to the flow,
      Where do the waves hit the chest one by one?
If I give everything that goes and everything that remains to you
  But there is no decay, everything remains awake but in great glory.
    How much Shashi Bhanu is there in you, not losing an atom or atom,
      My small treasures will not be lost.
অশান্তি আজ হানল একি দহনজ্বালা।\nবিঁধল হৃ:
The unrest today has caught fire.
The broken heart is filled with pain.
   Flames burn in the chest, mirages tremble in the eyes--
     Who is my garland wrapped in the thread of death?
The familiar world was lost in the shadows
In the colorful illusion of Fagundin's marble.
   My journey is aimless, addiction to lose the way--
     Now it's my turn to go to Achin country.
অশ্রুভরা বেদনা দিকে দিকে জাগে।\nআজি শ্:
Tears flow towards the pain.
Whose desire is in the middle of the green clouds today?
    The stormy wind is blowing,
    Whose cry echoes in his song--
    Who does the sadhana of failure?
অসীম কালসাগরে ভুবন ভেসে চলেছে।\nঅমৃতভবন:
The world is floating in the infinite ocean.
Who knows where the immortality is.
Hero drowned in your heart, a beauty!
       Immortal god satat
In this temple, in this Sudhaniketan.
অসীম ধন তো আছে তোমার, তাহে সাধ না মেটে।\:
You have infinite wealth, so you are not satisfied.
           If you want to take it, I will bend it into pieces in my hands.
Give me precious stones, if you give me your precious stones, I will be rich--
           Now come to the door and call, I am at the door.
           You will make me a donor, you will be a monk--
           The world will be full of laughter.
You won't stay in that chariot, you won't stay in that chariot, down on the dust path--
           Ages will walk with me.
অসীম সংসারে যার কেহ নাহি কাঁদিবার\:
There is no one to cry in the infinite world
         Why is he crying?
Tears can't be wiped away
         Why is he crying?
Someone whose ears can't hear the sad song,
     He is the one who wants to be heard.
What else is he up to in the world?
     What are you hoping for in the burning stream?
ইচ্ছা যবে হবে লইয়ো পারে,\n পূজাকুসুমে র:
You can take it whenever you want.
  Rachiya Anjali in Pujakusum
I am sitting on the shore of Bhavasindhu.
  Keep your face as long as you want
    Full hearted Lord in this world.
  Will call your servant
    I will go quickly and leave everyone.
ইহাদের করো আশীর্বাদ।\nধরায় উঠিছে ফুটি ক্:
Bless them.
The tiny creatures are caught, Nandan brings the news.
These smiling faces forget to smile,
          Lest darkness surround,
Called to them and put them on the chest, put them on the lap,
          You bless me.
Say, go happily on the waves of Bhava
          Let the wind come from heaven--
Happiness Sadness Koro Hela, he is just wavy
          Dance around you
এবার উজাড় করে লও হে আমার যা-কিছু সম্:
Now destroy all my possessions.
         Go back, go back, go back, you fickle.
         Not during the night, but in a one-hour game
            Give me the land of my dream.
                If this was the case,
             If the memory of the eternal day is lost in extreme carelessness,
         But not in the broken playhouse, wait a minute--
         There are scattered flowers scattered in the dust.
উঠি চলো, সুদিন আইল-- আনন্দসৌগন্ধ উচ্ছ্ব:
Get up, let's go, Sundin Ail-- the fragrance of joy is exhilarating.
           Today spring comes from heaven
     Bhaktahridaypushpanikunje-- Sudin Ail.
উড়িয়ে ধ্বজা অভ্রভেদী রথে\n ওই-যে:
Waving the flag in the Abhravedi chariot
       That's him, that's on the way out.
Come on, run, pull the rope--
Where to sit in the corner of the room!
Jumping into the crowd
       Don't you take it anyway?
    Where is your homework?
    Those words should be forgotten today.
All Chittakaya with tension,
Let go of the illusion of a trivial life,
Dragging the light into the dark
       In the city-village, in the forest, in the mountains.
    That wheel is spinning, jingle.
    Do you hear that sound in the chest?
Is your life not swinging in your blood?
Is not singing mind death song?
Your desire is wild
উতল-ধারা বাদল ঝরে। সকল বেলা একা ঘরে॥\n:
Utal-Dhara Badal falls.   Alone at home all day.
  The fresh wind blows, the crazy river rises,
  Kajal clouds surround the sky, Tamalban darkens.
Oh dear, how are you at the end of the day?
I will dry the water with a towel, I will wipe my feet with longing hair.
  The whale-night will be intense, I will light the lamp of love,
  Parankhani Dev Pati - Put your feet behind him.
Forgetting life and death, I welcome you--
I will win in shame and fear, I will stand by your side today--
  The bond will be hindered by fire, happiness will give sorrow,
  I will go out with you on a stormy night.
Utal-Dhara Badal Jhar
উদাসিনী-বেশে বিদেশিনী কে সে নাইবা তাহারে:
I don't know who the foreigner is indifferent to.
    I painted in colors and painted mirages in my mind.
When did this broken ghat of Tarikhani become in the east wind?
    His arrogant speed lost in the distant blue chest.
    Gani sat alone in awe and ran away like a wave.
    Those who leave and don't come back are followed by someone else.
I know in my heart that I will not be able to reach anyone - but if my indifferent thoughts
    A house is found in that Durashaya Ganthi Sahanay Bani.
উলঙ্গিনী নাচে রণরঙ্গে। আমরা নৃত্য:
Naked dancing on the battlefield.    we dance together
     The ten directions are covered with darkness,
           Burning flame colored rasna--
               Seeing moths dying.
     Black hair flying in the sky,
        Ravi Som Lukalo Tarase.
            Colored blood flowed into the black body--
                 Tribhuvan trembled.
ঢাকো রে মুখ, চন্দ্রমা, জলদে ।\n:
Cover your face, Chandrama, quickly.
             Bihagara stop stop.  You cry in the dark.
       Gabe je gao re sabe gao re shat ashani-mahaninade
       Wake up with great flood music, wake up, wake up in India.
       Banvihanga, you do not sing happy songs.  Pramodamdira dhalli prana prana prana
             Why is Anandragini playing so loudly today?
                      Tear the harp on this day of sorrow.
থাক্‌ থাক্‌ তবে, থাক্‌ এই মায়া।\nপ্রাণপণ:
Bye bye, bye this illusion.
Bring back my mantra to life--
            If the pulse is torn,
                         If you run out of breath.
থাকতে আর তো পারলি নে মা, পারলি কই।\n:
Can I stay anymore mother, where can I go.
          Where did you leave your lap child?
I am guilty of many faults, I sat in a momentary rage--
  At the end of the face.  Where is Abhay Charan Karli?
লহো লহো তুলে লহো নীরব বীণাখানি।\nতোমার ন:
Laho laho tule laho silent harp.
Sur deho tae ani from your beauty
            Oh beautiful oh beautiful
I'm in a bed of darkness in the night sky
            Your assurance
       Wake up your light-filled words in the stars
            Oh beautiful oh beautiful
       The stone cries to you in my heavy sorrow,
       'Sweet with passion, float in tears,
            Oh beautiful oh beautiful.'
       Dry that this naked desert dies forever
            in my heart,
       The green juice pulls the body to his chest
লিখন তোমার ধূলায় হয়েছে ধূলি,\n হ:
Writing is dust in your dust,
        Your words are lost.
Chaitrarajni today I am sitting alone, I understand again.
        In the forest, however, the line of writing,
Have you forgotten your old words in Navkishala?
        How is Mallika Aji Kanne Kanne?
        Like the fragrance-filled Tomari name.
Aji Ani remembered your gentle finger-touching words
        A painful record of grief.
In Madhavishakha, your old writings are rising slowly.
লুকিয়ে আস আঁধার রাতে, তুমি আমার বন্ধু\nল:
Come hide in the dark night, you are my friend
Take that with a heavy hand, you are my joy.
You are the charioteer of sorrow, you are my friend.
You are the trouble, you are the loss, you are my joy.
Enemy amare karo go jai, you are my friend.
Rudra, you are the fear of fear, you are my joy.
Come thunderbolt, O bosom ripper, you are my friend.
Take death, you break the bonds, you are my joy.
খরবায়ু বয় বেগে, চারি দিক ছায় মেঘে,\n:
The dry wind is blowing, the shadows are in the clouds on all sides,
           Ogo neye, naokhani bayo.
     You hold the sail, I raise the sail
           Hit yawn, hit pull yawn.
It is not the repeated jingling of the chain, but the trembling of the young woman
Badan Durbar can't be tolerated anymore, it's like that today.
                     Hit yawn, hit pull yawn.
            Gani gani days when my mind is restless
                Don't say 'Go, don't go'.
            Be in the heart of doubt,
                Don't worry outside.
If Maate Mahak
খুলে দে তরণী, খুলে দে তোরা, স্রোত বহে:
Open the tarani, open the tora, the stream flows.
The waves are dancing with evil gestures - open this time.
    I have broken the sails, the sails are in the wind,
     Let the soul and mind float in the stream--
         Come with me this time.
খেলা কর্‌, খেলা কর্‌ তোরা কামিনীকুস:
Play, play, you kaminikusums.
Look, Sameeran went to Latakunj and held the chin of the yolks
Firaye Edhar, Firaye and Dhar, the two cupolas kiss again and again
                         I raised my face.
You play, you play, Kaminikusumuli.
Kavu leaf-hide your face, Kavu air-open your chest,
Head pulse pulse dance kavu dance air-colle duli duli.
I'll save two bars, play but play-- every minute the time is running out,
I forget the thought of leaving my tired life in the lap of spring.
খেলাঘর বাঁধতে লেগেছি আমার মনের ভি:
I started building a playground inside my mind.
How many nights have you been awake, what should I tell you?
At dawn the wayfarer calls, Alas, I have no leisure--
           Calling in the outdoor game, what are you going to do?
Which is going to mess with all of me
Build a house with old broken days.
That's my new game of thrones.
           What is the mantra that will fix the broken one?
খেলার ছলে সাজিয়ে আমার গানের বাণী\n:
The words of my song in the guise of play
       The tarikhani of the day floats day by day.
Floating in the flow of the stream to a distant land
       I don't know if it will stop at any point.
       Either drowned, or gone.
       Either pick it up or drop it.
O unknown, dying, dying, I play this game for you,
       I am blessed in this game.
খেলার সাথি, বিদায়দ্বার খোলো--\n এবার:
Playmate, open the gate--
    Say goodbye now.
       It's game time.
Called the passerby to the left,
    Sukhmela broke.
খোলো খোলো দ্বার, রাখিয়ো না আর\n বাহ:
Open the door, don't keep it
    Stand me outside.
Give answer, look this way,
    Come, raise your arms.
The work is done and the evening stars are up.
The light was lost
    across the ocean
What time did you bring it full of water?
    Are you dressed cleanly?
Did you tie your hair, did you pick flowers,
    Have you tied the garland to the bud?
Sagittarius came back to the flock, the birds came to the nest,
The way was as much as the world of Judea
    Lost in the dark
ঘন কালো মেঘ তাঁর পিছনে,\n:
Thick black clouds behind him,
                Lightning flashed all around,
  Encirclement of His fire around the limbs--
  Like the wrath of Shiva!
Take your mantra Kalinaginimurthy
  Roaring with venom,
                         Contaminates his virtue.
ঘরেতে ভ্রমর এল গুন্‌গুনিয়ে।\n আমার:
The beetle came buzzing in the house.
   Who does he listen to me?
Madhavi woke up in the light of the sky,
Came with that flower-waking news.
He goes on listening to that all day long.
How does one stay at home, how does one's mind--
How do the days pass by?
What illusion gives call, Dil forgets all work,
The evening passes by the music.
Who does he listen to me?
আইল আজি প্রাণসখা, দেখো রে নিখিলজন।\n আ:
Come today Pranaskha, look Nikhiljan.
   Nishitini laid the seat in the sky,
   The planets stood around the assembly.
   I want the mountain to remain in the sky in silence,
   Thamail caught day noise.
আকাশ আমায় ভরল আলোয়, আকাশ আমি ভরব গানে।:
The sky fills me with light, the sky fills me with music.
The air of music is blown in the air, the air of dance is blown in the air.
              Ore Palash, Ore Palash,
   Flames of colored flames burn from side to side--
   Ragini Ranga is the color of my heart.
Kusumban's chest does not stop shaking in the south wind.
In the golden light of the blue sky, young leaves are rustling.
               O Shirish, O Shirish,
   Underneath the gentle smile, surround the void in the scent--
   Your scent pulls my heart to my voice.
আকাশ জুড়ে শুনিনু ওই বাজে তোমারি নাম সক:
I hear your loud name across the sky among all the stars.
He came down in disguise, when he touched my forehead,
The pain was washed away in the peace of peace - you are ashamed of yourself.
The mind matches the star-filled sky in that silent night today.
Let this heart of mine be named after you,
May the victory of your light in the darkness be deepened in the work of life.
আকাশতলে দলে দলে মেঘ যে ডেকে যায়\n:
Clouds that gather in the sky
       'Ay ay ay'
In the mango forest, the dew rose in the mango forest.
       'What is what is what is what is what is.'
The desire to fly awakens in its pulaka-filled branches
       Page by page
The clouds that float by the river again and again--
       'Ay ay ay ay'.
The forest of Kash is gradually getting dewy so--
       'What is what is what is what is what is what is what is what is what is.
The strings move in harmony with the song of the clouds
       In the sail-raising fan.
আকাশভরা সূর্য-তারা, বিশ্বভরা প্রাণ,\nতাহ:
The sun and stars of the sky, the soul of the world,
I found my place in the midst of them,
My song wakes up in wonder.
The earth sways in the tides of infinite time
The tension of my blood in the pulse,
My song wakes up in wonder.
I stepped on the grass to go to the forest path,
The smell of flowers has surprised the mind,
The gift of joy is spread,
My song wakes up in wonder.
I have ears, I have opened my eyes, I have poured my soul into my chest,
In the middle of knowing, I searched for the unknown.
My song wakes up in wonder.
আকাশ হতে আকাশ-পথে হাজার স্রোতে\nঝরছে জগৎ:
A thousand streams from the sky to the sky
The world is flowing like a waterfall.
My body continues to flow along with the impatient stream of my mind.
The song is rising day and night in two streams.
How many waves have hit my soul in that song.
My heart is broken, he spreads hundreds of songs.
The pendulum continues to swing in the wave of that sky-dive stream.
This dance-crazy frenzy is world-famous
Nitya wakes me up, doesn't mean peace.
Eternal tears and laughter are rising in abundance--
A sleepy eye is watching all this.
Ogo, may the eyes in those eyes be mine--
To see that sky-full
আকাশে তোর তেমনি আছে ছুটি,\nঅলস যেন না রয়:
You have a holiday in the sky,
Two wings should not be lazy.
      O bird, under the dense forest
      Home keeps forgetting you,
      The night lies to you and says--
          His fist will not be relaxed.
You don't know what to expect
You woke up singing.
      Do you know in the middle of the morning darkness?
      The hope of light rings deep,
      Aloha's hope is no secret that--
           The knot of the closed bud is broken.
আকুল কেশে আসে, চায় ম্লাননয়নে, কে গো চি:
Akul comes to hair, wants to fade, who goes Chirvirhini--
   In the early hours of the morning, I am drowsy.
      In Bijan Bhavan, Kusumsuravi mridhu pabane,
         In a good sleep, mom in morning dreams.
              Shihri woke up and felt like it.
      Chhakti Millay Chyapraya, just leaves
              In the dark desire Kusumkanane.
আঁখিজল মুছাইলে জননী--\nঅসীম স্নেহ তব, ধন:
Ankhizal wipes the mother--
Infinite Love But, Blessed Are You,
    Blessed, blessed, but mercy.
The orphan you looked up to,
If you sit on the dirty wire next to--
No one turns away from your door
    Who comes to Amritpiyas.
I saw a loving smile today.
    I got a shadow.
Want nothing more--desire is enough,
    Heartache broke.
আগে চল্‌, আগে চল্‌ ভাই!\nপড়ে থাকা পিছে,:
Let's go first, let's go brother!
Falling back, dying,
   Live or die, brother.
   Let's go first, let's go brother!
Time is passing every moment;
It's not something to wait for days--
"Time to time" and hold the pin
   Where can I find the time, brother!
   Go ahead, go ahead brother.

Call the one behind
    Take along--
No one comes, go alone
    On the path to greatness.
Maya's cry calls out from behind,
Break away the bonds of infatuation--
Attainment will be the achievement of life,
    Miche Nayan's water brother!
    Let's go first, let's go brother!

I am forever a beggar
আঘাত করে নিলে জিনে,\n কাড়িলে:
If you hit the saddle,
            Day by day
Break the barrier of happiness, but if it comes to my soul--
I have taken a lot of pain in the face of dying again and again.
            Seeing the storm on a stormy night
            I left it in your hands.
Between the butts, between the markets, never leave me anywhere--
When all my evenings are gone, buy me.
আছ অন্তরে চিরদিন, তবু কেন কাঁদি?।\nতবু ক:
You are in my heart forever, why do you cry?
Why don't you lose your light,
Why disoriented in the dark?
You are mine,
But why floated in the power of death?
Blissful Vibhu, whose husband you are
Why is he going back door to door?
আছ আকাশ-পানে তুলে মাথা,\n কোলে:
You are raising your head to the sky,
        Half a garland is tied on the lap.
Fagunbela brings the words of light to the ears of shadows,
As many thoughts come back to your mind.
        Stay away from near,
        To the tune of the song Kaya Mila.
A lost heart takes on a new image--
Flying hair in Piyalaban, Anchal leaves in Bakulban.
আছ আপন মহিমা লয়ে মোর গগনে রবি,\n আঁকি:
You are the sun in my sky with your glory,
    You have painted a picture of my clouds.
Tapas, you are meditating, but what do you see?
    I am the Janhvi of your thoughts.
    Your gold is burdened, I am its raft.
    Play with me if you forget yourself.
I don't understand any meaning in the voice, mom, listen to it--
    Your Bhairavi is crying on the harp.
আজ আকাশের মনের কথা ঝরো ঝরো বাজে\n স:
Today Akash's heart is full of words
      All the time in my chest.
After the black waters of the pond, the shadow of the clouds closes in,
    The ancient pain of the age in the wind
      All the time in my chest.
        In the darkness
Alone my whisper in that sky.
The words of Mlansmriti are like Pallavamarmar
    Sajal wakes up in a cheerful tone
      All the time in my chest.
আজ কি তাহার বারতা পেল রে কিশলয়।\n:
Did you hear from him today?
       Who are they talking about?
In the sky, in the sky, far away, in tune
       Victory in the house of a traveler.
Where the flame of the wick burns
       In the dense forest floor,
Come, poet, come, wear a garland, take a flute--
       Let's exchange song by song.
আজ কিছুতেই যায় না মনের ভার,\nদিনের আকাশ:
Today, the burden of the mind does not go away,
The sky of the day is dark with clouds - Alas.
     I thought he would come, he didn't find me.
     Saying no makes her cry.
Again and again in the fresh air
The whole sky calls out to him.
     With a sigh of cloud-day, he told me that he would not return--
     He took his chest full of failure.
আজ খেলা ভাঙার খেলা খেলবি আয়,\n:
Today I will play the game of breaking the game,
          I will destroy the house of happiness.
            Today the bond of union will be broken,
              Fagun-din's dream will run today--
                Come on, Melby, the fan of the mind.
        At the peak of Astgiri
          The flag of the storm clouds flies today.
            The dance that will be tomorrow,
              Dance with your death and live--
                Laughing and crying come.
আজ জ্যোৎস্নারাতে সবাই গেছে বনে\n:
Today, everyone went to the forest in Jyotsnara
       In this drunken gathering of spring.
I won't go, I won't go, Rainu falls in the room--
       In this Niralaya, Rab is in your corner.
             I will not go to this drunk meeting.
       This house of mine takes a lot of care
             I have to wash and wipe.
I have to wake up, who knows when he will come
        If he remembers me
             In this drunken gathering of spring.
আজ তারায় তারায় দীপ্ত শিখার অগ্নি জ্বল:
Today the fire of bright flame burns in star after star
       Under the sleepless sky
The grandeur of that light-drunken heavenly assembly
       At what age was my invitation--
I don't like it, I don't like it
So Elem moved across the ocean of time
       Under the sleepless sky
Hetha falls on the ground in the murmuring water of Mandamudhur
        Under the green soil.
Colorful flowers in the heatha grass,
        Embrace the dark-light on the forest path--
I like it, I like it,
So here the day is spent playing this game
         Under the green soil
আজ তালের বনের করতালি কিসের তালে\nপূর:
What is the rhythm of the clapping of the palm forest today?
When the full moon rises over the field.
    No-seen harp sounds in the sky-midst,
    Don't hear any anger Ragini pours into the void.
No happy association today with his happiness,
Intoxicated by the world class music.
    Kinkini who trembled in the stars
    She trembled because of his charm.
আজ ধানের ক্ষেতে রৌদ্রছায়ায় লুকোচুরি খে:
Today, playing hide and seek in the sun in the paddy field, brother, play hide and seek--
Who floats in the blue sky is a raft of white clouds brother-- hide and seek game.
        Today the beetle forgets to eat honey--flies to bask in the light,
                What is the fair on the banks of the river today?
        Ore, I will not go home today, brother, I will not go home today.
        Hey, break the sky and take the outsider today.
            Laughter is running in the wind like the foam of tides,
                Today, playing the flute without work will be spent all day.
আজ নবীন মেঘের সুর লেগেছে আমার মনে।\nআম:
Today the melody of Navin Megh is in my mind.
My thoughts are so shallow for no reason.
How do you call that, out of the room,
      Throwing eyes in the shadow and covering it moment by moment.
      Bandhan Hara Jaldhara's collar roll
      I have a way of saying that.
At the end of the song Niruddeshe Mansloke has gone that way
      In the Kunjaban of eternal Birhini.
আজি নাহি নাহি নিদ্রা আঁখিপাতে।\nতোমার:
Aji Nahi Nahi Nidra Ankhipate.
Underneath your building the lamp burns,
Far away, I woke up with two hands.
     Crying out in the wayward wind,
     Rajini is electrocuted.
     Open the door, open the door--
Lord, have mercy, it is a sad night to see the body.
আজ প্রথম ফুলের পাব প্রসাদখানি, তাই:
Today is the first flower pub Prasadkhani, so I got up early.
Today I will hear the message of the first light, so I ran outside.
   This is what I get, so I start singing,
   Today, I looted the gold molecule in diamond-ray-lotus.
Today I will walk to Paruldidi's forest by invitation.
   We all gathered under the shade of the branches of Champa-Bhai.
   Today, the blue sky in my mind is singing,
   I broke all the chains in the guise of childish play this morning.
আজ বারি ঝরে ঝরঝর ভরা বাদরে,\nআকাশ-ভাঙা:
Today it's raining and full of rain,
The sky-broken longing stream does not hold anywhere.
  From the forest of shawls the storm shakes,
  The water runs along the back of the field.
Today, who dances by blowing away the clouds.
Oh, my mind is running in the rain, lost in this storm--
  Waves over the chest fell on my feet.
What's in the heart today, the door is broken door by door--
  Aji Vadre is mad in the middle of the heart.
  Who is playing outside the house today?
আজ বুকের বসন ছিঁড়ে ফেলে দাঁড়িয়েছে এই প:
Today, Prabhatkhani is standing with tears in his chest.
      His words spread like golden light in the sky.
      O mind, open your mind, open what you have--
      Bring to light what is buried in the heart.
          All barriers break down in joy and rise with everyone--
          After the eyes, do not put it lazily and pull the eyes.
আজ বুঝি আইল প্রিয়তম, চরণে সকলে আকুল ধা:
Today, I understand Ail dearest, everyone is eager for your feet.
           How many days after the heart-wrenching song,
           Full joy awakened in the soul,
I call everyone as brother--Bhuvan is in love with Sumadhu.
আজ শ্রাবণের আমন্ত্রণে\n দুয়ার:
Today at the invitation of Shravan
           The door shakes moment by moment,
           I understand that the bond of the house is broken today.
Dharitri danced in his arena,
           Chanchal plunders his territory.
           I remember the words of the first era
           Navashyamal is in Niketan of life.
The wind blows across the sky, my thoughts go with it
           Kalahara ran to water for a long time.
আজ শ্রাবণের পূর্ণিমাতে কী এনেছিস বল--\:
What have you brought today on Shravan Purnima--
Tears in the eyes filled with laughter.
Yuthivan's pain comes with the sigh of the stormy wind--
Why the flower-dropping trick in the flower-blowing game.
          And what did you bring?
Oh, what passion in the eyes of the lost moon,
          He is a dreamer again.
Mind sits on the side of the road, doesn't know who he will find--
A glimpse of coming and going floats in the air.
                And what did you bring?
আজি এই গন্ধবিধুর সমীরণে\nকার সন্ধা:
Today in this Gandhadvidhu Samiran
In search of whom, go back to the forest.
Today there is a shrill cry among the angry Nilambar.
The gentle music of the distant horizon takes my mind to work--
I'm looking for someone in the heart of the mind in the combination of fragrance.
Wow, I don't know what Nandanrage is
A youth eager for happiness wakes up.
Aji amramukulasaugandha, in the rhythm of new Pallavamarmar,
         Chandrakiran Sudhasinchit Ambare Ashrusas Mahananda,
I am Pulkit Kar Parshana in Gandhavidhu Samiran
আজি ওই আকাশ -'পরে সুধায় ভরে আষাঢ়-মেঘের:
Today that sky - later filled with dark clouds.
       What a festive conch sounds sweetly in the middle of the heart.
A flute of laughter, a song of tears--
       Pai ne dishe who knows he called me.
How do you draw me to the water of Nirudesh in such a pathetic song.
The light on that side of the road is good for my eyes.
            I see him far away in the sky.
আজি কাঁদে কারা ঐ শুনা যায়, অনাথেরা ক:
Who can be heard crying today, where are the orphans crying?
Days and months pass, the rain ends-- will not the lamentation end?
Those who are happy and hopeless New Year with empty eyes,
Who sleeps on the dry land--desert environment.
How many hopes the year came to everyone,
How much hope do you have today? How many families are there?
How many unfortunate lives were wiped away, leaving tears behind--
Darkness left the path of the dawn of the new year.
Alas, he who has no bread in his house will not get the love of man--
Are there no tears of mercy today?
cry and say
আজি কোন্‌ ধন হতে বিশ্বে আমারে\n:
Today I have no wealth in the world
                         Deprived by whom--
But Charan-Kamal-Ratan-Renuka
                         It is stored in the heart.
How stiff and hard to rub with the heart and soul,
       However, the soul and mind are burning in Piyushparasha.
What is your thirst today?
                         Param Paranavallabha!
Chite Chirsudha Sanchar Tawa
                         Thank you very much.
Nath, let him have what he has, I am forever humiliated--
Only you stay in eye to eye in this life forever
আজি কোন্‌ সুরে বাঁধিব দিন-অবসান-বেলারে:
Today, in which tune will I bind the day-end-beller
  In the long gray recess, companionless in the empty building.--
    Will he be drowsy in dumb forgetfulness?
      Is he the passenger of the divorcee in favor of Vihanga?
    Is he in the sighs of unrevealed love?
Is he proud of the proud manjirjhankar, arrogant and arrogant.
আজি গোধূলিলগনে এই বাদলগগনে\n:
Today it is dusk in these clouds
               I count his footsteps in my heart--
         'He will come' my mind says all the time,
               I float in the pool for no reason.
         Adhir Pawan gave his northern far side, did he--
       My mind says 'she will come' in the scent of rajnigandha.
Malati's creeper has grown up, her mind has not run out of words.
         A whisper in the forest today,
              I don't know why they didn't get the message.
                     Digangana's chest trembles--
                        'He will come' says my mind.
আজি ঝড়ের রাতে তোমার অভিসার\n:
Today is your arrival on a stormy night
         My dear friend
   The sky is crying in despair, there is no sleep in the eyes.
   Open the door, my dear, I want it again and again.
         I can't see anything outside.
         Where do you think of your way?
   On the banks of a distant river, on the edge of a forest
   What deep darkness are you in?
আজি তোমায় আবার চাই শুনাবারে\nযে কথা শু:
I want to listen to you again today
I have heard that over and over again.
     The words that are rising in my heart today are bets
               Incessant rain
Because don't search, it doesn't make sense,
The melody evokes accumulated pain.
     The words that sound in the mind in the dream arise moment by moment
          That's how it resonates in the ears
                   In the darkness of the clouds
আজি দক্ষিণপবনে\n দোলা লাগিল বনে বনে॥:
Today in Dakshinpaban
     There was a wave in the forest.
          Dikllana's dancing manjir sound is heart-rending
               In the heartbeat
Speechless disorder in dementia
     Pallabe Pallabe will be lured.
          The wings of the butterfly move the script in different directions
               Festival invitation
আজি দখিন-দুয়ার খোলা--\nএসো হে, এসো হে,:
Today the south door is open--
Come, come, come, come my spring.
    I'll give my heart a shake,
Come, come, come, come my spring.
    Come in a new fair chariot on the way
Come and play Baikul Benu and Pialful Renu.
    Come, come, come, come my spring.
Come to Ghan Pallabpunje Come O, come O, come O.
Come to Banmallikakunje Come O, Come O, Come O.
Come to the land of mad winds with a smile of soft sweet wine,
    You fly your lofty north into the sky--
            Come on, come on, come on
আজি নির্ভয়নিদ্রিত ভুবনে জাগে, কে জাগে?:
Who wakes up in the sleepless world today?
Ghan Saurabhamanthar wakes up in the morning, who wakes up?
How silent in Bihangakulay
        Mohan fingered-- Wake up, who wakes up?
How many blossoms wake up in the secret, who wakes up?
In this immense amber
       Stunned solemn darkness--awake, who awakes?
Mom wakes up in deep sorrow, who wakes up?
আজি প্রণমি তোমারে চলিব, নাথ, সংসারকাজে:
Aji Pranami will go to you, Nath, in family work.
You look into my eyes.
God of the heart is in the soul, so that the mind knows its destiny.
    Thoughts of sin die like curds with sorrow.
I listen to eternal music all day long in all colors,
    May your company continue to reign with all.
In a moment, in a moment in the eyes, in speech, in all actions, in all thoughts,
    Good luck in all hearts.
আজি বর্ষারাতের শেষে\nসজল মেঘের কোমল কা:
Today is the end of rainy night
Arun light is mixed in the soft black of Sajal cloud.
Benuban's head is covered with color in pages,
The heart is lost in the flow of colors, where it floats.
           The glitter of this grass,
My heart trembles with him.
The love of the earth, the anger of the light, my blood trembles--
With the forest, the mind rises with a longing smile.
আজি বসন্ত জাগ্রত দ্বারে।\nতব অবগুণ্ঠ:
Spring is on the doorstep today.
But in a veiled life
      Don't do it ironically.
Open today, open your heart.
Forget today, forget later,
In this musical sky
But remove the smell.
Losing direction in this outside world
Madhuri is spreading the light.
An intense pain in the middle of the forest
Today it is pallabe pallabe bell--
Whose path is far away in the sky?
Today, Baikul Bashundhara is dressed.
South wind is felt on my forehead
Who is asking for damage from door to door--
This is Saurabhavibhal Rajni
At whose feet Dharanitale is waking up.
Oh beautiful, tell me
আজি বহিছে বসন্তপবন সুমন্দ তোমারি সুগন্ধ:
Today is the springtime, your fragrance is beautiful.
How many eager souls are singing today, I want you to drink in joy.
Your light shines in the sky-festival courtyard--
The moon and stars have received eternal light, the blind have received sight.
But with a sweet face and loving heart
How many devotees are calling, 'Nath, Yachi Divasrajni Taba Sanga O.'
How many rhymes of Yashogatha are there in Udge Sajane Trangare Loklokantare--
That Bhavasaran, Lord, Abhaya Pada Tava Sur Manav Muni Bande O.
আজি বাংলাদেশের হৃদয় হতে কখন আপনি\nত:
When did you become the heart of Bangladesh today?
If you come out in this beautiful form, mother!
Ogo mother, do not look back after seeing you!
Your door has opened today in the golden temple.
Your sword shines in your right hand, your left hand shakes,
The smile of love in both eyes, Lalatnetra fire.
Ogo mother, I see your idol today!
Your door has opened today in the golden temple.
Ashni hides your free hair in the clouds,
The sun shines in the sky!
Ogo mother, do not look back after seeing you!
Your door has opened today in the golden temple.
when
আজি বিজন ঘরে নিশীথরাতে আসবে যদি শ:
Aji Bijan will come home empty-handed if--
          What fear I accept!
          I know, I know, my friend, I know--
          You have hands.
          Some days passed on the way to seek,
Now it's time to give it to you.
          Let darkness darken the sky everywhere,
          May your side be my-heart-full.
          In the swing of life, I forgot about you,
Now life and death will pull me in two directions.
আজি মম মন চাহে জীবনবন্ধুরে,\n সেই:
Today mom wants my life friend,
       It is a constant companion in birth and death
           Nishidin happily mourns--
       That ever-joyous, blissful bliss,
       Over the years, how many new people are destined.
Parashanti, paramprem, paramukti, paramakshem
       That innermost ever beautiful Lord, Chittaskha,
            Dharma-Artha-Kam-Bharana Raja Hridyoharana.
আজি মর্মরধ্বনি কেন জাগিল রে!\nমম পল্ল:
Why did you wake up today?
Mom Pallabe Pallabe Hillole Hillole
           I felt a tremor.
What beggar came to the gate,
       I understand that all my heart is asking for money.
       The heart knows that
       Kusum Fotaye Tari sings.
Today, the footsteps of that traveler sound in the middle of my heart,
       That's why he woke up.
আজি মোর দ্বারে কাহার মুখ হেরেছি॥\n জ:
Whose face have I lost at my door today?
  Waking up and singing in the soul.
    I have forgotten the tune.
আজি যত তারা তব আকাশে\n সবে:
Today as many stars are in the sky
            All my life is full of expression.
Nikhil, you have come to me, I am broken today.
  But Nikunja's manjari is growing in my body.
On the horizon, a deep smell of joy,
  My heart flies together in your temple.
      I don't know anyone anywhere today
      I can't hear anyone's words today.
Breathe freely in this bosom with the melody of the flute.
আজি যে রজনী যায় ফিরাইব তায় কেমনে:
How will Rajni go back today?
          Tears are falling in the failed eyes.
          Beshbhushan laho sakhi laho, this Kusummala has become unsatisfied--
                    Such a guarantee was cut in Birhashayan.
I have come this way in vain,
I have so much love in vain.
In the end, the body is dirty, the feet are tired, the mind is indifferent,
                    Going back to an unhappy building.
Ogo Bhola is good, but what will happen to the crying.
If you have to go, why does life want to go back?
         Kunjduar Abodh
আজি রাজ-আসনে তোমারে বসাইব হ:
Today I will seat you in the middle of my heart.
        All desires are anointed at the feet of the Lord.
I will keep this pride of your devotee in your heart, King of the universe.
        All will return outside - you are in the mind.
আজি শরততপনে প্রভাতস্বপনে কী জানি:
What do you want to wear today in the autumn and in the morning?
What is the shefali's branch calling, what is the song of Bihag Bihagi.
Today, the heart is bored by the sweet air, the mind does not want to stay
In the blue sky near the yellow flowers, the mind washes.

As if there is no cow today, life is a failure in this morning
So wants all around, the mind cries and sings 'No, no, no go'.
In what dreamland is there a shadowy immortality in heaven?
Today, I cry because of my joy and pain.

If I Ganthi Song or
আজি সাঁঝের যমুনায় গো\nতরুণ চাঁদের কি:
Go to Yamuna this evening
Where does the young moon's rays go?
      Tari Sudur Sarigane wakes up the memory of farewell in life
          Those two convex eyes are in mercy.
      Hasn't anyone heard the tune that is playing in my mind today?
Is this day spent alone talking about life alone?
      It will go away, he didn't go back and pick it up
          Go to your pain in my extreme pain.
আজি হৃদয় আমার যায় যে ভেসে\n:
Today my heart floats
            For those who have not met.
Forgetting the bonds, swaying in the wind, he goes to the lap of the clouds
            In the land of the impossible.
            There by the sea of Bijan
            Shravana is thick in the roots.
Peacock dances on the tamal tree in the king's palace
            At the end of a long distance.
আজিকে এই সকালবেলাতে\n বসে আছি আমার প্রা:
Today this morning
  I am sitting to tune my soul.
In the sky, the sweet rhythm of that arun raga is pathetic,
  In the play of illusion of light in the wind.
  Neelima is absorbed in my consciousness.
  The golden glow caught the heart's desire.
Who cares about the flow of people and crossing
  Floats on the horizon in the raft of clouds.
আজু, সখি, মুহু মুহু গাহে পিক কুহু কুহু,\:
Aju, sakhi, muhu muhu gahe peak kuhu kuhu,
Dunhu Dunhu wants to drink milk in Kunjaban.
The youth-intoxicated pool is exhilarated,
Lazy Tanu goes to sleep.
Aju honey candni prana-madani,
Loose all ties, loose fear shame.
Words are soft murmurs, quivering spines,
Tanu Jorjar Kusum-banamzh in the city.
The malay is soft, the feet are not moving,
Vachan muhu khaloche, plunders the territory.
A half-foot hundred swayed in the air
Ankhi Janu does not want to want.
All the flowers trembled and jumped in the cupola,
Madhu Onle Tapoyi Khasoi falls.
Flowing flowers, Yamuna flows,
Sashi laughs and laughs
আঁধার অম্বরে প্রচণ্ড ডম্বরু বাজিল গম্ভ:
In the darkness, the thunderous bells roared loudly.
Ashtapallbe restless hillol Samirchanchal Gangan.
The murmur of the river, the murmur of the forest, the clearness of the clouds,
Dhvani Tarangil in intense music--Shravana-Sanyasi Rachil Ragini.
The fragrances of Kadambakunj have stolen a lot of violent jhatika.
Flashes of flame are running towards the evening horizon, the fearsome Jamini is rising in tears--
Danced as if some giant monster knocked on the door of the cloud castle.
আঁধার এলে ব'লে\n তাই তো ঘরে উঠল আলো জ্ব:
When darkness comes
  That's why the light came on in the house.
        I forgot it during the day, I took it at night...
    I know whose fun is in the swing of my bosom.
  Sleepless in my forest
Bihangan woke up moment by moment.
            When all sounds are silent
       Pallavakallole wakes me up in the spring.
আঁধার কুঁড়ির বাঁধন টুটে চাঁদের ফুল উঠে:
The bud of darkness is broken and the flower of the moon is blooming.
     Where is his smell, where is the smell?
     The smell stole into my heart in deep pain.
When will he go away, fall from the sky.
     Where will I keep him, where will I keep him?
     I will keep him in my pain in the song sheet.
আন্‌ গো তোরা কার কি আছে,\nদেবার হাওয়া বই:
Who do you have?
Deva's wind blew towards the horizon--
         Lest this good time runs out.
Anjali of Kunjavan who falls over,
Palashkanan lost patience with the storm of colors,
         The branches of the benu beat the dance of the drunken leaves.
Butterflies are bright azure,
The bees blow the sound of the wind-'after.
    The south wind blows 'Awake, awake.'
    Don't know the break of Doel Koel song Go--
       Blood-colored Jagal delirium Ashoka-tree.
আনন্দগান উঠুক তবে বাজি\n এবার আমার ব:
Let the song rise but bet
     Now to my flute of pain.
'After the wave of tears' today
     May the river float.
The wind to go is up, oh, it's up,
All night my eyes are sleepy.
My heart is rising
     In the laughter of cold water--
Let me see who you are
     Now in my flute of pain.
O unknown, unknown melody
     Play my flute of pain,
Suddenly this time in the wind
     Don't stay afloat.
Never met anyone, Ogo, Tari Birhe
Called like this - who stays at home!
hope of home
আনন্দ তুমি স্বামি, মঙ্গল তুমি,\n তুমি:
You are joy, lord, you are good,
    You are beautiful, Jibanath.
I will wake up your words in grief,
         Desperation is great.
    Chit Man Arpinu Taba Praprante--
        Shubhra Shantishtdal-Punyamadhu-Pane
Servant wanted, but in good condition
    When will this sad night dawn?
আনন্দধ্বনি জাগাও গগনে!\n কে:
Wake up the sound of joy in heaven!
             Who is waking up and wants to wake up?
          Say 'get up' to the deep sleepers.
Hero Timirarjani goes there, Usha Nab Jyotirmayi laughs--
                  In new joy, in new life,
          The flowers are yellow, the honey is sweet, the flowers are sweet.
The hero wakes up in the light of hope.
          Tarun Tapan is riding the Arun Chariot in Kirankireet--
Let's go to work in the human society, let's go to the outside world--
          Don't stay in lazy sleep, don't stay in deep sleep.
          Shame goes away, laziness and luxury go away.
আনন্দ রয়েছে জাগি ভুবনে তোমার\n তুমি স:
There is joy in your waking world
    You are always near.
Ravi Shashi Tara is stunned in Nilambar
    It has been built, O white ray.
The world family returns to you happily in the sky,
    Your crores are spread out by and by.
I am a child of the poor, but in that shelter
    But love forever
আনন্দলোকে মঙ্গলালোকে বিরাজ', সত্যসুন্দর॥:
Anandaloke Mangalaloke Vraj', Satyasundar.
Glory is revealed in the sky,
The world is surrounded by Manibhushan.
Asteroid Chandratapan Baikul moves fast
Drinking, bathing, in the inexhaustible rays.
Dharani' after the shower is pure, charming honey is beautiful
Phulpallab-Gitgandha-Sundar-Barane.
Behe Jeevan Rajnidin Chirunuthara,
Mercy is relentless in birth and death.
Affection, love, kindness, devotion softens the soul,
How comforting you are in the rain.
What a great festival in the world, the world salutes
Shrisampada Bhumaspad Nirbhayasaran.
আনন্দেরই সাগর হতে এসেছে আজ বান।\nদাঁড় ধর:
Today bun has come from the ocean of joy.
Stand up and bow today, pull everyone.
I will burden you as much as I can.
     After the wave, I will catch it, if life goes.
Who calls you back, who obeys?
Who talks about fear today-- fear is all there is to know.
I will be sitting in happiness due to any curse or planet's fault.
     I will catch the rope of the sail, let's go and sing a song.
গানে গানে তব বন্ধন যাক টুটে\n রুদ্ধব:
Song by song, but the bond is broken
     Crying wakes up in the darkness of Ruddhavani.
Bhuvanaveena beats in the heart of Vishwakabi
     Let life fall in the flow of your melody.
     Your rhythm is broken and conflict breaks in your life,
     Inwardly and outwardly, therefore, the tension does not match.
The harmonious soul is a strange barrier--that is darkness, that is a riddle--
     Song-Bhola you take back the song, let him run away.
আপনহারা মাতোয়ারা আছি তোমার আশা ধরে--\:
Apanhara Matova is waiting for your hope--
O Saki, won't you give me a glass of water?
The stream of juice is strained, and the shadow of the river is smeared.
    The fragrance wafts from far away.
Lift up your face, O dear one -- with the offerings of your hands
Like a candle, give me immortality.
A lot of flowers bloom in Nandannikunjshak,
    I have never seen such a charming look, where is the smell like this?
আপনাকে এই জানা আমার ফুরাবে না।\n এই জা:
I will never stop knowing you.
   I know you as soon as I know this.
How many lives and deaths are you on those feet
   Even if I give you, the debt will increase.
   I have to get down to the pier,
   Again and again in the life of this world.
My business will grow with you day and night,
   I will buy and sell with you.
আপনারে দিয়ে রচিলি রে কি এ আপনারই আবরণ!\n:
It's yours to cover with you!
    Open the door and see his joy in the heart.
There is no freedom today, the sky is also in prison.
    So Nirudha Samiran comes full of poisonous breath.
    Push hide; Darkness will strike - cast you away--
    Life will be filled with your nectar easily.
Empty your flute, let the one who plays come--
    Don't take alms, then you will know that your treasure is full.
আপনি অবশ হলি, তবে বল দিবি তুই কারে?\n:
You are paralyzed, but tell me who you are?
      Stand up, stand up, don't fall.
Don't be ashamed, don't be afraid, you won't win...
      Everyone will respond then call, you who.
If you go out, don't go back to the way.
      Back and forth from back and forth.
There is no fear in the universe, fear is only in your own mind--
      Take shelter and go out.
আপনি আমার কোন্‌খানে\n বেড়:
where are you at me
            Looking for her
He who returns to the land of shadows in various forms and disguises
Who knows whether his love will end with tears and laughter.
    I heard the language of my songs
          I can't find his house.
When the day goes by, the light comes dirty--
How many afternoons does the flute go to Multan?
আবার এরা ঘিরেছে মোর মন।\n আ:
Again they surrounded my mind.
              Cover the name again.
Again these various words accumulate, my mind wanders in different directions,
The fire grew again gradually, again this is lost Sricharan.
              But the silent message is in the heart
              Do not drown in the noise of people.
Be with me in all, wrap me in you always,
My intention is to keep the light-filled and generous tribhuvana.
আবার এসেছে আষাঢ় আকাশ ছেয়ে,\n:
The gray sky has come again,
             The smell of rain comes in the air.
This old heart of mine is shaking the pool again
            Looking for new clouds.
   Rahia Rahia After the vast field, the new grass is shadowed by clouds.
``It's here'' says the soul, ``It's here'' this song is rising--
            It has come to the eyes, it has come to the heart.
আবার যদি ইচ্ছা কর আবার আসি ফিরে\n দুঃখ:
Come back again if you want
   Waves of sorrow and happiness play on the shore of this sea.
Again the raft floats in the water, after the dust, let's play.
             Behind the illusion of laughter, the eyes float.
In the dark night of the thorn road I travel again,
   Live by being hurt or die by being hurt.
Again you pretend to play with me and laugh.
             Love again in new love.
আবার শ্রাবণ হয়ে এলে ফিরে,\n ম:
When it comes back to Sravana again,
          Surrounded by clouds
The sun is lost, the stars are lost, the path is in the dark - that is lost,
          Waves in the river.
All skies, all rains are filled with words.
My dark night is falling in torrents,
          My heart is pounding.
আমরা খুঁজি খেলার সাথি--\nভোর না হতে জাগা:
We are looking for playmates--
Wake up before dawn those who sleep all night.
   We call in the voice of the bird, we dance in the bakultala,
I know the mantra of forgetfulness, we are leaves in the wind.
          Do not accept death.
The gallows of time take away the looted treasure.
   We are your lover, we will not leave you Mora--
My lamp burns even in the darkness.
আমরা তারেই জানি তারেই জানি সাথের সাথি,\:
We know him, he knows his partner.
   That's why I pull day and night.
       with the string grazing arrow,
           bajai benu,
   Seated under the shade of tari lagi.
       I am doing the current thing
           run away
   The play of the waves during the storm.
       After a full day's work
           in the evening
   He lights the lamp in the house looking for a way.
আমরা দুজনা স্বর্গ-খেলনা গড়িব না ধরণীতে\n:
We both will not make heaven-toys in Dharani
Enchanted, beautiful, tearful song.
With pain of five hundred
Basraratri Rachib na mora dear--
A weak soul should not beg at the feet of fate.
There is nothing to fear, I know for sure that you are there and I am there.

Flying above the mark of love in the middle of the path
In the worst possible way.
If I suffer from a rough day, I will get--
I don't want peace, I don't want comfort.
If the river breaks its way to cross, near the broken herd,
Standing in the face of death, I will know that you are there and I am there.

I have seen the world through the eyes of both, I have seen the world through the eyes of the two.
Both of them died
আমরা দূর আকাশের নেশায় মাতাল ঘরভোলা সব:
We are all drunken gharbholas in the distant sky--
  Like bees eager for the smell of the forest.
               Our minds wake up before the sun rises--
  I catch the morning-morning melody from the wind.
                Who cares?
       Clouds of blue mountains, glimpses I know.
  The road is winding and winding
       Those who do not get caught are looking for trouble.
আমরা নূতন প্রাণের চর হা হা।\n:
We are the source of new life.
       We live on the road, we don't have a house.
   The capital of old leaves will escape the winter, do you think?
I'll take it all away, I'll blow it away to the south wind.
        I will tie you in a garland of new flowers,
            In this prison of spring.
  Worn-out rust will be avoided quietly?
All your blessings are covered, nothing that is not visible ha ha.
আমরা নূতন যৌবনেরই দূত।\n আম:
We are ambassadors of new youth.
              We're fickle, we're weird.
                  we break the fence,
          We are intoxicated with the colors of Ashokaban.
            We break the bonds of thunder -- we are electricity.
                  We make mistakes --
          By jumping into the deep water, I found the pool.
Where the call comes, we are ready in the storm of life and death.
আমরা পথে পথে যাব সারে সারে,\nতোমার:
We will go on our way,
I will return door to door singing your name.
         I will say, 'Who will you give to the mother?
         Who do you give money to? Who do you give life to?
How many times has your mother called you?
         All the sounds of life in your name
         You will wake up very sweet
My heart beat.
         At the end of the day, it's your feet
         I will bring everyone's worship
The gift of your child is heavy.
আমরা বেঁধেছি কাশের গুচ্ছ, আমরা গেঁথেছি:
We tied bunches of straw, we braided shefalimalas--
       I have decorated the branches with fresh rice.
       Come, Sharadlakshmi, in your chariot of white clouds,
Come to the clear blue path,
Come to the washed green light-shining forest--
Come, crowned, white hundred, cool-dew-pouring.
       Jhara Malti flowers
       On the banks of the Ganges filled with sheltered couches,
       Dead wings are back at your feet.
       Pluck the sound of your golden lyre
       in a gentle jingle,
       Laughter-pouring melody will melt into momentary tears
আমরা সবাই রাজা আমাদের এই রাজার রাজত্:
We are all kings in the reign of this king of ours--
          Otherwise, I will meet my king's name.
We do what we please, yet, at his pleasure,
We are neither bound nor enslaved to the fear of the king of slaves--
          Otherwise, I will meet my king's name.
The king gives value to everyone, you get that value back.
No one kept me short with any falsehood--
         Otherwise, I will meet my king's name.
We will go according to our ways, we will meet in the end on his way,
No one will die in the vicious cycle of failure--
         Otherwise my king
আমাদের যাত্রা হল শুরু এখন, ওগো কর্:
Our journey begins now, O Lord.
            I salute you.
Now let the wind blow, let the storm rise, I will not return again--
            Salutations to you
With us, your victory sound is not a barrier to danger
                          Oh master.
Now mom, I say vasai tari, give go kari par--
            Salutations to you
Now it's up to those who don't want to find their way home
                          Oh master.
When your time comes who or whose--
            do you
আমাদের শান্তিনিকেতন আমাদের সব হতে:
Our Santiniketan belongs to all of us.
My heart swings in his sky-filled arms,
I see it again and again, it is always new.
My youth fair, my open field games,
Sohag-Makha of my blue skies morning and evening.
The shadow of my shawl plays the song of the forest,
Amlaki-kanan is always dancing in the leaves.
Where we die, he does not go far.
My heart is tied to the string of love that is in his melody.
My life and life, he who is united in one,
He is my brother's brother
আমাদের সখীরে কে নিয়ে যাবে রে--\n:
Who will take us to Sakhir?
            I'll take it away, I won't let go--no--no.
              Who knows who came from where.
        Why does he come to take my friend - I will not give.
  My friends will stand on the road, I will tie her flowers in my hands,
I will tie it and leave it in Kusumban - I will not allow it to be taken to Sakhir.
আমায় ক্ষমো হে ক্ষমো, নমো হে নমো, তোমা:
Forgive me, forgive me, bow down, bow down, remember you, O Nirupam,
      The mind bounces and beats in the dance.
          My whole body yearns for your praise
             Dine left rhythm among newborns.
                Bandana is present in music today in my style.

One shivers in extreme pain, the chest trembles.
       The waves play in the sea of ​​peace, the beauty wakes up.
          All my consciousness, all my pains, in this adoration--
             My pursuit at your feet does not die in shame.
                Vandana More
আমায় থাকতে দে-না আপন-মনে।\nসেই চরণে:
Don't let me stay in your mind.
I remember the words of that foot every now and then.
    Who forgets the words in the work,
    His memorial wreath sits in a secret corner.
This is the gem of pain that Ani gave to my chest
    With this, at the end of the day, I will go to him alone.
    I stand in front of the water, I decorate it with string.
আমায় দাও গো ব'লে\nসে কি তুমি আমায় দ:
Give me a go
Do you give me Dola Ashantidole?
Can't see who hit the heart from behind
                The waves that make
I don't see the face so I feel fear - I don't know that it is nothing.
I will wipe, I will get up and laugh-- the one who gives a wave when he comes
                  will hold
দোষী করো আমায়, দোষী করো।\n ধুলায়-পড়া ম:
Blame me, blame me.
  Hold the dusty pale yellow beneath your feet.
                               Branch full of crime
                        Do it with your own hands, oh,
            Then fill that empty bough with your mercy--
                               blame me
             You are high, I will snare you
                                               in my crime
             My fault is your virtue
                                 You will do it, you unblemished cow--
            Forgiveness is everywhere
আমায় বাঁধবে যদি কাজের ডোরে\n কেন:
I will be tied to work
     Why are you so crazy?
I know why the wind brings the secret message of the sky,
        Parankhani gives that Bhere.
How is the light of gold, dancing in the blood in all bodies.
Whom send now and then to my open air,
        Take all hearts.
আমায় ভুলতে দিতে নাইকো তোমার ভয়।\nআমার:
Don't let me forget your fear.
There is no end to my forgetfulness, there is no end to your love.
  I go far and wide, that distance is only my distance--
        Far away from you is not far.
   The bud of my soul does not open,
   Do you have a spring?
Lose me in this game every now and then--
     Your victory is in the midst of defeat.
আমায় মুক্তি যদি দাও বাঁধন খুলে\n আম:
If you free me, untie me
    I will pick up your tie.
If the path that is eternal is my path
    I will forget the way between you.
        If you take the light of the house
    Better live in your black darkness.
If you don't see me anymore, I'll be alone
            Disorientated is the opposite.
আমার যাবার বেলায় পিছু ডাকে\nভোরের আলো:
Called me when I left
The morning light is in the gap between the clouds.
    The bored birds of the mudflat called
    Branch by branch of the forest, calls after.
The full river runs beneath the shade--
Looking for whom, calls after.
    Who is he in my soul?
    Utla, who is about to say goodbye, is called back.
আমার অঙ্গে অঙ্গে কে বাজায় বাঁশি। আন:
Who plays the flute in my organ?   The mind is bored with happiness and sadness.
           The body and mind are filled with the melody of flowers.
                What a sweet fragrance floats in the air.
Suddenly I feel hope, I have received the language of fire.
           Today I am writing a beautiful letter to whom--
                 El Marmer's Bandini Bani Bandhan Nashi.
আমার অন্ধপ্রদীপ শূন্য-পানে চেয়ে আছে,\:
My blind lamp is empty-looking,
He who shames the failed night star.
         He wrote in Lalate
         Learn your writing.
               Give the victory sign to the cow, here he goes.
Alas, if you go out of the way, Birhini!
You owe me your light.
        Your night is my night
        Built on the basis of one light
              Alas, I may lose such a fortune.
আমার অভিমানের বদলে আজ নেব তোমার মালা:
I will take your garland today instead of my pride.
Today I finally finish the turn of tears.
I threw my hard heart by the wayside,
Your feet will give me a sweet kiss.
It was my darkness, you took it and pulled it,
Yours, love came that became a fire-- Karala Tare Ala.
That I was the most precious to me,
I decorated your barandala by destroying it.
আমার আঁধার ভালো, আলোর কাছে বিকিয়ে দেবে:
My darkness is good, he will sell you to the light.
        The fog that fades away in the light is destroyed.
        A foolish child roams easily in his mother's house,
        Arrogant wise man standing at your outer door.
Your way shows itself, so go, mother, go straight.
Those who rush to show the way only increase the search--
They call me under the guise of worship, come and see me under the deul--
        He disguises himself in the best of his mind.
আমার আপন গান আমার অগোচরে আমার মন হরণ ক:
My own song steals my heart without my presence,
   He floats to all limits.
      That far-off falgun blooms in exuberant bloom--
          A strong wind comes from there, it hits me.
Where are you mum unknown mate,
    Cut out the business,
      Come, come, vanishing wayfarer--
            The tide is full of my waves.
আমার আর হবে না দেরি--\n আমি শুনে:
I won't be late anymore--
    I heard that bell of yours.
Are you, Nath, standing in my way?
It seems that from moment to moment I am dying
            To lose you--
            I will not be late.
            my dream is whole
      Now the morning star plays the harp in life.
I have nothing left to give,
I will take the garland of your blessings only on my head
            Around my forehead--
      I will not be late.
আমার এ ঘরে আপনার করে গৃহদীপখানি জ্বালো:
Light the house lamp in my house.
May all sorrows be worth it, love your light.
Blessed be the hidden darkness in every corner,
May everyone live in the light of your virtue.
Parashmani's lamp is yours, Achapal is his light
Sona karre lobbe palke all my taint is black.
All the lamps I have lit are only flames, only ink--
Pour your rays on the door of my house.
আমার এ পথ তোমার পথের থেকে অনেক দূরে গে:
This path of mine has gone far away from your path.
    When will your garland be tied to my flowers,
    Your flute cries in the distant wind and calls out to someone.
It is tiring to sit on the footpath.
    I will tell you the secret pain of Sathihara to whom he is--
    Travelers go to their own minds, leaving me behind.
আমার এই পথ-চাওয়াতেই আনন্দ।\nখেলে যায়:
I am happy in this way-seeking.
The shadow of the sun plays, the monsoon comes and the spring comes.
Who comes forward with news,
I am happy in my mind - the wind is pleasant.
Rob alone at the door all day long,
I will see you when good luck comes.
At that moment, I sing a smile in my heart,
Then the fragrance comes out.
আমার এই রিক্ত ডালি দিব তোমারি পায়ে।\:
I will give this empty branch to your feet.
  I will give Kangalini's anchal on your path.
    On the flower that blossoms, O Atanu,
          Give me the poor offering of my worship.
You take me on your expedition of war,
     Please paint the flowers in my favor.
Give me emptiness if I fill it with joy I will proclaim your triumphal voice--
         Wake up Falgun's call to my south.
আমার একটি কথা বাঁশি জানে, বাঁশিই জান:
The flute knows one thing about me, only the flute knows.
          The bottom of the chest was full, no one could say,
          I just said in the ear of the flute.
My eyes were sleepless late at night,
I wanted to stay with them.
              The whole night went like this, I didn't find my partner to wake up--
              I woke up to the music of the flute.
আমার কণ্ঠ হতে গান কে নিল ভুলায়ে,\nসে য:
Who took the song from my voice,
He who builds a nest in the corner of the silent mind.
        In the day of the cloud in the month of Shravana in the sigh of Yuthivan
        He gives the shadow of the fan in my soul.
             When autumn trembles with the rush of flowers
             Behind that secret song that fills the eyes.
What sounds in the late night half-awake half-asleep,
What swings between my dreams.
আমার খেলা যখন ছিল তোমার সনে\n:
When my game was yours
          Who knew who you were then?
Then there was no fear, no shame,
          Life was turbulent.
How many times did you call in the morning?
          like my own friend
I ran back with you laughing
          What a forest that day.
Ogo, all the songs you used to sing that day
          Who knew it meant anything.
My soul sings with only the strings,
         The ever-dancing heart is restless.
Suddenly, at the end of the game, what picture do I see today?
          The silent sky, the silent Shasi Ravi,
your feet
আমার জীবনপাত্র উচ্ছলিয়া মাধুরী করেছ দ:
You have given me my life vessel Uchlia Madhuri--
         you don't know you don't know
       You don't know its value.
                  Rajnigandha is invisible
         As the dew fills with dreams,
                  you don't know you don't know
You don't know, you poured your song in my heart.
                  It's time to say goodbye--
         Make a happy face, make a happy face, make a happy face--
         Filled with sweet death, I will die at the foot of the soul.
The one who doesn't know, the one who doesn't know, the one who doesn't know
his
আমার ঢালা গানের ধারা সেই তো তুমি পিয়েছিল:
You drank the stream of my pouring song,
When did you ask for my dream garland?
           My mind will be far away
           The sky turned around
           Then in the tone of my pain
                      You went with a glimpse.

When I go to say goodbye
       At the meeting-turned company
           Autumn-light clouds
           This quote will stick--
           This is blue and this is blue
                      You showed me
আমার দোসর যে জন ওগো তারে কে জানে।\n:
Who knows my friend John Ogo.
  Who knows what response Ektar gives to my song.
Does anyone know the waves of my river?
     It goes with the flow who gets it. who knows
          When Bakul Jhare
  My ears are filled with goo
Then who comes and goes in the shade of the forest,
     K Saji brings his fill. who knows
আমার নয়ন তব নয়নের নিবিড় ছায়ায়\n মন:
My eyes are in deep shadows
       Searching for the words of the mind.
When there is hidden jewel in Maya
       He lost his way.
He looked at her with eagerness in silence--
There is no search for hidden words
Returning to the unknown
        Amused in tears.
Addressing the words hidden in my heart
       Drop the dark shadow in your heart?
On the door I painted a lotus seat in blood,
       Does he say anything to you?
But to go through Kunj
I give pain in the air to get more--
The flute gives language to the sky with hope
       He does not understand anyone.
আমার নয়ন তোমার নয়নতলে মনের কথা খোঁজে,\:
My eyes search for the heart under your eyes,
There he lost his way in the magic of black shadows.
        In the silent Dith, Shudhaya does not receive as much response as the heart,
        I am in tears rather than being confused.
Do you think you got the impression of my words?
        This-that I brought the garland, does anyone listen to his words?
        I go through the path, I hurt the wind as I go to get--
        Someone understands the language of the sadness-shadow of the flute.
আমার নয়ন-ভুলানো এলে,\n আমি কী হের:
When I lose my sight,
     What did I lose my heart?
  Rushes of flowers falling on the side of Shiulitla
       On the dew-wet grass the arunranga treads
             If you forget your eyes.
Anchalkhani of light fell into the forest,
   The flowers look at that face and say what they think.
       I will kill you, please, cover your face, deer.
   Throw that cloud cover with both hands and push it.
I hear deep conch sound at the door of Vanadevi,
  Your arrival wakes up in the air.
     Where is the golden nupur, I understand in the middle of my heart
  All right
আমার নিখিল ভুবন হারালেম আমি যে।\n:
I have lost my entire world.
        Ragini goes to Vishwaveena.
            Homeless heart, alas, on the path without light,
                   Gahan went down to Timir Cave.
        The light of the evening star in your eyes.
    Light the darkness of my path.
After the mirage the thirsty watch passed,
             At the end of the day
    Your heart is calm - Panth Amritirthgamy.
আমার নিশীথরাতের বাদলধারা, এসো হে গোপন:
My midnight storm, come, O secret
Disoriented in my dreams
Oh dark treasure, cover my heart--
I don't want Tapan, I don't want them.
When everyone is fast asleep, take it, take it,
Take my sleep.
         Come quietly to the lonely house as only a melody--
         let go let go
Respond to my tears.
আমার পরান যাহা চায় তুমি তাই, তুমি তাই:
Wear what you want, you can.
I have no one, nothing in this world except you.
If you can't find happiness, go find happiness--
I have found you in my heart, I want nothing else.
