I will disappear in your absence, I will live in you
       Long days, long days, long years and months.
If you love someone else, if you don't come back,
But you can get whatever you want, as much pain as I get.
পাত্রখানা যায় যদি যাক ভেঙেচুরে-\nআছে:
If the pot is broken,
There is Anjali Mor, give me prasad - not full.
         The interest of simple happiness is not worth it.
         He spreads wherever he wants--
         Bigger things that are close to you are far away.
         Give your heart to me easily.
I will not want to lie again and again
Broken-held dark-backed.
         Do not break the nesting barrier,
         I will run in the void of the free path.
            Void-filled to the tune of your flute
            Give my heart to my simple needs - not full.
আমার প্রাণের ' পরে চলে গেল কে\nবসন্:
Who left after my life?
Like a spring breeze.
He who touched, bowed to--
Hundreds of flowers bloomed.
He left, didn't say--where he went he didn't come back.
As he went on he sang as if--
So I am sitting in Kusumbane.
He has swept away like a wave, gone to the land of moonlight,
           Where the laughter has gone, the laughter has left her--
           It seemed as if he had called me from the corner of my eye.
Where will I go, where will I go, thinking so sit alone
আমার বনে বনে ধরল মুকুল,\n:
The buds caught in my forest,
            South wind blowing in mind.
     Bees wing to wing
            As if I wanted to fly.
     Who has painted such a deep color in secret dreams --
The thought of new Kislayashiharan is my color.
                    On Falgun Purnima
                In this disoriented night
No aimless drink in sleepless song
   In the tidal wave of strong smell, my wings will fly.
আমার বিচার তুমি করো তব আপন করে।\nদিনের:
You judge me but your own way.
The actions of the day are brought to your courtroom.
If I worship the mischa deity, if I follow false rituals,
If I do injustice to someone,
You judge me but your own.
If I hurt someone out of greed, I become an apostate out of fear,
In the next pain I get happiness for a moment--
The life you have given me, if I have given it a stigma,
I destroy you with self-infatuation,
You judge me but your own.
আমার বেলা যে যায় সাঁঝ বেলাতে\n ত:
My time is in the evening
      To tune in to your tune.
A single star sings a song of pain,
I have lost with you again and again in this game
      To tune in to your tune.
            In a close tune,
            That whistle that sounds far away.
Can everyone join in the fun of the song?
   To cast the web of rage around the heart of the world--
      To match your tune?
আমার ব্যথা যখন আনে আমায় তোমার দ্বারে\:
When my pain brings me to your door
Then you come and open the door, call him.
     He who is the kangal of the side, moves so all the days,
         On the thorny path, he is approaching you.
When my pain plays me tunes--
Can't stay away from that song.
     That song fell like a stormy night bird,
         Come out in the dark.
আমার ভাঙা পথের রাঙা ধুলায় পড়েছে কার:
Whose footprints have fallen in the dust of my broken path
    Petals are torn from her necklace.
    When there was no response, he left and said-
    Who makes me feel sad or cry is different.
  Arun Alo was young then, the path was narrow.
The day that spring catches in its colorful guise has come.
    On that day the news did not reach that Rainu was sitting in the room--
         Today I will be out on the road, my life is worn out.
আমার ভুবন তো আজ হল কাঙাল, কিছু তো নাই:
My world is a mess today, there is nothing left,
    What is it if you see it?
All his fallen, all dead, the worn-out bosom he wears--
    Cover the shame of the naked soul with the gift of love.
What was his song in the corner, where did it go?
Now play your flute to his empty voice.
Who extinguished the light of his lamp, you lighted him--
    My own darkness escapes me.
আমার মন কেমন করে--\nকে জানে, কে জানে, কে:
How does my mind--
Who knows, who knows, who knows who.
          The birds of Alkh Path went and called,
            I went to the distant horizon.
       Bhavna is chased by me.
Sea breeze breeze breeze.
         Dreaming of the fans,
    Who has tied me to the house in a golden cage?
আমার মন চেয়ে রয় মনে মনে হেরে মাধুরী।:
Madhuri lost my heart to Roy.
        Don't turn my eyes to death.
        The one star humming in the heart of the heart that--
        The flute played on the way to the chariot.
        Arup Madhuri swings in Roop's lap.
In the lake of cool water, the flower of the flower floats after the water.
        When you want to grab hold of the hand, give it a wave and push--
        I am fixed in my mind, do not steal.
        He is not the treasure to catch, Arup Madhuri.
আমার মন তুমি, নাথ, লবে হরে\n আ:
My heart is lost to you, Nath
        I am sitting on that hope.
That star floats in the blue sky, Shashi laughs silently,
My eyes are filled with hope.
On the ground water but dust, coolness but swelling
            In the love of women,
In various directions, at various times, in various tunes, in various rhythms
        In many ways, you will love me - I am holding on to hope.
আমার মন মানে না-- দিনরজনী।\nআমি ক:
My mind doesn't understand-- Dinarjani.
What do I remember about Tanu Bhariya Pulak Rakhi Nari.
Ogo, what do you think about these two eyes with shallow eyeballs--
                      oh man
         He is Sudhabachan, he is Sukhparash, playing the flute on the organ.
So your heart gets bored after hearing--
                      I don't know why
Ogo, what words float in the air, what face wakes up in the sky.
Oo, what a sweet melody is heard in the riverbed of Banmarmar.
         The smell of flowers clings to me like a friend.
I am under whose feet are these words, this pain, happiness
আমার মনের কোণের বাইরে\nআমি জানলা খুল:
Out of the corner of my mind
I want to open the window every now and then.
     In a distant bored tone
       Glimpse of whom I get--
          Is there or not?
My two eyes are lost.
  Which evening stars are looking for in which sky.
   Whose shadow touches me
    The heart trembles so re--
       Humming and singing
আমার মনের বাঁধন ঘুচে যাবে যদি ও ভাই:
My mind will be broken if he brother,
Stay out of bounds but timeless.
If there is an order to go to sea
The tying of the thak is crooked,
However, the river will sing the song, brother.
আমার মনের মাঝে যে গান বাজে শুনতে কি প:
Can you listen to the song that is playing in my heart?
Go with a glimpse of my eyes.
   Ravi's rays take the dew of the flower's breast,
   Do you take the song of my soul like that?
   When my bored heart comes out-drink
        It is everywhere that catches you.
What does the young leaf say to the light in the first morning?
   My heart says that too.
আমার মাঝে তোমারি মায়া জাগালে তুমি কবি।\n:
You are a poet when you awaken my love in me.
     Draw a picture of my heart.
Tapas, you are meditating, but what do you see?
     Apan-mane Meghaswapan you are Rach Ravi.
     I am the Janhvi of your thoughts.
     Your gold is burdened, I am its raft--
     Play with me if you forget yourself.
I don't understand what the voice means
     Your Bhairavi cries out on the harp.
     Mukul mum is fragrant but secretly fragrant.
আমার মাথা নত করে দাও হে তোমার চরণধুলার:
Bow my head under your feet.
        Drown all my pride in tears.
  To glorify oneself is only to dishonor oneself.
        All you have to do is spin around and die.
        Drown all my pride in tears.
        Let me not promote my own work,
        Make your wish in my life.
Jachi, O your supreme peace, your supreme glory--
        Hide me and stand in the lotus heart.
        Drown all my pride in tears.
আমার মালার ফুলের দলে আছে লেখা বসন্তে:
The spring spells are written on my garland's flowers,
      In its sweetness there is an invitation to youth.
           Sahana is dyed with Ragini's colors,
               Madhukar's hunger in the rhythm of tears in the smell of his hum.
      An go dala, ganth go mala,
   Ann Madhavi Malati Ashokamanjari, come you come.
Ank Karbi Rangan Kanchan Rajnigandha Prafullamalika, Aay Tora Aay.
      Mala Par Go Mala Par Sundari--
                Hurry up, hurry up.
      Today the moon is rising at full moon,
         Bakulkunj Dakshinawat
আমার মুক্তি আলোয় আলোয় এই আকাশে,\n আমা:
My freedom shines in this sky,
    My freedom is in the dust, in the grass, in the grass.
I lose you far away from my mind,
    My liberation floats above the melody of the song.
    My freedom is in everyone's mind,
    Misfortunes are hard work to be trifled with.
Yajnashala Atmahome of Vishwadhata is burning--
    Life should be given to Ahuti Mukti Ashe.
আমার মুখের কথা তোমার নাম দিয়ে দাও ধুয়ে:
Wash my mouth with your name,
Put your name in my silence.
The strings of my body harp to the rhythm of blood
The jingle of your name in joy.
Let them wake up after sleep,
Let Arun Lekha Nab draw for the good of awakening.
May your name burn with all desire and hope,
In all love, write your name Rahuk.
May your name rise at the end of all works,
I will cry and smile and keep your name on my chest.
The honey of Rabe in the company of the lotus of life,
I will give you your name at the moment of death.
আমার যদি বেলা যায় গো বয়ে জেনো জেনো\n:
If I have time go boy know know
        My heart is with you.
Seats on the roadside, garlands to give you--
        I am engrossed in Zeno Zeno Tai.
                 The passenger just left
                 Call in different ways.
I am walking like this, you are filling the arrangement with your own hands--
        Knowing knowing is hidden in your mind.
আমার যে আসে কাছে, যে যায় চলে দূরে,\nক:
Who comes near me, who goes away,
Friends who get or don't get kavu,
As if this word is in a bad mood--
            you came to me
A heart full of honeyed juice,
Kavu Nithur's bad words of love,
But always know this--
            You smile with love.
Ogo, the swing of happiness and sadness
How stormy throughout my life,
Let the heart not forget my words--
            you love me
When death comes quietly to the door
When from the familiar's lap he bites,
to know
আমার যে গান তোমার পরশ পাবে\n:
My song will get your heart
            Where is the jewelry in mind?
       Searching for the melody in the dark,
My ankhijal will wash your feet
            Where is the jewelry in mind?
When the dry hours are spent in vain
If you want, I will send you the script of the song.
        Where is the melody that runs under the sadness,
My last words will go to your door
            Where is the jewelry in mind?
আমার যে দিন ভেসে গেছে চোখের জলে,\n:
My day was washed away in tears,
         The shadow of the star has fallen under the sky.
That day Ragini stopped, went down into the abyss, stopped.
         Today, in the morning, the wind is blowing
                Shivering.
         That day was mixed with intense happiness and sweet sorrow--
           Bin was tied to life by two wires.
He is torn when one day he will cry,
           He lost his voice.
আমার যে সব দিতে হবে সে তো আমি জানি--\nআম:
I know all I have to pay--
As much wealth as I have, Lord, as many words as I have.
Seeing with my eyes, hearing with my ears,
The skillful service of my hand, my movement--
           All must be paid.
My mornings, my evenings are in Hrydayapatraput
From the secret, your water will bubble up.
Now that she is my harp, she will be bound,
It will play when you have your own melody--
           All must be paid.
Your joy fills my sorrow with happiness
Take mine but take it yours.
I say what I got will go in good time
I'll give them to you then they'll be mine--
আমার যেতে সরে না মন--\nতোমার দুয়ার পার:
I don't want to go...
I go to your door that is lost
        Immerse yourself in the abyss.
Walking along the way, we see everything as if it is mixed.
    Nikhil Bhuvan calls back Anukhan.
        I just feel bad
Nothing was given to you.
    When I go step by step I get obstacles,
        Come back for no reason.
আমার রাত পোহালো শারদ প্রাতে।\nবাঁশি, ত:
My night is late autumn.
Flute, to whom will I give you?
   The sound rang in your chest
   How much is the farewell saga that--
              How many mornings and nights in Falgune Shravane.
The words that remain hidden inside the soul
If you take a song, you steal it.
   The time that is his is past
   Like the last star--
               End it with the death of Shiuliful.
কণ্ঠে নিলেম গান, আমার শেষ পারানির কড়ি--\:
I took the song in my voice, my last old song--
     I will not be alone at the ghat and read.
        Take the joke of my tone
        Tare Bholab sings,
           I ride with that hope in the face of the enemy.
Who cares whether I will pass or not?
Called the madman of this tune in the distant wind.
       Oh, you fools!
       I'll go I'll go--
          Broken doors, cut ropes.
আমার শেষ রাগিণীর প্রথম ধুয়ো ধরলি রে:
My last ragini's first dhuyo dharli re ke tui.
      Who filled my last cup with tears?
Far to the west lies the path of the day
        Who are you wearing the veil of blood rage on your head?
        What is your last wish in the evening star?
        The last pain blew in the evening wind.
The garland of your sudden life filled my empty branch--
        Who made me a death companion?
আমার সকল কাঁটা ধন্য করে ফুটবে ফুল ফু:
All my thorns will be blessed and flowers will bloom.
All my pains will turn into roses.
My long-desired sky will come rushing south wind,
        My heart yearns to steal the fragrance.
I will be ashamed when I have wealth to give,
When form is given to Bikasiva Prana's worship.
At the end of the night, when my friend came to do the Parsha,
        After running out, the parties will loot him at every step.
আমার সকল নিয়ে বসে আছি সর্বনাশের আশায়।\:
I am sitting with all my hopes of destruction.
I am looking for a way for him who floats on the way.
The one who doesn't see, the one who sees -- loves from behind --
My heart is filled with that deep secret love.
আমার সকল রসের ধারা\n তোমাত:
All my juices flow
       May you have a good day.
May the Parasha shine throughout life, may the monster wake up in the world,
   My two Ankhitaras are drowning in your form.
            The lost mind is mine
       You brought it back again.
You gather the scattered hopes,
   Sway your neck with the rope knot.
আমার সত্য মিথ্যা সকলই ভুলায়ে দাও,\n:
Forget all my truth and falsehood,
             make me happy
I don't want arguments, I don't want arguments, I don't know closure, I don't know liberation,
Awaken your universal desire in my heart.
         Let all the world sink into the rocks of peace,
             Let all happiness and sorrow stop in the heart.
         Let all sentences, all words, all efforts be stymied--
Hear your sweet words in my heart.
আমার সুরে লাগে তোমার হাসি,\nযেমন ঢে:
I feel your smile in my voice,
As the rays of Rabi come in waves.
          Divanishi I also return in search of your tone,
          When suddenly this mind forgets your flute.
All my work is left, I have given all the lessons.
When I say I will catch you in my song, I get bored.
          I love to catch your song.
আমার হিয়ার মাঝে লুকিয়ে ছিলে দেখতে আম:
I did not see you hiding in my hair.
          I didn't get to see you.
I opened my eyes to drink, my heart did not want to drink.
  In all my love, in all the hurt, in all the hope
    You were near me, I did not go to you.
    You were my joy in my play--
    I forgot so happily, the day passed happily.
    Hidden deep in the soul of my sad song
    You gave the tune, I didn't sing your song.
আমার হৃদয় তোমার আপন হাতের দোলে দোলাও:
Rock my heart in the swing of your hand,
          Who says what to me, forget it, forget it.
    They only bind me with words.
          Open all bonds with the call of the flute.
          I remember how many days and nights
          I was your playmate.
    Today you do the same, hold your rakhi in front of you,
          Raise that wave of play in my soul.
আমারে করো তোমার বীণা, লহো গো লহো তুলে।:
Make me your veena, laho go laho Ute.
     Tantiraji Mohan's fingers will rise.
Gentle yet tender, parsh karo paran-' later,
     The hum will rise, but in the ear.
Sometimes I will cry in happiness and sometimes in sadness in your face,
     I read at my feet, I remain silent, I forget.
No one knows what new songs will rise in the void,
     The message of joy will go to eternity.
আমারে ডাক দিল কে ভিতর-পানে--\n:
Who calls me in--
                     They know how to call.
          Ashwin is in the Shiulishakhe
                 As the bee calls
                       Sourav's song in the morning.
    I found a house without a house today.
    How did the news reach him?
                   In the ear of the cloud without a house.
আমারে তুমি অশেষ করেছ, এমনি লীলা তব--:
You have ruined me, so beautiful, but--
Empty it and fill it again, life is new.
     How many gorges are on the banks of the river
     On the small flute outside the fence,
     Kana-that tan Bazale back back
         Where is that?
You are my lover in that amritparash
The limit has been lost in the huge storm, the words have become hollow.
     I just had a handful
     Giving Day of Giving - Widows--
     How many years did not happen
         I am the only one.
আমারে দিই তোমার হাতে\n নূতন ক:
I give it to you
            New to new.
Day by day the flower blooms, just like that
          Life is in your yard
            New to new.
          In the rhythm of separation
            Meet the new.
Lost on the shores of light and darkness, I return,
          meet you
            New to new.
আমারে বাঁধবি তোরা সেই বাঁধন:
Do you have that bandhabi to me?
I agree to be a prisoner to everyone.
                   The evening-sky without a door bound more go;
                   Nishidin Bandhara river flows to me.
The yolk that you bloom, you shed, don't stay in the house--
They are my companion, my friend, whether they want it or not.
It is a lie to say that I am caught.
I am bound to myself by the melody of my own song.
                   You whose soul was shaken, mind was forgotten
he is human
আমি আছি তোমার সভার দুয়ার-দেশে,\n সময় হল:
I am at the door of your meeting,
  When it's time, I will say goodbye with tears and laughter.
I put the flowers that you gave me on my head
  Its petals will fall at the end of the day.
    If the seat is not high, Roy will come down,
  These small songs are scattered behind.
Some of it will remain, the rest will cover the dust of your path.
  Will all of them float away in the evening air?
আমি আশায় আশায় থাকি।\nআমার তৃষিত-আকুল:
I hope in hope.
My thirsty eyes
           Intoxication of dream in sleep-wake-mesha prana--
                   Looking at the far horizon, where do you call?
     Unheard words whispering in the forest,
           What is the bird?
     What if I don't get the language, my life is a colorful fog
                    Covered
আমি একলা চলেছি এ ভবে,\nআমায় পথের সন:
I think I'm walking alone
Who will find the way for me?
     Fear not, fear not--
     Go to your mind
As honey alone is washed away
Only the scent of flowers.
আমি কান পেতে রই ও আমার আপন হৃদয়গহ:
I am listening and at my heart's door again and again
Can you hear the secret of a secret resident's laughter--over and over again.
        Bhramar there is a blue lotus with a blue lotus.
Which night bird sings alone in the darkness again and again without a companion.
        Ke se mor kei ba zaane, some tar dhi abha.
        Some I guess, some I don't understand.
        Sometimes his message gets into my language, what's up?
And he knows me and sends the message hidden in the song, again and again.
আমি কারে ডাকি গো,\nআমার বাঁধন দাও গ:
who do i call
Give me a tie.
I am holding out my hand,
Take me, steal me.
You call, it calls
not to be ashamed,
To throw everything away, push everything away,
               Let's run away.
I am bound by dreams--
Only sleep disturbances,
He is attached to the soul
               Mudye Ankhipute.
Wow, day after day
Leanne is where I am.
Only in speechless tears
               Paran cried.
আমি কী গান গাব যে ভেবে না পাই--\n:
What can I sing that I can't think of--
     Looking for the cloudy sky in the air.
     In the trees of the forest, the language wakes up in a languageless dance--
     The mind is angry with them,
          All day non-stop return that is.
In my organ, the sound wave called the bun,
   I drowned in the flood of juice.
          What is in the shadow of my mind?
          I want him in my dreams.
আমি কী ব'লে করিব নিবেদন\n:
What should I say?
          My heart is my soul.
     Come to your senses, please take care of yourself.
Make it your wealth - my heart, soul, mind.
     Only dust, only ashes, worth nothing,
Surrender to the price, but give it a touch!
     Your glory will be my glory
          I will give up everything but--
            My heart is my soul.
আমি কেবলই স্বপন করেছি বপন বাতাসে--\nত:
I only dreamed of sowing in the wind--
So Akashkusum Karinu Chayan is disappointed.
    Dharani meets like a shadow, Kul Nahi does not get a ray of hope,
       The image floats in the sky.
Nothing got in the way, only in desire.
Keh nahi dil catch only this far-reaching.
    Why do you play alone in your mind?
       At the end of the day, I saw that the ashes were all in a hurry.
আমি কেমন করিয়া জানাব আমার জুড়ালো হৃদয়:
How can I tell my broken heart?
          My heart swelled in the light.
How shall I tell what treasures I have gathered--
          Immersed in deep beauty.
Today I went to the middle of everyone, there I saw the light-seat--
          I saw in my heart.
I said a couple of things to that silent gathering--
          I saw the king of eternal life.
This wind takes me to my heart, the light in my veins
          How did my tanu get along--
So this sky-filled morning fell into my molecule.
Tribhuvan today
আমি চঞ্চল হে,\n আমি সুদূ:
I'm fickle,
               I am far away.
As the days go by, I quietly wait for hope in the night--
     Ogo, in my heart I am trying to get his favor.
Oh, far, far away, the flute you play--
  I don't have wings, I'm in one place.
                        I am crazy,
                  Oh far away I am bored.
      In the play of shadows in the sun-swept lazy day
      What is the idol in the blue sky?
                  Oh far away, I am bored.
    Wow
আমি চাই তাঁরে\nআমারে দিলেন যিনি সেবিকার:
I want him
He gave me the honor of a servant,
          Drooping flowers
Raised from the dust who makes the south.
          oh lord oh lord
              Garland with those flowers,
                    Put it on your neck,
           Don't let him fail, don't let him.
আমি চাহিতে এসেছি শুধু একখানি মালা\nতব:
I have come to ask for just one garland
But the new dew of the new dawn.
Hero shame-clad how many roses how proud,
Ogo, how many yolks have bloomed, let me spoil you.
Ogo, Amal Sarat-Shital-Sameer is worn in your hair,
Ogo, Kishore-Arun-Kiran has come to you.
But flowers are falling from the region to the forest path--
Ogo, your branches are filled with many buds.
আমি চিনি গো চিনি তোমারে ওগো বিদেশিনী:
I know you are a foreigner.
You stay in Sindhu Ogo foreigner.
I saw you in autumn, I saw you in the dark night,
I saw you in the middle of the heart, O foreigner.
I have heard your song with my ears open to the sky,
I surrender my life to you, foreigner.
At the end of worldly wanderings I have come to a new land,
I am a guest at your door, O foreigner.
আমি জেনে শুনে তবু ভুলে আছি, দিবস কাটে:
I know and yet forget, the day passes in vain O--
I want to go, but there are so many obstacles in the way.
        Who are surrounded by heroes on all sides, entwined in hundreds of bonds...
I want to leave, why don't you leave me drowning in illusion?
        Break the happiness of this world, there is no work in this game.
I forget as the time goes by like a senseless.
        Hano taba baj hridyogahane, two channels burn tay hey--
        Give me the water that floats in the water of the eye.
        Empty my heart, find a seat there...
        Come on, Nath
আমি জ্বালব না মোর বাতায়নে প্রদীপ আনি:
I will not light the lamp in my bed,
I will sit and listen to the deep words of darkness.
Let this body and mind of mine reconcile at night,
In this flower of my hidden heart,
         Do not stay in Dhaka, the smell of my pain.
All my hearts will disappear among the stars
         Where the light shines in that darkness.
This is all my daily pathfinding,
Now at the end of the direction and disorientation
         What am I waiting for, Abhay Mani?
আমি তারেই খুঁজে বেড়াই যে রয় মনে আমা:
I seek in Him that Roy is in my mind.
He says there is
Stars burst across my sky at night,
In the morning, flowers bloom in my forest.
He is in the twinkling of an eye
The play of so many forms of color is endless in black and white.
He lives with me
Harsha wakes up in my limbs in Dakhin-Simran.
          Tari Bani suddenly rose and filled
          Anmana kon taan to the tune of my song.
          I was suddenly swayed by the swing of sorrow,
          Hiding in the middle of work makes me forget work.
He is my forever
Tari
আমি তারেই জানি তারেই জানি আমায় যে জন:
I know him only he knows me who knows me--
        He gave me the claim that I have the right to give.
        He who knows me, knows him only by knowing him--
        The same light is in his life and in my life.
                Those who cover themselves in the darkness of their minds
                I am among them.
        He touched the golden stick, and fell asleep.
        My eyes ran to the water of his face.
আমি তোমায় যত শুনিয়েছিলেম গান\nতার:
I used to listen to you all the songs
I don't want any donation instead.
If you don't forget that song, forget it
When they rise in the evening sea,
When will I end your meeting?
These are just a few of these days.
How many times you used to listen to me
How do you forget that?
That word, poet, will be read in your mind
On a rainy night, in Phagun-Samiran--
All I have left is pride
Can you forget, you have forgotten my life.
আমি তোমার প্রেমে হব সবার কলঙ্কভাগী।\n:
I will be the disgrace of all in love with you.
   I will be stained in all spots.
I will choose the thorn in your path, where your dust rests
         That's where I will look - I am fond of your anger.
I will not drag the clean seat, obeying the law,
         The mark on the chest where the foot falls.
আমি তোমার সঙ্গে বেঁধেছি আমার প্রাণ:
I am bound to you in the bond of my soul--
        You do not know, I found you in an unknown pursuit.
            Bakulgandh joins in his pursuits,
               The poet's rhythm merges in that pursuit--
                   You do not know, I have covered your name
                        Covered in colorful shadows.
       Your beautiful statue
I sat in the light of Falgun.
            Flute playing in the beautiful spring, in the distant horizon
                Northerners trembled in the glow of gold
                    In the frenzy of the music.
আমি তোমারি মাটির কন্যা, জননী বসুন্ধর:
I am the daughter of your soil, Mother Vasundhara--
   But why deprive my humanity?
      Holy know that you are the holy homeland,
      I am a blessed human being full of virtues.
On what heaven do they despise you?
            Stay in your bosom.
I am so close to you,
      Give me your charm, dear heart.
আমি দীন, অতি দীন--\n কেমনে শুধিব, নাথ:
I am deen, very deen--
   How good, O Nath, yet you owe mercy.
But love is drowning in the world.
   It is raining in the heated heart.
I will give what is in my heart,
   I will give you this love...
Forever, but working in the world,
   I have sunk at your feet.
আমি নিশি নিশি কত রচিব শয়ন আকুলনয়ন রে:
Am Nishi Nishi Kata Rachib Shayan Akulanayan Ray.
How many times I will do it regularly in the forest.
  How much autumn will fail, the spring will go away.
  How long will the hope fade into the dawn?
How long will I keep this youth bound, I will die crying.
If you get that foot, you will die.
  Whose path am I looking for?
  As if to come and say who has left, that's why I am sitting.
So I put the garland on my head, covered with blue cloth.
So I am awake alone with the lamp lit in Bijan Alay.
আমি ফিরব না রে, ফিরব না আর, ফিরব না রে:
I'm not going back, I'm not going back, I'm not going back--
Tari floated in the face of such wind--
           I will not rush to the river, I will not rush.
The thread has been torn, so I will die today.
Now pick up the poles of the broken house
           I will not surround the fence, I will not surround it.
The ghat rope has been cut, should I cry so my chest bursts--
Now I will catch the rope of the sail,
           I will not tear this rope, I will not tear it.
আমি বহু বাসনায় প্রাণপণে চাই, বঞ্চিত কর:
I long for many desires, save me by depriving them.
         This grace is hard-earned in my life.
Donate what you have done for me without wanting it--Akash Alok Tanu Mind Pran,
        Day by day you make me worthy of that great gift
          Save me from the crisis of over-desire.
I sometimes forget or follow your path
         You are going to be a cruel face that moves.
But please, I know, I know, if you want to take it, return it to me--
   If you complete this life, it will only make you worthy of union
         Save me from the crisis of half-will
আমি ভয় করব না ভয় করব না।\n দু বেলা:
I will not be afraid, I will not be afraid.
    I will not die before two o'clock, brother, I will not die.
When you go to Tarikhana Bai, sometimes there is a storm--
That's why I won't give up, I won't cry.
Whatever is hard to achieve, I will raise my head and think--
I will not read thinking that I will follow the easy path, I will not read after the 'pank'.
Keeping religion in my mind, I will walk straight and see the road--
If danger comes, I will not move, I will not move to the corner of the house.
আমি যখন তাঁর দুয়ারে ভিক্ষা নিতে যাই ত:
What I get when I go to his door to beg
         He is the one I lose again and again.
         When he came to my door to beg
         I break the closed lock and see the hidden gem in my midst,
         He doesn't lose anymore.
         Dawn comes to him to beg for light,
         That light is in his booty.
         When he stands up in the evening, then in layers
         The treasure of the darkness's own soul emerges--
         He wears the jewel in his crown.
আমি যাব না গো অমনি চলে। মালা তোমা:
I will not go.    The garland is your god.
I took your words in my heart with many joys and sorrows,
     At the end of the day, my word will go.
Something is done, much remains.    Won't you forgive me?
The song came but the tune didn't come, it didn't sound that way--
     That tune remained in my eyes.
আমি যে আর সইতে পারি নে।\nসুরে বাজে মনের:
I can't stand it anymore.
Go in the heart of the tune, I can't say it with words.
Heart bowed down full of painful flowers,
           I can't read it anymore.
           Today in my heart
What made the cow shiver in the wind with a longing murmur.
Which virtuoso has played the song on the veena today.
           I can't stay at home anymore.
আমি যে গান গাই জানি নে সে কার উদ্দেশ:
I don't know for whom I sing.
  When the mind wakes to the restless wind, the migratory bird flies--
      To whom does the sound go?
          Look at that mouth--
              Did you dream of the past tense?
                    In modern times.
  Kavu wakes up and remembers that he has not woken up in this life
He came to my shore to listen to the song.
আমি সন্ধ্যাদীপের শিখা,\n অন্:
I am the evening flame,
           Paranu Rajtika in the middle of darkness.
In his dream, the shadow of my light awakened a secret monster,
           My first love was written in his heart.
                In my lonely festival
           Amber is not the color of convex bird.
Nikhil Bhuvan will wake up when young Ravi falls on his feet
           Then I will disappear into a momentary mirage.
আমি স্বপনে রয়েছি ভোর, সখী,:
I am in a dream, dawn, dear, do not wake me.
              My beloved bird that I keep eye to eye
Morning, I am in my dream, don't break my dream.
Ravi's smile will bloom tomorrow.
My bird will come tomorrow, slowly sit by my side.
Slowly sing the song of happiness, slowly call my name.
Slowly open your eyes and smile happily.
      The dew will fall on my forehead--
      Tears in the eyes, laughter in the eyes, Rahib dies in the dark!
আমি হৃদয়েতে পথ কেটেছি, সেথায় চরণ পড়:
I cut my way into the heart, where my feet fall,
           Your feet fall there.
  That's why my whole body is shaking with pain
           Trembling thorothare.
  You are the path of pain, the feet walk and kiss the pain--
  Sadhana with tears is my eternal bed,
            Take forever
  Don't be afraid to see the flood of Nayanjal.
   I'm not afraid anymore.
  You can drag me to death,
   I can't wait.
  The wind of the storm is blowing with a longing song in your water today--
     Drowning and jumping into the water, I will prevent my feet - later,
             I will live on my feet.
আমি হৃদয়ের কথা বলিতে ব্যাকুল, শুধাইল ন:
I am afraid to speak my heart, no one can correct me.
He didn't come to whom I fell in love with this life, mind and body.
      Does he want my way, is he bored?
        I gave up hearing the sound of his flute.
আমি হেথায় থাকি শুধু গাইতে তোমার গান,\n:
I live here just to sing your song,
     Give me this place in your world.
I did not come into your world, Nath, for any purpose-
     This life of idleness only sounds in tune.
     Adoration to you in the silent temple of Nisha,
     Then command me to sing, O king.
In the morning when the harp will play across the sky with a golden melody
     May I not be far away, give me my honor.
আয় আয় আয় আমাদের অঙ্গনে অতিথি বালক তর:
Come, come, come, guest in our arena
   No human affection, let's go to our house.
         Shyam Bankim in the chanchal kalsangeet
         Come to the door, branch to branch, life-joy-noise.
   Let the light of life dance in your new pall,
   De Pavane Banavallavae Marmargita-Upahar ॥
         Today's rain showered with blessings,
         Let the water of Amaravati fall on your head.
আয় আয় রে পাগল, ভুলবি রে চল্‌ আপনাকে,\n:
Come on, crazy, forget about you,
            A little bit of you.
Don't go back and turn this wheel.
  A sudden gust of wind
     The fence of your house is broken.
         Oh, take the chance, get out in that gap--
             In the gap of breaking your door.
Storming with various goals in four directions,
  You do not understand, when will you return to whom?
     In the middle of your chest
         Who knows what plays --
You will get news of the way with that call--
         The call of your own chest.
আয় তবে সহচরী, হাতে হাতে ধরি ধরি\nনাচিবি:
Come along, hand in hand
Nachibi Ghiri Ghiri, Gahibe song.
But the harp--
Band on the seventh tone, but pull it.
Lateral thoughts, lateral movements,
Rakhib Pramode Bhari Divanishi Manpraan.
But the harp--
Band on the seventh tone, but pull it.
Dholo Dholo Shasdhar, Dholo Dholo Jochana.
Sameeran, the flow is flowing freely.
ulsit tatini,
Open your soul in a song.
আয় রে আয় রে সাঁঝের বা, লতাটিরে দুলিয়ে:
Come, come, evening, swing the vines--
I will give you the smell of flowers.
Come on honey, fly with your wings--
In the morning I hummed and went with the honey of the flowers.
Come on, come on, come on, shake your hands, sing--
I rested my head on the lap of the leaves and fell asleep.
Bird, do you speak?
ওরে আয় রে তবে, মাত্‌ রে সবে আনন্দে\n:
Ore Aye Re But, Matre Sebe Anand
Today is the spring of new life.
   Let's run today from the backwaters to the flood,
Spread you today in the south-wind on the horizon.
Break the bonds with joy
Today is the spring of new life.
   What is the fear of your destruction on the shore of the ocean of unkind life?
   Jump into infinity with everything you have.
আয় রে মোরা ফসল কাটি--\n:
Let's reap the harvest--
                      Harvest, harvest.
         The field is our Mita Ore, today Tari Saugate
The courtyard of my house will be filled day and night throughout the year.
   Mora neb tari don, so-that kati paddy,
     That's why the song is so sweet.
      The clouds came and created a magic house of shadows,
       The sun has come, the golden wizard--
                    He is a golden wizard.
  In the middle of my field is the union of gold and silver,
The soil of my love is so decorated.
  Mora neb tari don, so-that kati paddy,
   Tai-je Gahi Song, Tai-je Su
আর কত দূরে আছে সে আনন্দধাম।\nআমি শ্রান্ত:
And how far is that blissful place.
I am tired, I am blind, I do not know the way.
  Ravi goes to Astachal in the darkness of Dharani--
  Have mercy on the orphans, O world-born woman.
  I returned on the way with insatiable desire--
Vain games, vain fairs, vain days flowed.
  Today in Shantiniketan in the evening,
  I bring eternal peace to my beloved.
আর নহে, আর নহে--\n বসন্তবাতাস কেন আর:
No more, no more--
    Why does the spring wind blow dry flowers?
          Lagna went with all hopes,
      This lamp is lit in my bosom.
    Canaan is a desert,
What flowers grow there in this evening-darkness today.
         Take away the garlands from whose fate,
               Fill broken twigs--
      What and with the thorny voice of Milanmala.
আর নাই যে দেরি, নাই যে দেরি।\n সাম:
No more delay, no delay.
    Everyone realized that you, brother, are ours.
         Himer's arm-banded little madman will have a holiday,
         In the north, this wind will blow you up and surround Kunj.
Not that late, not that late.
Do you hear the sound of the magician's flute in the water?
         Do you see the smile playing in Ravi's eyes in this light--
         White will be your shamal, I will return to my heart.
আর নাই রে বেলা, নামল ছায়া ধরণীতে।\nএখন:
And no Ray Bela, the shadow fell in Dharani.
Now let's go to the Ghat to fill the urns.
      The evenings yearn for the sound of the water stream,
Hey, call me in that voice after the road.
Now no one comes and goes on Bijan road.
Oh, the waves have risen in the river of love, the wind is high.
      I don't know if I will come back, with whom China will be today--
At the ghat, the unknown plays the harp in Tarani.
আর রেখো না আঁধারে, আমায় দেখতে দাও।\nত:
Don't keep me in the dark, let me see.
Let me see you in you.
Cry if you cry now, the sadness of happiness will not last anymore,
       Let my eyes not be washed with tears--
           let me see
       I don't know what black shade this is,
       Apan Bole Bhulai when the strange illusion thickens.
A heavy load of dreams, searching for eternal life empty--
       My light is hidden in the night
           let me see
আরো আঘাত সইবে আমার, সইবে আমারো।\nআরো কঠি:
I will bear more pain, I will bear it.
Life-wire jingles in a harder tone.
The anger that did not awaken in my soul is extreme,
    Transmit idols in that song in a faint swoon.
    It doesn't take just tender mercy,
    Don't let this life fail you in playing with soft tunes.
Let all the flames burn, let all the winds roar,
    Wake up and spread all the skies.
আরো আরো, প্রভু, আরো আরো\nএমনি ক'রে আমায়:
More and more, Lord, more and more
Hit me like that.
I hide, I run away--
Caught, what else to avoid!
Cut everything there is.
What to do now Saro Saro
I lose or you lose.
I go to the fair in the market,
Bella just laughed and played--
See how you can cry.
আরো একটু বসো তুমি, আরো একটু বলো।\n:
You sit a little more, say a little more.
      Pathik, why are you here?
If you get a glimpse of what I'm talking about--
      The silent words made my chest tremble.
            when away
   The secret words of my mind sound deep.
When you come close, your eyes give all the words that cover--
   They shine in the night of silent life.
আরো কিছুখন নাহয় বসিয়ো পাশে,\n আরো যদি:
sit next to me no more
    If you have anything else to say, say so.
The autumn-sky hero fades,
    The horizon is filled with steam.
I know you wanted to see something.
So you came to my door in the morning,
What if you can see it before the day ends?
    O wayfarer, tell me--
He is in my heart
    Bloody waves swayed.

Do not hesitate to enter the house.
    Playing music in the outer courtyard.
I don't know what will lead to that migration,
    O guest, today is the last farewell.
All the work is done at the first dawn
If you come near to listen to the deep message
Co
আরো চাই যে, আরো চাই গো-- আরো যে চাই।\n:
Want more, want more go-- want more.
   Bhandari did not distribute the interest to me.
This sky is full of morning light
   Hey, I want to pick up my life--
   All the wealth that is outside of me is not inside.
   More blows on the harp of life, more that I want.
   He is not in the city after receiving the Guru's blessing.
Dinrajni's flute plays the song with endless melody
   I want to play the strings of my life.
   His song is far from him, he is not determined.
আলো আমার, আলো ওগো, আলো ভুবন-ভরা,\nআলো নয়:
Light is mine, light is there, light is world-wide,
Light is my eyes, light is my heart.
      Dance the light, oh brother, to my soul--
      Bad light, O brother, in the midst of heartbreak--
      The sky wakes up, the wind blows, everyone laughs.
A thousand butterflies are flying in the stream of light.
Mallika Malati danced in waves of light.
      Gold in the clouds, O brother, cannot count the precious stones--
      Smile on the page, O brother, Pulak Rasi Rasi--
      Sudha-nijhar-jhar has sunk at the bottom of the river Surandi.
আলো যে আজ গান করে মোর প্রাণে গো।\n কে:
The light that sings to my soul today.
    Who came to my arena, who knows.
The sky stole away my heart,
  The wind blows me happily.
     In the shadow of that blue eye of the horizon
         Kusum like Bikase Mor Kayate.
Who is looking for the fragrance of my heart?
   All life wants, who can drink it?
ওই ) আলো যে যায় রে দেখা--\n হৃদয়:
Oi) see the light that goes away--
   A golden line in the sky of the heart.
Ghuchal fear this time, will win this time?
   Is the writing of decaying ink in the sky?
       Who is there to see?
    Stands alone on the shore of the heart.
Hey, look up, you've forgotten everything--
     Rest your head in silence.
আলোক-চোরা লুকিয়ে এল ঐ--\nতিমিরজয়ী বীর, ত:
The light-stealer came sneaking--
Whale conqueror, where are you today?
To whom did I take the initiation of this fog-victory?
Dirty is the white baran, Arun-sona made the deer,
Usha Jyotirmayi became shy and silent.
He came across the Suptisagarati with his face covered,
Apply ink on the body.
Where are you the rays of the sun, where are the dark-cutting daggers,
Say 'Mabhai Mabhai' from Udayshailshringa.
আলোয় আলোকময় করে হে এলে আলোর আলো।\n আমা:
Illuminate with light O come light of light.
   My eyes are dark.
All the skies are full of joy and laughter,
   The direction in which the eyes meet is good.
   Your light makes the leaves dance to life.
   Your light awakens song in the bird's nest.
Your light fell on me in love,
   My pure hand in my heart is shaking.
আলোর অমল কমলখানি কে ফুটালে,\nনীল আকাশের:
Amol Kamalkhani boils the light,
When the blue sky sleeps.
     The thoughts of my mind fan out,
                On the path of the lotus, they were in that pair.
The harp of autumn sounds in the lotus field.
The melody of Lalit raga is so shrill.
     So the wind blows in the green fields of young paddy,
                A wave of grief rose in the soul of the forest.
আষাঢ়সন্ধ্যা ঘনিয়ে এল, গেল রে দিন বয়ে।\nব:
Darkness approached, the day went by.
The torrential rain continues to fall.
  Sitting alone in the corner of the room, what do you think in your mind,
  How many people talk in the fresh air Yuthi's forest?
The heart has waves today, I can't find the root--
The smell of wet forest flowers makes the soul cry.
  With what melody fill the hours in the dark night,
Today I have forgotten everything and I am anxious.
আসা-যাওয়ার পথের ধারে গান গেয়ে মোর কেটেছে:
I spent my days singing along the way.
At the time of going, I will give to whom the bean played near the chest.
     I will leave the tunes in their various parts in the flower
     I will dissolve the grasses in the line of his clouds in gold writing.
Something or other will be tied together in the meeting,
Something or he will wet the eyelids of the two eyes.
     In some or any of the four months, in the grass of the Bakul-Dhaka forest
     Any indifferent person will pick up a piece of my mind.
আহা, জাগি পোহালো বিভাবরী।\n অতি:
Aha, Jagi pohalo bibhavari.
       Very tired eyes but beautiful.
Dim lamp warm, pandur shasadhar gat-astachal,
Mosh Ankhijal, let's go 'Sakhi go' Ange blue area Sambari.
The autumn morning heals clear, soft and gentle in the calm sear,
Desolate forest floor dewy, cool Taruballari.
Put the dirty owner in the bed.
New flower shop in Ganthi Lah region.
আহা, তোমার সঙ্গে প্রাণের খেলা, প্রিয় আ:
Ah, the game of life with you, my dear, oh dear--
Big Utla wears me today, will he accept defeat in the game?
You are the only one who will run away from me by coloring like this.
You seek, Nath, catch me and take my color in your bosom--
The color of this heart lotus will be colored by that northerner.
আহ্বান আসিল মহোৎসবে\n অম্বরে গম্ভীর:
The call came to the festival
     Amber will be serious.
Purvabayu calls Shyamal's debut--
     There will be dance in the forest.
     Neatly
     Dharani's joy is high.
Shravan's veenapani mixed with rain
     Pallabe Pallabe of Kadamba.
এ আবরণ ক্ষয় হবে গো ক্ষয় হবে,\n এ দেহম:
This coating will decay, it will decay.
   This body mind will be blissful.
The shadow of my illusion will break in my eyes,
Vishwakamal will bloom in my heart,
   In this life you, Nath, will win.
Blood will dance to my cosmic rhythm,
The heart will live in my vast soul.
  He will tremble at the string of your light-harp,
  He will sway at the rate of your star,
      His desire will spread and fall.
এ কি সত্য সকলই সত্য, হে আমার চিরভক্ত॥\n:
Is this true, all are true, O my eternal devotee.
              The bright light of my eyes
        Is it true that it is as black as the thunder of the east corner
        The fresh affection-like blood of my sweet bride
              O my eternal devotee, is this true?
              Atul Madhuri bloomed in me,
        Is it true that music is playing at my feet?
              I do not lose my dew,
              Is this true in the morning light?
        Mor Taptakpol-Parshe-Adhir Sameer Madiramatta
              O my eternal devotee, this is true
একি আকুলতা ভুবনে ! একি চঞ্চলতা পবন:
A longing in the world!   A fickleness is in the air.
A honeyed sap is floating in the void today,
  A smile like the moon falls, the smell of flowers steals the sky.
Today the world wakes up in a passionate passion,
Where does happiness come from in the blue skies today?
Happily, all the forest dwellers in the city, rise up and play the flute,
  Hero is fully developed today, mom's heart is in beautiful dreams.
একি এ সুন্দর শোভা ! কী মুখ হেরি এ\nআজি:
A beautiful beauty!   What a face!
Hridyanath came to my house today,
The source of love is hollow today.
Say O husband of loving heart.
What wealth will I give you as a gift?
Heart, heart, soul, soul, what shall I say--
Take all there is, O Nath.
একি গভীর বাণী এল ঘন মেঘের আড়াল ধরে:
A deep message came from behind the thick clouds
            All the skies yearn.
The words of the young man wake up,
Suddenly, the heart of catching on the horizon is full.
     Who played the flute when the first tune was played,
     Pranare called in the distant dark ages.
The sound of his flute made me sad today,
My heart was taken by that unseen.
এ কী সুগন্ধহিল্লোল বহিল\n আজি প্রভাতে,:
What is this fragrance?
  This morning, the world is shaking.
It is heart-wrenching and maddened.
One by one the flowers opened their hearts today,
    Get that Suravisudha
Full of life, he has made a donation--
    He goes to Sudha Anil.
এ কী সুধারস আনে\n আজি মম মনে প্:
What improvement does this bring?
          Today, mom is in my heart.
He who is eternal, loses his new--
The wind surrounds his face and hums.
Old Veenakhani regained lost words.
The blue-brown parasha is filled with tahari--
He caught the imperceptible new tune.
এ কী হরষ হেরি কাননে !\nপরান আকুল, স্বপন:
What a great loss!
Wear longing, dream-filled eyes of Mohammed.
The flowers are blooming, the trees are blooming
Navapallabe raised the hillol-- in the forest city in the spring.
I don't know where to wear.
Lying on the flower, Jochana is smiling.
The cloud drifts away.    Vasundhara is lazy in sleep--
Far away Papiya pew-pew is calling loudly.
এ তো খেলা নয়, খেলা নয়-- এ যে হৃদয়দহন:
This is not a game, this is not a game - this is heart-burning love.
This soulful anguish, the secret pain,
     At whose feet life and death pour.
Who is constantly calling me and longing--
No matter what life does, I can't go.
     Don't understand what you want to say--
     Where do you put down, my friend, this branch of love?
     I can't wear the garland after making it carefully.
এ পথ গেছে কোন্‌খানে গো কোন্‌খানে--\n:
Where did this path go?
     Who knows who knows.
On which hill, on which sea,
     Which direction-gets--
     Who knows who knows.
Who comes where through this way
     Who knows who knows.
How his words, how funny,
     Whom does he go in search of--
     Who knows who knows.
এ পথে আমি-যে গেছি বার বার, ভুলি নি তো এক:
I have been on this road many times, I have not forgotten a single day.
What is the sign of the blow today, the grass of the forest has risen.
Yet in my heart I know not the fear, That buoy with the favorable wind--
        Time will come to know you, you know me.
I used to go alone who took the flame of the lamp in hand.
However, I know that the address is written in the language of stars.
I know that they will break the flower that bloomed on the side of the road.
        There is a subtle hint of their secret in the scent.
এ পরবাসে রবে কে হায়\nকে রবে এ সংশয়ে সন্ত:
Who lives in this paradise?
Who will mourn in this doubt?
Who will keep Hetha in distress--
Alas, there is no one of your own in this wilderness.
এ পারে মুখর হল কেকা ওই, ও পারে নীরব:
Keka Oi is the most vocal person, and he can be silent.
One says, 'And where is one alone, when will I be happy?'
          Adhir Sameer Purbayan is suffering from severe pain
                 Breathe in and breathe out.
Asadha sat in the dark thinking of the sorrow--
' Why am I tied to Tithidore, who brings Fagunere to my side.'
Two live on both sides of the season, not matching that in Kakali and Kujan,
                 The life of the sky.
এ ভারতে রাখো নিত্য, প্রভু, তব শুভ আশীর্ব:
Keep in this India ever, O Lord, but auspicious blessings--
Your fear, your eternal elixir,
         Your eternal hope
Anirban dharma light shines above all,
         In distress,
    Keep it in the forest on your way.
Bind his armor on his breast,
    Fearless as if fearless.
Faithfulness still prevails over sin--
    Remains steadfast in faith.
এ ভালোবাসার যদি দিতে প্রতিদান--\nএকবার ম:
If this love is repaid--
If you look up and see
   When the water of sorrow rains upon the eyes--
When I was exhausted, I used to rush, dear,
   If there is room to give in that sweet lap--
If so, then, Sakhi; Forever
   Don't wear too much pain.
In a word but with a little affection
   If the burning of the heart goes away,
But that, my friend, is a matter of bad luck--
   Otherwise, the heart will break!
Once you raise your face and drink this mouth water--
   Wipe away, my love, the water from your eyes--
Take refuge in the shade of your love, my dear.
   My heart is big
এ মণিহার আমায় নাহি সাজে--\nএরে পরতে গ:
This beauty does not suit me--
When you wear it, it hurts, when you tear it, it hurts.
               The voice that restrains, the tone does not move--
       The mind that falls in that direction, the mind does not work.
                      So I'm sitting
       I will live only if you wear this necklace.
              Bring flowers to the door more--
       I don't show you the face of Manimala's shame.
এ মোহ-আবরণ খুলে দাও, দাও হে॥\nসুন্দর মুখ:
Open this cover of delusion, give it to me.
I see a beautiful face, but my eyes are full.
Ask in the middle of the heart.
এ শুধু অলস মায়া, এ শুধু মেঘের খেলা,\nএ:
It's just lazy illusion, it's just a game of clouds,
It's just a mind blowing.
It's just tearing the garland in your heart,
Ending with Nimesh's Hasikanna song.
       Shyamal Pallavpata all day on Saturday
       Flowers play with your shadow--
       This is also the shadow play in the spring festival.
Let's forget the path in the land of the devil
To and fro all day peacefully.
Where should I pick flowers if I ask whom to give?
In the evening, dirty flowers fly from forest to forest.
       This game will be played, alas, who has a partner to play with.
                     Bhule Bhule Sing Song-- K Show
এ হরিসুন্দর, এ হরিসুন্দর, মস্তক নমি:
This Harisundar, this Harisundar, bowed his head but his feet - 'after'.
In the service of the servant, in the love of the lover,
In the pain of the sad, in the joy of the happy, O beautiful one,
                                     The head is bowed, but the feet are "later".
In the mountains in the mountains, in the mountains.
In the river, in the river, in the river, in the sea, in the sea, serious.
                                 Mastaka nami tava charan-'after.
The moon and the sun burn a pure lamp - then the temple lights up,
                                The head is bowed, but the feet are "later".
এই আসা-যাওয়ার খেয়ার কূলে আমার বাড়ি।\nকেউ:
My home is at the foot of this coming and going Khair.
Someone can come and pass, someone can cross the border.
     The passers-by join in with the music they bring with their flutes
That's why I wear all my divanishi.
     They don't know who they talk about.
     What do you take from Hetha?
This whispering of words mixed with melody,
     So, after hearing that, I was bored and wanted to leave the house.
এই উদাসী হাওয়ার পথে পথে মুকুলগুলি ঝর:
On the path of this indifferent wind the buds fall;
I picked it up, laid it at your feet--
             It's pathetic.
       When I go, they will bloom in your arms,
    Your garlanded fingers are full of sweet pain
            To remember me
Bukthak is also drowsy, calling out in pain
      Tonight is Bivoro night.
The whispering of the two is the meeting of the two,
  In the astrological currents, the full moon of swings floats.
      These glimpses will be read in Malayalam Gantha tomorrow
                  you
এই কথাটা ধরে রাখিস- মুক্তি তোরে পেতেই হব:
Keep this word - you must get liberation.
You have to go the way you can.
    I leave my voice in my heart and sing, you give me.
    You must eat the waves in the storm with happiness.
If the puck spins, you must get a vacation.
There are thorns in the path, you have to go in the team.
    Don't die of fear clinging to the hope of happiness,
    You have to suffer death to fill your life.
এই কথাটি মনে রেখো, তোমাদের এই হাসিখেলায়:
Remember this, in this joke of yours
     The song I sang as the worn leaves fell.
          Apan-mane in the empty forest with dry grass
                    Disrespectfully neglected
        The song I sang when the old leaves were falling.
   Day traveler remember, I went by night
             Evening lamp in hand.
When he passed me, I floated on a broken raft
  The song I sang when the old leaves were falling.
এই করেছ ভালো, নিঠুর হে, নিঠুর হে, এই:
This is well done, O Stiff, O Stiff, this is well done.
By doing so, my heart burned fiercely.
     If I do not burn this incense, it will not smell.
     Nothing gives light if I don't light this lamp.
When this mind is unconscious
The injury is the reward.
     I don't see you in the dark with shy eyes,
     Thunder makes fire as black as mine.
এই তো তোমার আলোকধেনু সূর্য তারা দলে দলে-:
This is your rainbow sun and stars in groups--
Where do you sit and play Benu, graze under the sky?
  Rows of grass are raising their heads, green leaves on young branches--
  They are crowded with flowers and flowers.
  Where does the dust fly away in the morning,
  If it's dark, bring back your flock to the tune of evening.
  Where is my thirst for hope?
  Will the shepherd of my life call you in the evening?
এই বুঝি মোর ভোরের তারা এল সাঁঝের তারার ব:
This means that my morning star came in the guise of an evening star.
Roy looked at that with surprised eyes and smiled forever.
   I didn't see you all the time, when you passed alone,
      Come down to the sea of light and come to the ghat of darkness.
In the morning my heart was filled with the song of the road,
Who knows what tune the veena plays in the evening.
   The stream of identity is no longer lost in anything,
      He will forget my heart again and again.
এই মলিন বস্ত্র ছাড়তে হবে, হবে গো এইবার:
This dirty cloth must be shed, it will be this time--
      This dirty pride of mine.
The day's work got dusty and stained in many spots,
      It is so hot to bear the load
      This dirty pride of mine.
Now, at the end of the day, the work came to an end--
Is that when he came, hope came to life.
Come take a bath, but now you must wear the dress of love,
      In the evening, the yolk should be picked and tied.
          Come on, there's no time.
এই মৌমাছিদের ঘরছাড়া কে করেছে রে\n:
Who made these bees homeless?
        Tell me brother, tell me.
        Amidst the flower's secret wear--The flute plays in silent tune--
How did they lose their minds in that tune?
        The honey that is hidden, does not let anyone catch it,
        How is their heart filled with that honey?
এই-যে কালো মাটির বাসা শ্যামল সুখের ধরা--:
This is the house of black soil green bliss--
Here in the dark-in-the-light dream-in-the-middle.
This is the secret heart-'beyond pain's heaven
            To light in sorrow
Birhi who sits there alone--
Heart calls out your name every now and then.
When sadness is met, happiness will be met
            Sudhaya-sudhaya-vhara
এই লভিনু সঙ্গ তব, সুন্দর হে সুন্দর\nপুণ্:
This loving company, however, is beautiful
Virtue is the body, blessed is the heart, beautiful O beautiful.
  My eyes were fascinated by the light,
Hrdgagane Pawan is slow and beautiful, oh beautiful.
       The heart is dyed in this thy love,
       This friendship of yours is stored in the soul.
Rejuvenate me in such a way that I love you
If this birth happens, my birth-birth mantra is beautiful, oh beautiful.
এই শ্রাবণ-বেলা বাদল-ঝরা যূথী-বনের গন্:
This Sravana-day is filled with the smell of cloud-dropping Yuthi-forest.
  A virgin of an innocent day, as if I knew him--
In the corner of the dense forest, the shadow-veil is worn.
Who knows why I am looking at Bijan Butt's drink.
    When suddenly unknown he will come to my door,
The soul will sing in the darkness of the evening.
একদিন যারা মেরেছিল তাঁরে গিয়ে\n রাজ:
One day he went to those who killed him
      For the sake of the king
They were born in this age.
They came to the temple dressed as devotees--
      Call the killer soldiers
      Maro Maro' was howled.
The tone of the puja mantra mingled with the roar--
The Son of Man says in severe pain, O God!
This cup is full of deadly poison
Throw it away, throw it away quickly.
একবার বলো, সখী, ভালোবাস মোরে--\nরেখো না:
Say once, dear, love me--
Don't leave it in doubt.
Sakhi, from childhood on the way to the world
I spent time with false mirages.
I can't, I can't, I've come to your door
Tell me once, my friend, will you give me shelter.
I have endured so much deception, I am so afraid
True happiness is not in the forehead.
Drowning in sleep for many days
Don't finally wake up with a desperate blow.
Be in love if you take this heart--
This heart is broken, crushed and burned
If you want this heart, take a gift.
একমনে তোর একতারাতে একটি যে তার সেইটি বাজ:
Play that one of your Ektar in Ekman--
You have a yellow flower in the flower, decorate your branch with it.
Where your limit is, you come to rest in joy,
You take the link given by your Lord and smile.
Don't listen to people's words, don't turn around and draw thousands,
As if your heart knows that you have a king in your heart--
One at a time, play the one that he likes.
এক সূত্রে বাঁধিয়াছি সহস্রটি মন,\n:
I tied a thousand minds to one formula,
                 A thousand lives in one act
                           Bande Mataram
                 Let a thousand obstacles come, the deluge,
                 We are a thousand lives fearless
                         Bande Mataram
                 We will not be afraid of storms,
                 Ayut waves in the bosom of Sahib-hela.
                 This mortal life is broken,
                 But Kavu will not break this strong bond
                         Bande Mataram
এক হাতে ওর কৃপাণ আছে, আর-এক হাতে হার।\n:
He has mercy in one hand and defeat in the other.
            He who broke your door
He did not come to beg, no no no--he will fight and win
                   The parana is yours.
          Through the path of death, that coming life-between,
            He is coming dressed as a hero.
Don't come back with half, no no no - all that is there is absolutely
                   Do the right
একটি নমস্কারে, প্রভু, একটি নমস্কারে\n:
A salutation, Lord, a salutation
    May all bodies fall into your world.
Humbled by the weight of juice like a thick cloud of hearing
    A salutation, Lord, a salutation
    Keep all your mind at the door of the building.
Atmahara by combining the longing streams of various tunes
    A salutation, Lord, a salutation
    Let all songs end in silence.
Goose is like a human traveler all day and night
    A salutation, Lord, a salutation
    Let all souls fly after great death.
একটুকু ছোঁওয়া লাগে, একটুকু কথা শুনি-\nতা:
It takes a little touch, a little listen -
That's why Rachi Mam Falguni is in my mind.
Some are addicted to drugs, some are mixed with pressure,
That's why I weave a net in harmony with color and juice.
That which comes close in the gap of the moment
In the corner of his dazed mind he drew a picture of dreams.
As far away as the thoughts tremble in tune,
So Bela takes Nupur's rhythm.
ওগো সুন্দর, একদা কী জানি কোন্‌ পুণ্যের ফ:
O beautiful one, once I know what is the result of virtue
I was a flower in your garland on your neck.
     Then the first young light at dawn
     It feels good to catch with sleepy eyes,
Navin's veena is playing in the water and on the land in the lullaby.
     Today is the end of this tiring day
     In the fading light, in the dormant song of the birds,
If at last the flowers fall in the passion--
     Darkness in the evening air
     Back and forth but let it fly,
Whether it is worn out in dust or dust, it falls.
একদা তুমি, প্রিয়ে, আমারি এ তরুমূলে\n:
Once you, my dear, were in my youth
You forgot that you are sitting in flowers.
         He did not forget the eternal flowing river there,
         The wire drawn in the stream is crooked but braided,
         Your footprints are written on the bottom of the wire.
         Have you forgotten everything today?
You know that Ragini is lonely day by day
Even today, it is shaking from grass to grass.
         Flowers in the shade of the knot
         Tahari Parshan Harshan- Sudha-Dhala
            Fagun Ajo finds Ray in Champafule.
একদা প্রাতে কুঞ্জতলে অন্ধ বালিকা\nপত্রপ:
Once upon a time, a blind girl was lying on the ground
Pushpamalika brought the paper.
The eyes filled with tears in the voice,
Chuminu in his bosom with his sweet words.
Kahinu Tare, 'The lady standing in the dark,
You don't know what wealth you are donating.
Pushpasam blind you blind girl,
Don't see yourself what charm is yours.'
একলা বসে বাদল-শেষে শুনি কত কী--\n'এবার আ:
I sit alone and listen to the clouds at the end.
Ketaki says, 'It's my time now'.
The rain-clouds that were called across the sky,
That's why he was bored-- otherwise what would he have done?
He was at the edge of the forest,
Rising trembling at the startling gesture of electric light.
In the dense darkness, the smell drifted towards the convergence--
Did Sandhyatara get news from behind?
একলা ব'সে, হেরো, তোমার ছবি এঁকেছি আজ ব:
Sitting alone, hero, I painted your picture today with spring colors.
A honey-loving bee is trapped in that hump.
The narrow river flows gently under the sandbanks.
Venuchchaya is rising in your cheeks.
Engrossed by your sweet gaze In the two shadowy forest-courtyards,
The group of butterflies where the pair spread colors in cheerful colors.
I do a couple of relaxing rounds in the hot air
Nandiya is falling near your feet.
On the banks of the quay the quivering joushak,
The sky slopes between the leaves in your lap
এখন আমার সময় হল,\n যাবার দুয়ার খোল:
now it's my time
       Open the door to go.
There is a meeting, there is a fair, there is a game in the light--
       He forgot the dream.
         The distant song filled the sky,
         Alkh pulls the heart in the country.
O far, O sweet, tell the way, Paranbandhu--
         Remove all covers.
এখন আর দেরি নয়, ধর্‌ গো তোরা হাতে হা:
It's not too late, hold hands.
        Today, we have to return to our path, meeting heaven ahead.
Oh, that conch bell rose, opened the door to the temple that--
        Lagna flows lest, brother, where is the offering of worship?
Now he who has everything in the house decorates the plate of worship,
        Mangalghat Bhargo in the source of self-giving.
You have to take it today, you have to pay it today, why are you delaying...
        If you have to live, don't live, if you have to die, then die.
এখনো আঁধার রয়েছে হে নাথ--\nএ প্রাণ দীন ম:
There is still darkness, O Nath--
This life is dirty, the heart is impatient,
       All empty
Look around, no way...
Where is peace, where is Aloy?
Where is the hot and thirsty bari--
       Eternal shelter of the heart?
এখনো কেন সময় নাহি হল, নাম-না-জানা অতিথ:
Why is it not time yet, unknown guest--
If you don't hit the door, don't say 'open the door'.
     I am alone among thousands of people who--
     Come to my sudden light, put on the shock.
Darkness is in my house, I don't know where to cry.
     Bring the pursuit of foot service, bring the pain of all debts--
     Speak the awakening mantra of the young soul.
এখনো গেল না আঁধার, এখনো রহিল বাধা।\nএখনো:
The darkness has not gone yet, the barrier still remains.
Not yet in mortal life.
When will the sorrow burn, Vijayamala,
The cry of Nishitharat will burn with Arun's anger.
How many illusions are still creating their own shadow.
Still why - those who seek only the back,
The lightning-light in the chalk put a puzzle in the eyes.
এখনো ঘোর ভাঙে না তোর যে, মেলে না তোর আ:
You still don't get dizzy, your eyes don't match--
Flowers bloomed in the forest of thorns, don't you know what it is?
Oh lazy, do you know what you are?
Wake up now, don't waste your time.
At the end of the difficult path, where is the untamed land?
That friend is alone with me.
The dry sky trembles not in the heat of the hot sun,
Or burning sand covered with hot embers on all sides--
Covered in thirst.
Look inside your heart and see if there is joy or not.
On the way, the flute of sorrow will play, I will call you--
I will call you with a sweet melody.
এখনো তারে চোখে দেখি নি, শুধু বাঁশি শুনে:
Haven't seen the wire yet, only heard the whistle--
        I have given away my heart and soul.
                I heard that it is better not to see idols on black cable.
        My friend, tell me whether I will go to Yamuna to fetch water.
She came only in a dream, she smiled at the corner of the eye.
    Until then, Sai, I am afraid of fear--I am healed by thinking about Ankhi Melee.
        He who pleases in Kananpath goes, He who pleases in Kadmatal wants--
              My friend, tell me, should I lift my eyes and drink someone's drink?
এত আনন্দধ্বনি উঠিল কোথায়,\nজগতপুরবাসী সব:
Where did so much joy arise,
Where are the people of Jagatpur?
No elixir found,
     Get any interest!
In which light the darkness goes away.
এত আলো জ্বালিয়েছ এই গগনে\n কী:
You have lit so much light in this heaven
           What a festival.
How did all the light go after my face,
     You are behind the light.
        The day when love burns in the sky
            What a festival
How all the light falls behind your face,
     I read you behind the light.
এত দিন যে বসে ছিলেম পথ চেয়ে আর কাল গুনে\:
I was sitting for so long looking for a way and counting tomorrow
            I met Falgun.
    You conquered the world in the guise of a boy hero--
            What a surprise.
    I was surprised to hear the song of the young voice.
Your answer flies like a wind bored with smell,
    Karne is the manjari of your black peak.
What fire is hidden behind the young smile--
            What a surprise.
Where do you hide your weapons?
এত ফুল কে ফোটালে কাননে!\nলতাপাতায় এত হা:
Who blooms so many flowers!
There is so much laughter in the vines - when the waves die.
Phulera has just heard that Sajni will get married--
         Who said that?
এনেছ ওই শিরীষ বকুল আমের মুকুল সাজিখানি হ:
You have brought that Shirish Bakul Amer Budul Sajikhani by hand.
    When all that will run out, it will go to the horizon.
  Traveler, you know, I will obey you--
    Wear Vijaymala on your head when you go.
  As long as you are still there
  Your union becomes infinite.
    When I go, my soul will be filled with songs.
    The sound of distant words is filled with pain all the time.
এবার আমায় ডাকলে দূরে\n সাগর-প:
If you call me now, stay away
            The secret river across the sea.
I put the burden on me, take me with you,
       The sweet sudha of the stagnant night will make the thirsty drink.
                 My evening primrose honey
           Now you will enjoy it.
Bring the lamp of starlight to my soul,
    All my words will be washed away by your voice.
এবার চলিনু তবে॥\nসময় হয়েছে নিকট, এখন বা:
Let's go now.
The time has come, now the bonds must be broken.
sloshing water,
A tumult has arisen,
Taranipataka is shaking impatiently.
The time has come, now the bond must be torn.

I am cruel hard harsh, ruthless I am Aji.
No more delay, Bhairabveri is out.
You are sleeping in silence.
Trembling in a dream,
Waking up in the morning crying in an empty bed.
The time has come, now the bond must be torn.

Arun, your young, unyielding, your eyes--
Amiyarchan Sohagavachan has a lot left.
Birds will fly across the sea,
happy
এবার তো যৌবনের কাছে মেনেছ হার মেনেছ?\n:
Now you have given up on youth?
            'Accepted'.
    Did you know the newcomer today?
           'Know'
Whose dilapidated house were you welcoming the cover?
    Have you taken out today?
           'brought'
Have you accepted defeat to your life?
           'Accepted'.
    Did you know the nectar in the middle of death?
           'knew'
Stealing your Amarpuri dust-demon
    Did you give him a death blow today?
           'Henchi'.
এবার বিদায়বেলার সুর ধরো ধরো ও চাঁপা, ও:
Now catch the tune of the farewell, hold and press, and do it!
           Fill your arrangement with your last flower today.
On the way, the clouds in the sky are colored with tears,
                 Falling leaves
           Hero Hero that Rudra Ravi
                 Dream breaking blood image.
Today the wind blew in the rhythm of the storm in Khyatari's Ranga Pal,
           The back branch of Benuban is thorothoro.
এবার বুঝি ভোলার বেলা হল--\n ক্ষতি ক:
Now it's time to forget...
      What is the harm if you forget.
The night was full of music
That word remained in the soul,
In a moment, I drink
             Raise your eyes
       The evenings are so full of evenings
       Will rise far away in the sky.
This is the melody played on the harp
Wherever I go, I will be with you.
Today, however, in your own hands
             Open the farewell door.
এবার বুঝেছি সখা, এ খেলা কেবলই খেলা--\nম:
Now I understand my friend, this game is just a game--
This is just negligence in taking human life.
If you don't, you won't cry again--
What do you forget, what do you spend time with?
Rabishshi laughs in vain, Divanishi comes in vain--
Sasa Paran cries emptyly.
What have I come to look for you in the end--
Go back, what is the use of this infinite Mahamela?
এবার ভাসিয়ে দিতে হবে আমার এই তরী--:
Now I have to float this stream--
             When he sits on the shore, he dies.
        The spring has gone away with the flowers blooming,
     Tell me what to do with the flower branch.
The water has risen, the waves have risen,
     The leaves are falling in the roots.
        Where do you look in emptiness?
  Oh, all the air, all the sky
Today I got up and shivered at the sound of that flute.
এবার মিলন-হাওয়ায়-হাওয়ায় হেলতে হবে।\n:
Now the meeting must be done in the wind.
             The game of catching must be played now.
       O wayfarer, death and drink were walking along the road,
           Seats in the arena must be matched now.
Madhavika's buds are brought up-- Maltika's garlands are knotted with fresh blossoms.
     Rushed in the dream stream, two by two,
             That magic heart should be surrounded.
এবার যমের দুয়োর খোলা পেয়ে ছুটেছে সব ছ:
Now all the boys and girls ran after Yama's door opened.
               Haribol Hari Bol Haribol
     Big game across the state, life-death-neglect--
Oh brother, is there happiness than dying if everyone gives their lives together?
               Haribol Hari Bol Haribol
     The drum is ringing, the door is ringing, the call is ringing from house to house,
Now let's get down to business--whatever people come.
               Haribol Hari Bol Haribol
     The king will be the subject, there will be no gathering, and the small and the big--
In the mouth of the same stream will float happily down the river of Vaitarani.
               Haribol Hari Bol Haribol
এবার রঙিয়ে গেল হৃদয়গগন সাঁঝের রঙে।\n:
Now the heart is colored in evening color.
    All my words are in the color of Magan Sanjh.
It seems that the traveler will come home later in the day.
    My virtue will be filled with the color of evening.
In this wind of the ocean of Astachal
Every now and then I feel drowsy.
When Sandhyayuthi's Gandhabhara Panth comes to the door
    You will be my sleep in the evening color.
এবার, সখী, সোনার মৃগ দেয় বুঝি দেয় ধরা।\n:
Now, Sakhi, the golden deer gives meaning to the catch.
Come on you Purangana, just come quickly.
   Ran on the pious mirage,
   Hang the wire gently and hard.
Dayamaya karis ne go, not theirs that line.
Don't accept kindness unless you get a little.
   It is also possible to ensnare the bound and cut wild beast,
   Forget him and call him the flute, the loser of wisdom.
এমন দিনে তারে বলা যায়\n এমন ঘনঘোর বর:
On such a day it can be said
     In such frequent rains.
     On such a day one can open one's mind--
In such a cloudy voice
     Tapanless dense tamsa.

     No one will listen to that.
     Quiet secluded chari dhar.
Both face to face with deep sorrow,
     Water falls in the sky repeatedly--
     There is no one in the world.

     Society and family are all mixed up,
     Mischievous life.
Drink Ankhir Sudha only with Ankhi
     Heart to heart feeling--
     Everything is mixed in the dark.

     Who is the harm in this world?
     Manover if I can take it down.
Sravanavarishan is once home
এমনি করে ঘুরিব দূরে বাহিরে,\n আর তো:
I will turn away like this,
      And the speed is not there.
      On the way, however, holding the line of the chariot
      Filled with yolk from you,
The moon is running, the sun is running, he will fall on the road and loot--
      I just want everyone to drink.
      Go to the lake where your shadow falls
      Don't hold the lotus there, don't hold it.
The waves of water draw the liquid, he takes the shadow and sings.
      Ghiriya tare firib tari bahi re.
      The flute is playing in the building
      I will listen to it immediately, honey.
Looking at the Lord's door, he took the tin and listened
      I will play the harp
এমনি করেই যায় যদি দিন যাক-না।\nমন উড়েছে:
It goes on like this day and night.
The mind has flown with the wings of music.
         Today my soul-fountain is running,
               The barrier of the body is broken--
After the head, the blue cover of the sky has opened.
         Dharani has met her heart today,
               He is just a word.
         Hard ground does not hinder the mind.
               In what tone is that sadha--
The world says what the mind says, work and stay today.
এরা পরকে আপন করে, আপনারে পর--\n বা:
They love others, you love--
   He left the house with the sound of flute.
       Love with happiness and sadness and pain with smile,
            Forever dependent on death.
এরে ভিখারি সাজায়ে কী রঙ্গ তুমি করিলে,\n:
What color did you paint the beggar?
                 The sky is filled with laughter.
Going back and forth, going from door to door, filling his bags with whatever he can find--
How many times you came on the way, alas, lost the wealth of alms.
He thought that he was always poor in this world, poor in death and life.
O Maharaja, I came to your palace with great fear at the end of the day--
He called him to the seat and gave him his own garland.
এল যে শীতের বেলা বরষ-পরে।\nএবার ফসল কাটো:
It came after rain in the winter.
Now reap the harvest, take it home.
   Hurry up, hurry up, there's work to be done in the field--
        Day by day it gets dark.
It will be Sara's turn to work outside
When the evening stars rise in the sky--
   Get your seat in the arena
       The companion who will come at night.
এলেম নতুন দেশে--\n তলায় গেল ভগ্ন তরী,:
Elem in a new country--
  The broken river went down, the river floated in the river.
The language of the unknown mind will sound a wonderful hope,
       Weave a web of happiness and sadness with colorful threads,
           The rhythm of a new song will play in the soul--
               I will return to the new pain crying and laughing.
       Nameless Priya
I will give you a garland of unknown flowers.
In the month of Fagun, in the passion of youth
   It will play in the grass of Nupur forest.
       In Matabe Dakhinbay Manjarti Labangalta,
                 Keshe came excited.
এসেছি গো এসেছি, মন দিতে এসেছি যারে ভ:
I have come, I have come, I have come to pay attention to whom I love.
Covered with flowers, my mind will go to Rakhi's feet.
Lest the hard dharani hit the feet.
Keep your feet in the center of your heart.
Otherwise, the body will go, the soul will get pain--
I'm floating, I'm floating.
এসেছে সকলে কত আশে দেখো চেয়ে--\nহে প্রাণে:
Everyone has come to see how much better they are--
O Pranesh, that one is calling you.
Come, O come, come near,
     I will surround you on all sides.
I love you in the festival.
     I will drown in joy.
এসেছিনু দ্বারে তব শ্রাবণরাতে,\n প্রদী:
I came to the door, but in the night of hearing,
    Why did the lamp turn off the region?
    Draw a black shadow in the heart,
    The image of the opposite face is covered in memory,
        They have returned with the companion of sorrow.
Why didn't you give honey, oh my goodness.
  Lavanyalakshmi reigns in the middle of the earth,
        He did not give the script.
এসেছিলে তবু আস নাই জানায়ে গেলে\n সম:
Even if you came, you did not come
    Throwing a runaway shadow through the front path.
I don't know if your indifference is true.
    Chanchal Charan went to the grass in pain.
    Then the water drips on the leaves,
    Green forest spread.
You have gone slowly to the wet Samir,
    The shadow of the sun plays in the back.
সন্ন্যাসী যে জাগিল ওই, জাগিল ওই, জাগিল।\:
The monk who woke up, woke up, woke up.
   Laughter-filled Dikhin-baye Anga let fly
Shmashanchitavasmrashi-- Bhagil Kotha Bhagil.
   Mansaloka's white light crushed and awakened color,
He felt the anger of wine--he felt it in his heart.
   Come on, come on, come on--
      The flow of color is that.

       A storm of colors in the sky,
Waves of color drowned in the flow of juice.
       Dakil ban aji se kon kotale.
The sound of the flute, the sound of the flute--
       Tears have turned to laughter--
            In the midst of life, the fountain is its small stream
এসো আমার ঘরে।\n বাহির হয়ে এসো তু:
come to my house
      Come out, you who are in the heart.
      Open the dream door and come to Arun-Alok
