               Fascinated by these eyes.
Come to my house from the glimpse of time to forever.
    Come to the swing of happiness, come to the joy of life.
         You were a wonderful message of hope in the wind
              In the yearning breath of the forest--
         Now the cheerful form of the flower comes to the chest.
এসো, এসো, এসো হে বৈশাখ।\nতাপসনিশ্বাসবায়ে:
Come, come, come O Baisakh.
Breathe in warmth and smile.
     Let the garbage of the year be removed.
Let old memories, let forgotten songs,
     Tear vapor is far away.
     Let's wipe away the gloom, let's go away,
     Be purified in the bath of fire.
Let me dry the passion of the juice.
     Bring it, bring it, but the shell of the deluge.
     Let Maya's fury go away.
এসো এসো এসো প্রাণের উৎসবে,\n দক্ষি:
Come, come, come to the festival of life.
       Benurbe of the south wind.
  Come to the morning song of the birds, come to the holy bath
       In the nectar of light
       Come on, you idiot.
       Come on you directionless.
Beloved, bring the bridegroom, but--
       Dakshina Dakshina
       Sorrow lies at the door of expectation--
       Veer, you chest laho tare.
The thorn in the path, come and go, come and go
       In the thunderous voice of Jhtikar.
এসো এসো ফিরে এসো, বঁধু হে ফিরে এসো।\nআমা:
Come, come, come back, my friend, come back.
My hungry and thirsty tapit Chit, Nath O, come back.
               O cruel one, come back,
               come my mercy,
Come back my sweet, sweet beauty,
               come back to my happiness
               Come back my forever.
Come back to my heart full of happiness.
               Come to me forever,
               Come to my heart,
Come back, O fickle, O eternal, arm-in-arm,
               come back to my bosom
এসো এসো হে তৃষ্ণার জল, কলকল্‌ ছলছল্‌--:
Come, come, water of thirst, roaring--
Break through the cruel bosom of the hard one.
    Come, come to the fountain from the deep darkness
    Come on, you pure trickster.
    Robikar is still waiting.
    The playmate you are wants you.
        When the golden tones wake up music in you,
        Come, O bright one.
    The turbulent wind blows,
    'Come, come, come.'   He finds you.
        He should be applauded softly,
        Come on, fickle, fickle.
The desert monster is not magical
You have been imprisoned
এসো গো, জ্বেলে দিয়ে যাও প্রদীপখানি\n:
Come on, light the lamp
           In the corner of the living room, come and go.
     Namil Sravanasandhya, black shadow thickens in the forest.
Ano Bismay Mom, with the soft scent of Yuthi Malika, waits quietly--
                Nilbasaan-Area-Shadow
                   Sukharjani-same match in the mind.
        My flute is lost
What tone do I call you?
             Look at me on the way
         Can you hear his words?
Does the side of the quivering chest match in easy harmony?
এসো নীপবনে ছায়াবীথিতলে, এসো করো স্নান:
Come to the shade of Nipaban, come and bathe in the fresh water.
Give Akulia thick black hair, wear the body around the sky blue pretty--
Kajal Nayan, Yuthimala melts, come to Nipban Chhaya Vithithal.
Today, from time to time, I am smiling, friendly, and startled.
In Malla's song, however, the words are melodious, ani Banammarre.
Come to Jalkalkala in heavy rain to the shade of Nipaban.
এসো শরতের অমল মহিমা, এসো হে ধীরে।\n:
Come autumn glory, come oh slow.
       The mind will develop around the feet.
He swings wildly
       Divazamini Akul Sameer.
এসো শ্যামল সুন্দর,\nআনো তব তাপহরা তৃষাহর:
come beautiful
Ano Taba Tapahara Trisahara Sangasudha.
Birhini is in the sky.
He has a broken heart in bed
       Tamalkunjapath in the sunny shade,
       Ragini is awakened in the eyes.
Ganthia has kept the bagulmukul,
The flute is playing in the arena.
       Bring your temples,
       To the rhythm of the fickle dance he--
       Bajibe Kankan, Bajibe Kinkini,
       Manjeer's tears are in danger.
ও অকূলের কূল, ও অগতির গতি,\nও অনাথের নাথ:
And the root of the evil, and the speed of the advance,
He is the father of the orphan, and the husband of the fallen.
And light of eyes, and honey of sap,
And Ratan Har, and Paran's friend.
And beautiful form, and lovely words,
And the happiness of the extreme, and the pain of the soul.
And the beggar's treasure, and the bowler's bole--
And the cradle of birth, and the lap of death.
ও আমার চাঁদের আলো, আজ ফাগুনের সন্ধ্য:
And my moonlight, today in the evening of Fagun
You have caught that my leaves are on the leaves.
          The song that wakes up the flood with your melody
It played in my yard, that tune played to the rhythm of my soul.
All my buds bloom at the gesture of your smile.
The south wind is drunk with the smell of my flowers.
  White, you make my soul lose color,
          Go sad,
             My heart is tied to your smile.
ও আমার দেশের মাটি, তোমার 'পরে ঠেকাই:
And the soil of my country, your head is behind you.
In you is the page of Vishwamayi, in you is the leaf of Vishwamayi.
You are mixed with my body,
You are in my heart,
That brown hair of yours is like a tender statue.
Oh mother, I was born in your lap, I died in your chest.
            Your 'after game in my sadness and happiness.
You put food in your mouth,
You added cold water,
You are the mother of all the great mothers.
Oh mother, I have eaten a lot of you, I have taken a lot, mother--
But I don't know what that gives you
ও আমার ধ্যানেরই ধন,\n তোমায়:
And the treasure of my meditation,
           The smile that shakes you in the heart is crying.
Spring comes, blossoms bloom, the full moon smiles and yearns in the corner--
           they can't find you
         There is a secret dream in the soul.
    Avoid Ankhire, a stream!
           Do Sara in tears.
The smell comes, why don't you see the garland.    I hear the sound of footsteps, the path is lonely.
           As the day passes, the flowers wither--
               My world is orphaned.
ও আষাঢ়ের পূর্ণিমা আমার, আজি রইলে আড়াল:
And the full moon of Ashad is mine, today you remain hidden--
            If you stand hidden under the cover of dreams.
I don't know what game you are playing in your lonely heart--
Do you find yourself again? Did you lose yourself?
      One to remember, one to forget.
      One floats in the stream, the other goes down the river.
Kavuba Nayne Kavuba Parane do hide who knows why.
Who shakes it in the shade or in the light?
ও কথা বোলো না তারে, কভু সে কপট না:
Don't talk to him, don't be hypocritical--
        My forehead-doshe chapal sejan.
Impatient heart does not find peace,
        Always explore with your mind.
        It is good that he did not cheat when he lived.
He knew in his heart that he truly loved --
        Youthful imagination could not understand it.
        Harse laughs when she loses me,
Isn't that smile true?       If he is hypocritical
        However, this is not true.
Don't talk to him-- don't be hypocritical,
        My forehead-doshe chapal sejan.
Premmarichika Harry
ও কি এল, ও কি এল না, বোঝা গেল না--\n:
Did he come, did he not come, it was not understood--
     What is illusion, what is dream, what is deceit.
        What is caught and at the door of form,
      What will he be bound by the song itself?
         He is the eternal pursuit.
What a pitiful sound in his flute
    In unrequited rage.
       Whether it is happiness or sadness,
       Hearty forest and lonely air,
             I understand only the ultimate desire.
ও কী কথা বল সখী, ছি ছি, ও কথা মনে এনো:
What are you talking about, my dear, don't remember that.
  The world is smiling on this day of happiness,
     Hero Lo Das Dishi Harshe is floating--
       Aji and pale face can not stand in life.
         On the day of happiness, Sakhi, why and thoughts.
ও কেন চুরি ক'রে চায়।\nলুকোতে গিয়ে হাসি:
Why does he want to steal?
Laughing while hiding.
Flower fair on the forest path, rocking game--
Where does he go in surprise?
What sounds like a song to the ear,
As if his life has been half heard.
When going on the way, the garland is gone--
Paran's hopes are tied up.
ও কেন ভালোবাসা জানাতে আসে ওলো সজনী।\:
Why does he come to express his love, Olo Sajni.
           Smile and play happily,
       Why does he return to the darkness?
                  Daylight
ও গান আর গাস্‌ নে, গাস্‌ নে, গাস্‌ নে।\n:
He sings and sings, sings, sings.
   The day that is gone will never return--
         However, he did not sing.
The words that are hidden in the heart do not wake up.
আমি যে সব নিতে চাই, সব নিতে ধাই রে।:
I want to take everything, I want to take everything.
     I will match you, brother.
Sail me the wind, will be my sea-going,
             There is no bridge in the ghat.
In happiness and sadness, the flute of the road just sounds in the chest,
             I hear that in all works.
Madness started in the fan today, will the bird stay on the branch?
             I get the response from side to side.
ও চাঁদ, চোখের জলের লাগল জোয়ার দুখের:
And the moon, tearful at the tide's sorrow,
There is a whisper of this and that.
My rope was about to be known, the binding that was loosed;
He took the wire to the edge of the unknown.
            All the wayfarers crossed the edge of the ghat,
            I am that night, disorientated by a longing light.
In the impatience of losing that way, you pull the wrong way,
            Crazy to forget the direction, I laugh in the dark.
ও জোনাকি, কী সুখে ঐ ডানা দুটি মেলেছ।:
O Jonaki, how happily those two wings have met.
In this dark evening in the middle of the forest, you poured out your life with joy.
   You are not the sun, not the moon, so what less joy.
     You have lit your light by fulfilling your life.
You have what you have, you don't owe anyone,
     You have received the commandment of the power that is in your heart.
Get out of the darkness, don't be small, be small.
         You have taken all the light in the world.
ও তো আর ফিরবে না রে, ফিরবে না আর, ফিরব:
He will not return, he will not return, he will not return.
               Tari floated in the face of the storm--
           Don't rush to the bottom.
                 What madman called,
                 Crying left behind--
           Don't wrap your arms around him.
ও মা, ও মা, ও মা, ফিরিয়ে নে তোর মন্ত্র--:
Oh mother, oh mother, oh mother, take back your spell--
         Now, now, now.
    O demon, what have you done?
            What did you do?
    Why don't you die sinners!
Where is my bright light?
          Shubhra Sunirmal
    The light of distant heaven.
Oh, how faint, how tired--

কী গাব আমি, কী শুনাব, আজি আনন্দধামে।\n:

How to describe your composition, how to describe your grace,
    How can I melt my heart and soul in your sweet love?
    But in the name of the moon, they are rushing into the infinite void--
    Love is falling from sun to planet, ash is falling from planet to planet.

    Your Amritsagar is constantly floating in the middle.

I know what you thought

Those two eyes.

What flowers bloomed in the vast darkness.
The smell spread on the edge of sleep.

Your yard is not clean.

When I get up and call mom, I stay in the bosom

কে জানিত তুমি ডাকিবে আমারে, ছিলাম নিদ্রা:
Who knew you would call me, I was a sleeper.
The world was always surrounded by great love.
The pain that will be given to you, will float in tears,

I don't know when Karuna-Arun got up in Udayachala,
When I saw it, my heart burned with rays.
When did the flood come from your ocean of nectar,
When did all the dams in the heart break down?
Subatas you have given, Parane has given hope--
My life will be in love with your feet.

In the great world I live without wonder,

where have you been

Oh, when the heart is charmed, the flute will play

           The world comes together in the beat of music,
             Lost in the pain of music.
জীবন যখন ছিল ফুলের মতো\nপাপড়ি তাহার ছিল:
When life was like a flower
He had hundreds of petals.
    In the spring he was the giver
    shed two or four of its leaves,
        However, how much is left of him?
Today, I understand that it has paid off, that's why
He has nothing more in hand.
    Hemante's time has come
    He will give you fullness,
        He is degraded by the weight of juice.
জীবন যখন শুকায়ে যায় করুণাধারায় এসো।\n:
Come to mercy when life runs dry.
     All the sweet hides, come to Gitsudharas.
Karma when the mighty-sized gorji rose up and covered the chari dar
     At the edge of the heart, O Jibanath, come with quiet feet.
You always have a poor mind in a miserable corner
     Open the door, O generous Nath, come to the royal palace.
When desire blinds and forgets senselessly in huge dust,
     O Holy One, O Sleepless One, come to Rudra's light.
জীবনে আমার যত আনন্দ পেয়েছে দিবস-রাত\n স:
I got all the joy in my life day and night
  Jibanath remembers you today in the midst of everyone.
The day your world is covered with pulki
  That day I saw your eyes.
  Again and again you sing with the taste of your hands
  From the outside, you have entered the middle.
Father, mother, brother, all the family, my friend, my son,
             Access to all with heart
                  you are with me
জীবনে পরম লগন কোরো না হেলা\n:
Don't put your best foot forward in life
          Do not cry, O pregnant woman.
The time will be spent in vain, the game that will be accompanied,
Bikikini, O pregnant woman, will be exhausted in Sudhar's market.
     Mindful people come to hide, stand by, alas
     Laughing, the raft floats on the tide--
Go Jini, you pregnant woman, take the rare wealth at the expense of sorrow.
     When Fagun goes with the flower branch
What will your garland be made of?
                O Virhini.
            The flute will play in the distant wind,
         Tears of tears will pass the time in vain--
The farewell song will play in the chest
জীবনে যত পূজা হল না সারা\n জানি হে জান:
Sara has never been worshiped in her life
   I know, I know, it was not lost either.
The flower that has not bloomed has fallen in Dharani
   The river lost its course
   I know, I know, it was not lost either.
   What is left behind in life today
   I know, I know, it didn't work either.
My future is my future
   They are playing on your harp
   I know, I know, it was not lost either.
জেনো প্রেম চিরঋণী আপনারই হরষে, জেনো প্:
Zeno love is eternally indebted to you, Zeno dear
   He forgives all sins and repays debts.
         To whom the stain is removed,
                After Kalima, he pours his nectar.
ঝরো-ঝরো ঝরো-ঝরো ঝরে রঙের ঝর্‌না\n আ:
A shower of colors
      Ai ai ai ai ai ai ai ai ai ai ai ai ai ai
In that free flood stream the mind loses its death-obsession,
          And he got a taste of that juice and got a new look.
His clarion call echoes through the southern air,
          Navin Kishloy comes running in dismay.
The rhythm of the harp in the forest is awakened by the rage of Vasanta Pancham--
And sing the song in harmony with that tune.
ঝর ঝর রক্ত ঝরে কাটা মুণ্ডু বেয়ে।\n:
Blood trickled down the cut head.
          Dharani is stained with blood.
  The dakini dances offering prasad -blood-on--
          Thirsty devotees want you.
ঝরা পাতা গো, আমি তোমারি দলে।\n অনেক হ:
Zhra Pata Go, I'm on your side.
    Many smiles and many tears.
Fagun gave farewell to my hiatal
   Fall foliage, with spring color
     Are you the last one dressed up?
       Holi is played in dust and grass
           In this extreme history of spring.
Like you, I am also a northerner
   Give color to the fire --
  Astarabi Lagak Parashmani
     At the end of life
ঝরে ঝরো ঝরো ভাদরবাদর, বিরহকাতর শর্বরী:
It's raining, it's raining, it's raining.
This infinite cry has returned.
The ragini of my life is playing in the sky today.
My heart is one and the same.
না না না ) ডাকব না, ডাকব না অমন কর:
No no no) I will not call, I will not call like that from outside.
If I can, I will send him a call in my heart, I will call him.
    The pain of Deva is under my chest,
        Nebar people don't know where to go--
            Who will make this give-and-take meeting for me?
        Won't my pain match his pain--
            Gangadhara Mishbe or go to the black Yamuna.
                What tone did you ring?
                    It came from you that--
                        Gone when the word of hope is gone.
ডাকিছ কে তুমি তাপিত জনে তাপহরণ স্নেহকোলে:
Who are you calling the hot person in the heat-haran snehkol?
          Smiles in the eyes,
After hearing the call, Tapharan ran to Snehkol.
Those who are returning are begging from door to door
          They heard but pity--
You will take the suffering and take heat in the heat.
ডাকিছ শুনি জাগিনু প্রভু, আসিনু তব পাশে।\:
I hear you calling, wake up, Lord, asinu is by your side.
My eyes widened, my eyes widened.
The door was opened, Timirvar was scared away.
Heril path is the world, Dhail is in his own bus.
Bimal Kiran Prem-Ankhi Sunder Parakashe--
Nikhil takes refuge in him, the whole world laughs.
Kanan all blooms, Saurabh still floats--
Enchanted heart intoxicated with sweet love.
Ujjal is as devoted as he is devoted, Mohtimi's destruction.
Give, Nath, love-nectar to the slave.
ডাকিল মোরে জাগার সাথি।\nপ্রাণের মাঝে বি:
Dakil More Jagar Sathi.
Vibhas rings in the soul, the dawn is the night of darkness.
The flute plays, the strings are broken,
    What enchantment has the flower given to this wind?
    Write what is written in the secret heart
The mind does not know her name, nor does she know her form.
    I have put the pain mom on the bed, and I have put the seat on it.
ডাকে বার বার ডাকে,\nশোনো রে, দুয়ারে দু:
Calling again and again,
Listen, door to door to darkness to light.
How happy and sad how much life is in death
        cried the thunderous roar,
Calling Dulok to Bhoolok in Sudha Sangeet.
ডাকো মোরে আজি এ নিশীথে\nনিদ্রামগন যবে বি:
Call me today
When the world sleeps,
Come to the heart and call out silently
   Your nectar
Burn the lamp in the middle of nowhere,
Repeatedly call mom unconsciously.
ডেকেছেন প্রিয়তম, কে রহিবে ঘরে।\nডাকিতে এ:
Called dear, who will be at home.
So I came to call, let's hurry up.
Those who are warm-hearted,
Ghuchibe Birhatap after how many days?
What amritaveena sounds in the sky today,
The world is decorated with honey today!
Today will be a sweet and sweet meeting--
His loving face is awakened in his heart.
তপস্বিনী হে ধরণী, ঐ যে তপের বেলা আসে --:
Tapaswini O Dharani, the one who comes to penance --
The seat of the taper stretched in silence in the blue sky.
    In the heart, let the fun of the soul, but the soul,
    May the range of youth be narrowed by the breath of homagni
That is strange, but many songs are exuberant
Let us unite in the peace of meditation in silence.
    Temperance binds the creeper saffron fickleness,
    Beautiful Lavanya Lakshmi in the gray dust of the wretch.
তপের তাপের বাঁধন কাটুক রসের বর্ষণে।\n:
Let the heat of tapa be bound by the rain of juice.
       My heart, take the sad touch of the green friend.
Azhor-Jharan Shravanajal in Timirmedur forest area
       Let the golden rose bloom in deep care.
       Bharuk Gagan, Bharuk Kanan, Bharuk Nikhil Bhaga,
       Let the world meet with sweet-pain-filled dreams.
Let the dark-filled sky hide--
       Let the eyes forget, let the lightning shine in the supreme vision.
তব অমল পরশরস, তব শীতল শান্ত পুণ্যকর অন্ত:
But amal Parsharas, but give cool calm to the virtuous heart.
But ask for the bright light in the middle of the heart.
But fill life with the sweet fragrance of love.
Gnana Dhyana Tava, Bhakti-amrita Tava, awaken Sri Ananda.
তব সিংহাসনের আসন হতে এলে তুমি নেমে--\n:
But when you come from the seat of the throne, you descend--
When I stood near the door of my living room, Nath, stopped.
       I sat alone and sang songs in my heart
       You heard that sound, then you came down
When I stood near the door of my living room, Nath, stopped.
       How many songs, how many virtues are there in your meeting--
       The song of Gunaheen played today in your love
       There was a sad tone among all the strings,
       When you come with garlands in hand, you go down--
When I stood near the door of my living room, Nath, stopped.
তবু পারি নে সাঁপিতে প্রাণ ।\n প:
But I can't live in the snake.
        It's good to die slowly, it's insulting step by step.
        There is no one's tears in the eyes of people who are speechless and crying.
        The plate of application and offering is bowed to the head.
        Sohag crying, what a shame!  Dress of a beggar in the world
        You don't do your job, the next one is shame.
        Come down, Kalankapsara, don't go to the next door
        Begging on the next leg is the worst of all begging.
        "Give it, give it, give it, give it, give it, give it, give it, give it, give it, give it to me"
        Want to get value
তবে শেষ করে দাও শেষ গান, তার পরে যাই চ:
But finish the last song, after that whatever goes on.
You forget this Rajni, when Rajni dawns today.
      Bahudore bindi kare, dream Kavu is tied?
      Only bad pain in the chest, eyes floating in water.
তরী আমার হঠাৎ ডুবে যায়\nকোন্‌খানে রে কোন:
My tide suddenly sinks
Where is the wound of the stone?
    The new stream flows, I did not cross the deep water--
    On the edge of playing outside the wire.
I was floating in the stream, I was alone by the ear--
There was a gentle breeze of honey after the herd.
    I was happy in my heart, there was no cloud in the sky--
    I was in Kusumban with the hope that it would be necessary.
তরীতে পা দিই নি আমি, পারের পানে যাই নি গ:
I didn't step into the river, I didn't go into the river.
I spent the day sitting on the ghat, and I didn't want anything else.
    You will go far away from the king.
    To the tune of your chariot wheels
             I did not get a response.
    That deep water of mine,
    Maybe the wind will rise on a cool night.
The boat will come upstream from the other side,
I am looking for that hope-- Tari amar bai ni go.
তরুণ প্রাতের অরুণ আকাশ শিশির-ছলোছলো,\nনদ:
The young morning's bright sky is dewy,
The grasses on the banks of the river sparkled in the sun.
They stand so tightly, their hearts filled with--
So I know the vast universe
The lotus swayed in the cold-manas-ocean-water.
Therefore I know--I am word with word,
I am song with song, I am soul with soul,
I am the heart-broken light of darkness.
তাই তোমার আনন্দ আমার 'পর\n তুমি:
So your pleasure is mine
       So you came down--
If not me, Tribhuvaneshwar,
  Your love was that sweet.
     This fair is about me,
     The game of juice is going on in my shame.
     My life took a different form
       Your desire is wavering.
So you become the king of kings
     But my heart felt
How charming you are back,
     Lord, ever awake.
            So, where the Lord came down
            Your love is devotional love
The image of your couple is fully revealed there.
তারে কেমনে ধরিবে, সখী, যদি ধরা দিলে।\n:
How will you catch him, Sakhi, if you catch him?
How will he cry if you cry?
   If you want to get the mind, keep the mind secret.
   Who will tie the wire, you tied yourself.
If you come close, no one stays close.
When talking, no one talks.
   If you get it, you drop it on the ground.
   Sadhil smiled and cried.
তারে দেখাতে পরি নে কেন প্রাণ খুলে গো।\:
Why don't you show him open your soul.
              I can't explain the heartache.
       How he laughs away, never wanting to return--
              Humiliation by loving so much.
No one sees such a painful love, it was hidden in the heart.
         If I had torn this love from life,
              I used to donate at his feet.
I understand that he would not have picked it up, it would have dried up disrespectfully, but his doubt would have ended.
তারে দেহো গো আনি।\n ঐ রে ফুরায় বুঝি অন:
Tare deho go ani.
   That is the final guarantee.
One will hear words, one will hear pain--
   I will see that honey face for the last time.
   The end of life will be satisfied in that lap,
   The last dream of life will rest in that lap.
What was not fulfilled in birth will be fulfilled today.
   Will all the blessings of life run out now?
তারো তারো, হরি , দীনজনে।\nডাকো তোমার পথ:
Taro Taro, Hari, Dinjane.
Call to your path, merciful, worshipless one.
Don't lose relief in the cold ocean, this soul worn out by the heat of sin--
Give refuge in the midst of death O, keep this weak and feeble.
Gheril Jamini, Neville Alo, Mumm Din Furalo in vain work--
No way, Lord, no way--I call to Thee earnestly.
I always die without direction, I go far away from you,
Losing the way in Rasatalpur - blind and infatuated.
তাঁহার অসীম মঙ্গললোক হতে\n তোমাদের এই:
From His infinite goodness
   In this heart of yours
In the stream of eternal love
   Gave spring today.
So Sudhamoy Milankusumkhani
I don't know when it came up.
This is the sacrificial place of Kusum Puja
   Obeisance both at his feet.
May all obstacles befall you,
   May His blessings descend.
Wipe away the traces of dirty dust,
   Shantipawan is very closed.
In the sweetness of eternal love
Beneficial fruit in the heart of the womb,
May happiness always be with you
    Increases the happiness of everyone.
তাঁহার আনন্দধারা জগতে যেতেছে বয়ে,\nএসো:
His joy goes forth to the world,
Come and take your heart.
He flourished in joy,
He joyfully flows the river.
He bathes the world in pure streams,
Keep that amritdhara full of heart and soul.
You have come to the shore - will you go back empty?
At the end, will you drown in tears?
Forever this sky is fresh blue,
Forever this Dharani is blooming in youth.
Eternal love awakens in the soul with joy,
The warmth of the world does not stay in the middle of the world.
তাঁহার প্রেমে কে ডুবে আছে।\n চ:
Who is in love with him?
           He does not want trivial happiness, wealth, value--
No regrets, no regrets,
           It is not the end of love.
তিমির-অবগুণ্ঠনে বদন তব ঢাকি\nকে তুমি মম:
The box is covered with whalebone
Who are you when you stand alone in the arena?
     Today, the stars are thick and cloudy,
     The stream is flowing in the river water,
        Tamalvan sulks, Pawan leaves.
You pull the words that mom has brought to heart
I don't know which mantra to tell him.
     I'm in a bind, I'll break it, I'll go to the butte--
     As if this vain cry does not cut the nishi.
        I will not give in to difficult obstacles.
তিমিরদুয়ার খোলো-- এসো, এসো নীরবচরণে।\nজন:
Open Timirduar-- Come, come in silence.
My mother, stand this young Arun Kiran.
Let all laziness go away to Punyaparashpool.
Let the harp play in heaven with world-awakening tunes.
Mother, add life but in prasadshudhasmeeran.
Mother, my mother, stand with the bright eyes of my mother.
তিমিরবিভাবরী কাটে কেমনে\nজীর্ণ ভবনে, শূন:
How does Timir Bivabhavari cut?
In dilapidated buildings, empty lives--
The heart is dry with love.
When will the pool of jewels be filled with darkness?
O joyful one, on your harp--
If you wear sweat, then the fragrance is springtime.
তুই অবাক ক'রে দিলি আমায় মেয়ে।\nপুরাণে শু:
You surprised me girl.
I don't hear in Purana whether Uma did penance
       In the burning sun--
                what happened to you
তুই ফেলে এসেছিস কারে, মন, মন রে:
Who did you leave, my heart, my heart?
That's why I was born, I didn't get peace, my mind, my mind.
        I have now forgotten the path by which I came--
        How can I return to his door, my mind, my mind.
              I live in the water of the river to listen,
              Trembling in the soul of the leaves.
        It seems that I understand the language of flowers
        The way that Sandhyatara has gone can be my mind, my mind.
তুই রে বসন্তসমীরণ।\n তোর নহে সু:
You are Vasantsamiran.
          Yours is not a happy life.
Day or night Parimalmade Mati
          Kanne Karis Vicharan.
Wake up the river and make the creeper angry
          A silent kiss
          Yours is not a happy life.

          Listen to the voice of spring,
          Come to the vines of the heart.
The body of the Helia flower in the dim Nikunj shade
         Listen to the soft song of the bird
Latar-heart-lost happily -unconscious-para
        Spend your life sleeping.
        So I say spring,
        Come to the vines of the heart
তুমি আছ কোন্‌ পাড়া? তোমার পাই নে যে:
What neighborhood are you in?   You don't get that response.
        You stood yawning on the way.
  The sun dies in the afternoon, burning in the stomach--
         What a heartburn to this.
                Apart from all your creations.
Ranga Adhaar, eye black looks good on a full stomach--
     Now the pulses in the stomach are racing.
তুমি আপনি জাগাও মোরে তব সুধাপরশে--\nহৃদয়:
You wake me up, then Sudhaparshe--
Hrydayanath, Timirarajni-lost you in the end.
Slowly develop in the heart, but the mouth is warm.
তুমি আমায় করবে মস্ত লোক--\n দেবে লিখ:
You'll make me a great man--
     Give the king's life by writing
          Those happy eyes
তুমি উষার সোনার বিন্দু প্রাণের সিন্ধুকূল:
You are the golden point of dawn in the river of life,
The first dew of autumn-morning is the first dewdrop.
     Noah can catch the rainbow across the sky,
     Nandan's Nandini is touched by Chandralekha
     The dream of the moon touching the white clouds in Pratipada--
     The secrets of heaven are forgotten when death comes.
You are the poet's meditation-picture of past birth-memory,
You are my lost song.
     If the word that cannot be said is said in silence,
     You become my release as a bond--
     Amal opened the door in the dim light.
তুমি একটু কেবল বসতে দিয়ো কাছে\n:
You just sit down
           Just give me a moment.
I have some work to do today
           I will meet you later.
                If you don't want to drink in your mouth
                My heart knows no rest,
                As much as I move between work
                     Return to the cool sea.
      Spring is in full swing today
             Came to my house.
      The idle wanderer comes to Gunjaria,
             Back to Kunj's premises.
                Just sitting alone today
                Eye to eye
তুমি একলা ঘরে বসে বসে কী সুর বাজালে:
What music do you play when you are alone in the house?
          Lord, in my life!
Decorate me with your parasharatan
          Lord, in deep secret.
I don't know where you've been hiding from the light of day.
        If you raise your feet from Astarbir Toran
          In my night dreams
My shame, shame, longing for darkness,
          He is your flute.
I hear the ragini of the stars across your sky,
         All my friends.
A message of hope comes to the ear - the door of the pub is open
    At the end of the night the dew-washed first morning
        pity you
তুমি এ-পার ও-পার কর কে গো ওগো খেয়ার নে:
You go here and there, who eats it?
I sit at the door of the house and look at everything.
       At Bhanile Hat, everyone goes home in groups
       I thought to myself that I should go too.
I see the tarani going up and down in the evening and at night.
Seeing how my heart feels, singing that song
              He eats it.
       I draw in the black water,
       He was covered with a golden glow.
I see that you have no words in your mouth.
Look at what is written in your eyes
              Ogo takes advantage.
      A
তুমি কিছু দিয়ে যাও মোর প্রাণে গোপনে গো:
You give me something to secretly go to my soul--
In the smell of flowers, in the music of the flute, in the heart of the soul.
  You take something from pain to pain--
  My tears are drowned in laughter, words in silent eyes.
তুমি কোন্‌ কাননের ফুল, কোন্‌ গগনের ত:
You are the flower of Kanan, the star of the sky.
Where have I seen you as if in a dream?
When did you sing, asked for a drink?
                forgot
Only the stars of those eyes are awake in the mind.
You don't talk, you look and leave.
You laugh and melt in this moonlight.
      I sleepily look at the moon in sweet soul,
         Like your eyes, two stars are slanting rays.
তুমি কোন্‌ ভাঙনের পথে এলে সুপ্তরাতে।\n:
If you come to a broken path in the night.
What is broken is blessed at my feet.
    I'll put it on the wire at the rate of blood pearls,
         My chest ached in secret pain.
You took the sitar in your arms, cruelly when you trample it--
         The land is torn apart and left behind
         Silent Tahari Song I Know That Your Donation--
           He returns to Falgun-hawa-hawa in a melodious swoon.
তুমি ছেড়ে ছিলে, ভুলে ছিলে ব'লে হেরো গো ক:
You left, you forgot to tell me what's up hero--
Dirty body, dirty heart, soul drowned in grief.
I have come in the guise of Birha to tell Hetha Birhabeda;
I will take darshan, but I will go away, a long time desire.
I will call you 'Nath Nath', I want to keep it in my heart--
If you hear the cry of the soul, what else can you stay?
And I will see Amritrup when I am looking at Nayanbari O--
I will not get up again, I will lie at your feet.
তুমি জানো, ওগো অন্তর্যামী,\nপথে পথেই মন:
You know, O Antaryami,
I lost my mind on the way.
      Thoughts tied my nose home,
      Only their currents 'float' after--
      Yet I remember hope,
        They will touch your feet husband.
How many tears were pulled,
The gallows broke again and again.
     If everyone is miserable,
     "Where will I put my head in the evening?"
     I know I will fall into your arms
       Nod where you fall.
তুমি ডাক দিয়েছ কোন সকালে কেউ তা জানে:
No one knows what morning you called,
No one understands that my heart is crying.
   I return to my bored life, I look at everyone's faces,
      No one pulls like you.
      The fifth note rang out, the closed house shook,
      No one knocks on the door from outside.
Whose confusion is in the sky, whose message is in the wind,
      No one brings that secret in this way.
তৃষ্ণার শান্তি, সুন্দরকান্তি,\n:
Peace of thirst, Sundarkanti,
     Nikhil's grief when you come
Draw in the eye of the bride
     Sushital Sukomal Shyamarsaranjan.
If you come in a heroic way, but in a waist band
     The electricity-uncertainty rang jhanjhan.
But if the shade is given in the north, it fills--
     Navanil-Anjan at Tamalvan peak.
The smell of Malti in the mandre of the membrane
     Milayle Chanchal Madhukargunjan.
In the new colors of the dance,
     Sachkit Pallabe dances like a cymbal.
তুমি ধন্য ধন্য হে, ধন্য তব প্রেম,\n ধন্:
Blessed art thou, blessed art thou love,
  Blessed is your world design.
In one Amritsarse Chandra Vikasila,
  If you fulfill this equation, you will be happy.
If you bloom in one love,
  Kusumban Chaile Shyam Pallabe.
A deep message in the sea,
  What honey song took Nadikallole!
One pours forth, in the human heart,
  So the heart is singing with love and joy.
তুমি নব নব রূপে এসো প্রাণে,\nএসো গ:
You come to life in a new form,
Come to the smell, come to the song.
        Come to the glorious parsha,
        Come with a happy heart,
        Come and be enchanted by Mudit Du Nayan
Come pure and bright Kant,
come sweet gentle calm,
Come, come, O strange law.
        Come to sorrow and happiness, come to the meaning,
        Come to daily activities,
        Come to the end of all actions.
তুমি পড়িতেছ হেসে তরঙ্গের মতো এসে\n:
You read and laugh like a wave
         in my heart
On a full moon in the sea of youth
        The tide has come.
Exuberant crazy beats back and forth.
     What game is yours on the lonely shore of this sea!
How many dances and tunes all over my chest
     Come close, go far, a hundred million times.
Shvasi read like a yolk khasi khasi
         More bust-' later
Secret dew drops in teardrops
        Moisturizes the soul.
Silent Souravrashi Parane Paschihe comes
    Happy dreams in the heart.
Parshapool's eyes are drowsy in the morning,
    your kiss
তুমি বন্ধু, তুমি নাথ, নিশিদিন তুমি আমার।:
You are friend, you are Nath, you are mine.
You are happiness, you are peace, you are Amritpathar.
You are the joyous one, add life, relieve sorrow,
The warmth of your feet is infinite.
তুমি মোর পাও নাই পরিচয়।\nতুমি যারে জান স:
You don't know me.
The one you know is not anyone, not anyone.
    Garland it melts, dries it withers,
        Alo was afraid of his fear--
      No ventilation.
    Come on sorrow, light the flame,
Give good fire vaccine.
    Let death come in silence, supremely manifest,
        Let it all be covered--
            Ghuchuk all defeats.
তুমি যে আমারে চাও আমি সে জানি।\n কেন য:
I know you want me.
   I know why you cry over me.
Why are you in this darkness in this light?
   I know that shade.
Why do you wear different clothes for different tasks all day
   I know how many tones to call.
Sara Hall De'ya-ne'ya eat the end of the day
I know which way to go.
তুমি যে এসেছ মোর ভবনে রব উঠেছে ভুবনে:
You have come to my house, the Lord has risen to the earth.
What is the color of the flowers, what song is there in the sky,
                  What a wonderful day.
     Give me the pain of happiness and sadness.
Your voice is mellow when I fall in pain with my pain,
                 Come to my life
তুমি যে চেয়ে আছ আকাশ ভ'রে,\nন:
What you are looking for in the sky,
Nishidin Animesh you see me.
I will meet this light with my eyes
Your search will be successful.
The sky is counting the days.
Fagun's yolk-drops will be evasion
I have this one bud left.
On that day the garland of stars will be blessed
These people of yours light the lamp
This darkness of mine is gone.
তুমি যেয়ো না এখনি।\n এখনো আছে র:
don't go now
        Rajini is still there.
          The path is full of termites,
     Kanan Kantakatrughaan--Andhara Dharani.
Big sadhe lighted lamp, ganthinu mala--
     Forever, Bandhu, Painu O Taba Darshan.
          I will go today
        Vasab gives life to love.
তুমি রবে নীরবে হৃদয়ে মম\n নিবিড় নিভৃত প:
You are silent in the heart
  Deeply absorbed Purnimanishithini-sam.
           Mom Life Youth Mom Akhil Bhuvan
       You will be filled with glory Nishithini-sam.
I will wake up lonely but sad,
    But the shadow of the region will be covered.
            Mm Sadness Mm Successful Dream
     You will be full of fragrance.
তুমি সন্ধ্যার মেঘমালা, তুমি আমার স:
You are the evening cloud, you are my pursuit,
                  Mom is empty-headed.
I have composed to you with the sweetness of my mind--
                  you are mine, you are mine
                  Mom Asimgaganbehari
        Mom, I gave my feet with bloody anger,
                  Hey Sandhyaswapanbehari.
        But I have drawn Adar mixed with happiness and sadness.
                  you are mine, you are mine
                  Mom Bijanjivanbihari
I have given the dream of mam moher to my eyes
তুমি সুন্দর, যৌবনঘন রসময় তব মূর্তি,\nদৈন:
You are a beautiful, youthful, yet graceful figure.
The abundance of pity is only wasted.
Dance Song Poetry Rhythm Call Gunjan Color Smell--
Immortal, eternal, but glorious.
তোমরা যা বল তাই বলো, আমার লাগে না মন:
Say what you say, I don't mind.
My days go by without any reason.
   What is this crazy wind singing?
   Today Sunil Gagne spread it.
I liked that song,
Why am I looking for honey in the wanderings?
         Who wants that sky-cloud?
         It looks like this in my eyes today.
তোমায় কিছু দেব ব'লে চায় যে আমার মন,\n:
My heart wants to give you something,
    No - or you need to stay.
When you see Pelem, alone in the dark
    You were returning to the deep forest.
I wanted to light a lamp your way,
    No - or you need to stay.
I saw people in the market abusing you.
    You are covered in dust.
In the midst of the path of humiliation, your harp sounds perpetually
    Apan-sure-you-nimgan.
I wanted to wear a garland around your neck,
    No - or you need to stay.
People come in droves, singing your praises--
    Different colors in different languages.
Begging knocks on your door
তোমায় গান শোনাব তাই তো আমায় জাগিয়ে:
I will sing to you so please wake me up
            Oh sleep-wake.
        Call it with surprise in your chest.
                    It's a sad story.
        Came around the darkness, the bird came to the nest,
                    The tide came to the shore--
Just give me a break Nako
                    It's a sad story.
     Sometimes in my work
You did not let the wave of laughter stop.
      Pran sudha fills me with parash kare
                   You go away--
Stand behind my pain
তোমায় চেয়ে আছি বসে পথের ধারে সুন্দর হে।\:
I am waiting for you sitting on the side of the road beautiful.
    The fine dust of life's harp is beautiful.
There is no yolk, what to make a garland!   I have brought the song of tears on the harp,
    So you can hear it from a distance, beautiful in the dark.
    Day after day passed beautiful O.
    The heart of death is beautiful with no thirst.
What am I doing in the void, when will the tide come?
    When will I pass through the power of Sudhars, O beautiful one?
তোমায় নতুন করে পাব বলে হারাই ক্ষণে-ক:
I lose you every now and then to find you again
He is the treasure of my love.
           Be invisible because it will appear
He is the treasure of my love.
Ogo, you are not mine, you are my forever--
           Be that nimgan in the flow of momentary fun
He is the treasure of my love.
When I find you, my heart trembles with fear--
           I feel a wave of love then.
You're not the end, so wear zero and end you that--
          That smile washes away my tears of sorrow
He is the treasure of my love.
তোমায় যতনে রাখিব হে, রাখিব কাছে--\nপ্রেম:
I'll take care of you, I'll keep you close--
Nath, I will forget you in the madhusaurav of Premkusum.
        In love with you, Sakha, Sajib Sundar--
        Hridayhari, your way is not.
        You will come, how will you leave and--
        A sweet smile grows in my heart.
তোমায় সাজাবো যতনে কুসুম রতনে\n ক:
I will decorate you with yellow jewels
     Keurekankane kunkume sandalwood.
Kuntle is surrounded by golden net, Dolaib muktamalik on the voice,
Simante Sindur Arun Bindur--Charan Ranjib Alakat drawing.
I will decorate Sakhir with the love of Sakhir.
I will decorate with sorrowful grief, I will decorate with inexhaustible reconciliation--
Sweet shame is written in the bond of the words of the couple's life.
তোমার অসীমে প্রাণমন লয়ে যত দূরে আমি ধাই-:
As far as I go with your infinite soul-
  There is no sorrow, no death, no separation.
    Death assumes the form of death, sorrow becomes, O well of sorrow,
      I want to get away from you as much as possible.
O full one, but the feet have all that is--
  No fear, she's only mine, I cry every day.
    Antarglani Samsarabha palak Felik where alone
      If I find the form of your life in the middle of life.
তোমার আনন্দ ওই এল দ্বারে, এল এল এল গো।:
Your joy is at that door, L L L Go. Oh, the townspeople
Meet in the courtyard to get the heartburn of the chest.
Don't irrigate the path and don't soil the incense sticks.
At your beautiful door, L L L Go.
Spread it in front of the eager heart.
All your riches are blessed.
        Open the door of the house today for the sake of the world.
Hero Ranga is all heaven, Chitta is Pulkamgan,
Your eternal light came to the door, L L L Go.
Pick up your old lamp, burn it with that light.
তোমার আমার এই বিরহের অন্তরালে\nকত আর সেত:
Behind your hatred of me
How many more bridges are tied to the tune of the tune.
    Yet in the middle of the night there is a secret pain--
    Now call for service in the evening.
The world continues to be far away in the depths of the heart,
Consciousness is entwined in the dream of thought.
    Sadness and happiness are your burdens.
    So that he can sink into the bowl of extreme worship.
তোমার আসন শূন্য আজি, হে বীর, পূর্ণ করো--:
Thy seat is now empty, O hero, fill--
Vasundhara trembled when she saw that.
Bajal Turya in the sky-- The sun comes in a chariot of fire, in the sky,
     Hold the sword of victory in your right hand in this morning.
      Religion is your help, the Bible is your help.
      Immortal semen helps you, helps Vajrapani.
      The difficult path will take your footsteps in glory.
      Armor of fear in your heart, wear it on your chest.
তোমার এই মাধুরী ছাপিয়ে আকাশ ঝরবে,\n:
The sky will pour over this sweetness of yours,
         If not in my life, will he catch anywhere?
This is the light that falls from the sun to the planets and the stars in hundreds of thousands of streams,
         This life will be full when it is full.
The color of your flowers was like sleep
I think he woke up.
The love that trembles in the music of the pool in the universe will rise and float
          The day that all my hearts will die.
তোমার কটি-তটের ধটি কে দিল রাঙিয়া--\nকোম:
Who gave the color to your waist--
The soft body is covered with colored clothes.
What were you playing in the yard this afternoon?
The two legs are broken.
Who gave the color of your waist?

Why did you choose to dance with happiness?
The mother laughed and danced beside the door.
Then and there, clapping and clapping, the mother's hands are ringing--
You have caught Benur Panchni in the shepherd's guise.
Why did you choose to dance on your face with happiness?

Nikhil listens akul-mane nupur-bajana,
Tapan-Sashi is losing your outfit.
Sleep with the sky on your mother's chest and mouth,
After waking up, Q
তোমার কথা হেথা কেহ তো বলে না, করে শুধু ম:
No one talks about you, just making noise.
Sitting on the shores of the Sudhasagar and drinking, there is only chaos.
You have cut off your roots - no swimming, no pool,
It floats in the stream, it sinks at the end, and the divanishi trembles.
Where will I go, where will I heal, Tania takes me.
I will be left alone in the end.
Suhrider Tere Chai Chari Dhere, Ankhi Kariteche Chholochal,
Die under your weight that you tremble heart is weak.
তোমার কাছে এ বর মাগি, মরণ হতে যেন জাগি\:
I ask you for this boon, as if to wake up from death
          To the tune of the song
As Nayan Meli is like a mother's breast milk
New life is given to the tune of Go Pure song.
         There is a lot of young grass
The clay flute becomes like a song.
Go Ani gives light there
the joy of the sky,
The heart wanders to the tune of music.
তোমার দুয়ার খোলার ধ্বনি ওই গো বাজে হ:
The sound of your door opening rings in my heart.
In your house in the early hours of the morning, if you go away
      I will stay in my house, but what's the shame?
      I have said a lot, it is a lie.
      I have been walking a lot, he is lying.
Today, at the end of all roads, I stand at your door--
      Do not forget about my work.
তোমার দ্বারে কেন আসি ভুলেই যে যাই, কত:
Why do I come to your door and forget what I want?
             I feel ashamed when I come home at the end of the day.
All those desires float in happiness and sadness only in the mouth,
                deep chest
      The desire is not a secret.
           Desires are all tied to buds--
           It will burst, it will fall to the south.
A desire will spring from within in your dawn-light
                  In the stream of life--
           I carry that deep hope in my heart.
তোমার নাম জানি নে, সুর জানি।\n:
I don't know your name, I know your tone.
         You are the words of the morning light.
    All day long, I'm in my mind,
If I forget what, my chest hurts.
         All I want to say is to say
             Tears in those dewy dews.
         What I want to see in the soul
                    That idol is here--
         In the shadow-in-the-light-in-the-light
              The harp of my causeless pain.
তোরা বসে গাঁথিস মালা, তারা গলায় পরে।\n:
Tora sat ganthis mala, they wear around the neck.
When it dries up, throw it away.
You beg for money, they only earn.
If you don't like Sudha, you don't want to go back.
The vessel of the heart breaks and leaves.
You just smile, they just sit--
If they see tears, they will not come close.
Keeping the pain of life in life and covering the fire of life in life
Break the clothes and give honey with a tearful smile--
The chest will burst, if you don't speak, you will read dry at the end
তোরা যে যা বলিস ভাই, আমার সোন:
Whatever you say bro, I want my golden deer.
          I want a golden deer.
He who wanders in surprise, avoids sight, cannot go.
He who gets in reach runs away, pushes, puts a puzzle in the eyes.
I'll be running back and forth and I'll get it or I won't get it--
I disappear into the forest in my own mind.
Buy what you can get in the market, keep it in the house--
Why did I feel the wind that could not be found?
What I had was lost to what I didn't have--
My furoy capital, do you think I will die in mourning?
I am happy smile
তোরা শুনিস নি কি শুনিস নি তার পায়ের ধ্:
Did you not hear the sound of his feet,
          That comes, comes, comes.
       Day-and-day life is falling
          He who comes, comes, comes.
I sang songs as much as I could
       All the tunes are ringing his arrival--
          He who comes, comes, comes.
       How many days on the way to the forest?
          He comes, comes, comes.
       In the chariot of clouds in the dark
          He comes, comes, comes.
Sadness after sorrow, the feet of my chest beat in the utmost sorrow,
       When happy, he gives Parashmani.
          He who comes, comes, ah
তোলন-নামন পিছন-সামন।\n বাঁয়ে ডাই:
Raise and lower back and forth.
       Do not want left or right.
          Boson-rising scatter-guton.
Back-and-forth whirlwind move-- bus!  Bus!  Bus!
তোমার পতাকা যারে দাও তারে বহিবারে দাও শ:
To whom you give your flag, give him strength.
  Give devotion to the great suffering of your service.
So I want to fill the sorrow with the relief of sorrow,
  Don't seek liberation from the gift of your hand's pain.
  It will be sad if you give Bhakti along with Bhushan of the head.
  Give as much work as you want, if you don't give it, forget it.
  If you don't let your heart get tangled in nets.
  Bind me as much as you like, keep me free
  Put it in the dust, sanctify it in your foot dust--
  Keep it in the world, don't give it to you.
  I'll go the way you let me go--
তোমার পায়ের তলায় যেন গো রঙ লাগে--\nআমার:
The soles of your feet are like cow color--
The flowers of the forest in my mind are colored with anger.
          Like my music
               I praise you in my ears,
As if I will wear a necklace of blood pearls with the passion of life.
তোমার পূজার ছলে তোমায় ভুলেই থাকি।\n:
I forget you under the guise of worshiping you.
I don't understand when you give me that cheat.
Flower garland, lamp light, incense smoke
I don't get a chance to touch my feet from behind.
Cover you with the words of praise.
If you want to see, keep this arrangement false.
I have my thirst and my eyes.
Does the work lead to my temple?
Patab seat in a corner of your mind,
I call you in silence in simple life.
তোমার প্রেমে ধন্য কর যারে সত্য ক'রে:
Bless with your love the one who is true to you.
               In grief, in mourning, in condemnation
               His mind will not sink into depression,
                   Don't break under the weight of the world.
He who hears the message of his home on the way, pauses hard in his work.
               He sees himself in you,
               Life does not stand in its way,
                   His vision is beyond the darkness.
তোমার বাস কোথা যে পথিক ওগো, দেশে কি ব:
Where do you live, O traveler, in the country or abroad?
            You heart-filled Ogo, you are the all-pervading one.
  "You don't know where I live,
            I have to find out what that is
                 O Madhavi, O Malati!'
  Maybe I know, maybe I know, maybe I don't know,
              Who will tell me?
  I think you are mine, you don't understand me.
      Tell me, tell me, traveler, tell me who you are.
  'I am the one who knows me as he sees me,
                 O Madhavi, O Malati!'
             Maybe I know, maybe I know, maybe I don't know,
                 m
তোমার বীণা আমার মনোমাঝে\nকখনো শুনি, কখনো:
Your harp is in my mind
Sometimes I hear, sometimes I forget, sometimes I don't hear that.
Akash Jabe Shihri got up and sang
He kept telling secrets in the ear of the catch-
There is always a strange noise between them
In my mind, dreams are bound in groups.
O Veenapani, in your assembly
Akul Hiya became insanely mad.
Chaliteshinu but Kamalbane,
In the middle of the path, the path was forgotten.
Your voice wakes me up in the morning,
Your tone is Arunrenurage in Ashokshakhe.
That tune wants to go out in the innocent mind
The humming-quickening-fans are honeyed.
Why does Kuhli get involved in the cover-
The light shines in the darkness, the shame that dies.
ভুবনজোড়া আসনখানি\n আমার হৃদয়-ম:
Bhuvanjora Asankhani
         Bring a bed in the middle of my heart.
         The stars of the night, the sun of the day, all images of darkness and light,
All your sky-filled words--
                  Bring a bed in the middle of my heart.
                  In all the tunes of Bhuvanaveena
         Don't wear my heart.
         All the monsters of happiness, flowers, storms--
Your gracious good generous water
                  Do not bring me into the middle of my heart.
তোমার মনের একটি কথা আমায় বলো বলো।\:
Tell me something on your mind.
Why are your eyes like that?
   After the forest it rains and becomes clear.
Sandhya mukhrit khambraswar Neepkunjatala.
The bells flow in turn on the bed of the shawl.
         Today is the horizon
Lost in the rain, lost the blue--
     Shadow falls behind your face,
The shadow is getting thicker, but in my mind moment by moment,
Your heart fluttered in the wind with tears.
তোমার মোহন রূপে কে রয় ভুলে।\nজানি না ক:
Who forgets Roy in the form of your charm.
I don't know if death dances, dance at those feet.
  Autumn-light's embers are broken, the glimmer of what dances,
           You have brought a storm.
       Trembling in the air
Ripe paddy thirsts, the field is filled with shivers.
   I know that your worship will be completed today
            In the ocean of tears
তোমার শেষের গানের রেশ নিয়ে কানে চল:
I came to the ears with the resh of your last song.
                      Does anyone know that?
           You have to sing and sing,
           I only want to see eye to eye--
I have come to say what is in my heart, does anyone know?
           Their addiction did not catch then,
                      Not filled with colored juice.
           How busy it is,
           New circle of new people--
I came back hoping to come back. Does anyone know?
তোমার সুর শুনায়ে যে ঘুম ভাঙাও সে ঘুম:
I wake up with your voice, that sleep is pleasant for me--
     She is the companion of awakening, give her your blessing.
     His deep hunger in his heart, secretly wants light,
     My night chest is your morning favorite.
     Tari lagi the sky colored dark-broken Arunrag,
     The song of tari lagi pakhi is the talk of new hope.
     Hear the sound of your footsteps in silence,
     Pick up the evening bud in the morning.
তোমার সোনার থালায় সাজাব আজ দুখের অশ্রু:
I will decorate your golden plate today with tears of sorrow.
    Mother go, I will sing the pearl of your throat.
       The moon and the sun are garlanded at the feet,
Your chest will be adorned with the ornament of my sorrow.
       Tell me what you will do with your wealth.
       If you want to give, give it to me, if you want to take, take it.
    Sorrow is the stuff of my house, You know the purest gem--
Buy it with your prasad, this is my pride.
তোমার হাতের রাখীখানি বাঁধো আমার দখিন-হা:
Put your hand on my right hand
  As the sun captures the light-keeper, it gathers around.
Your blessing will make my work successful in the world-midst,
  Your bright flame will burn in all my pains.
  Do the work that ties the rope with the hand.
  The hope of fruit is chained and caught in a complex trap.
Tie your rakhi - all ties will be cut,
  Karma will play like a harp in a sweet swoon.
তোমারি ইচ্ছা হউক পূর্ণ করুণাময় স্বামী\nত:
May your wishes be fulfilled, merciful husband
Remembering your love, keeping hope in my feet--
Give me sorrow, give me heat, I am the bearer of all.
But the desire for love always wakes up, even if you don't know it.
I forgot that good look, so I went down to the sea of ​​grief.
Blissful your world is beautiful,
I feel sorry for my own fault, desire-follower.
Break the fetters with hard blows,
May you live in a tearful heart.
তোমারি গেহে পালিছ স্নেহে, তুমি ধন্য ধন্য:
Blessed are you blessed with love.
  My life is your gift, blessed are you.
You put me in my father's bosom, I gave birth to my mother's heart,
  You are tied to the love of friends, you are blessed.
Your vast vast world has made me enthralled--
  Rivers and forests are blessed, blessed are you.
In the heart-outside at home-abroad for ages-ages in an instant-in an instant
  You are blessed in birth, death, grief and joy.
তোমারি ঝরনাতলার নির্জনে॥\nমাটির এই:
In the solitude of your shower
This pot of clay was overwhelmed by me.
Ravi Ai Aste on the rock,
In which sky does Balaka fly--
I'm in the midst of this sad trend
Anmane is willing to listen in silence
In the solitude of your shower
She searches for what I need during the day.
I will not think about whether it is met or not
At the end of the day, a lot of walking around
I have come to the land beyond all desire,
I will come to the shore of the infinite stream today
Whatever you give beyond the need, that's the wealth
In the solitude of your shower
তোমারি তরে, মা, সাঁপিনু এ দেহ । তোমারি:
Your body, mother, is a snake.  Your body, mother, is the soul of a snake.
     This eye will rain on your grief, this harp will sing your song.
     Although this arm is weak and weak, you will achieve the task.
     Although this Aussie taint will not destroy your side.
     Although, O goddess, I shall have nothing of yours in Shoni
     Yet, Ogo Mata Pari, it is in Dhali Ektil but in the stigma
                 To quench your pain.
     Though, mother, though say something sweet on this veena of mine
     What do I know if, mother, a child wakes up and hears this Veenatan.
তোমারি নাম বলব নানা ছলে,\nবলব একা বসে আ:
I will say your name in many guises,
I will say sitting alone in the shadow of my mind.
I will say without words, I will say without hope,
I will say it with a smile on my face, I will say it with tears in my eyes.
I will call your name without need,
That call only fills my mind.
As the child calls the mother intoxicated by name,
He can say his mother's name in this happiness
তোমারি নামে নয়ন মেলিনু পুণ্যপ্রভাতে আজি\:
Nayan Melinu in the name of Tomari
In your name, the heart of the world was opened.
Tomari named the dense whale,
Kiran Veena rose in the sky in your name.
In the name of Tomari, the lion door opened in the porch,
The sun shines in the new light.
In the name of Tomari, the sea of life was awakened by Laharilila,
Saji came out of the entire world in your name.
তোমারি মধুর রূপে ভরেছ ভুবন--\n মুগ্ধ:
You have filled the world with sweetness--
     Mocha Nayan Mom, Pulkit Mohit Man.
Young Arun Navinbhati, full moon night,
     Ruparashi-developed-tanu Kusumban.
     You are beautiful, everyone wants to drink.
     The heart lost form.
Always seek your love around you.
The music rises in your water, the sky is full of love songs--
     Your feet have been blessed by Nikhiljan.
তোমারি রাগিণী জীবনকুজ্ঞে বাজে যেন সদ:
Your ragini sounds like it always sounds like life.
May your seat always reign in the lotus heart.
However, I returned to the beautiful world in a pleasant mood
However, with Padrenu Makhi Laye Tanu dress like always dress up.
All hatred goes away as if by the mantra of mangal,
Bikase Madhuri is outside the heart but in music.
But the pure and silent smile is lost
But in glory, all pride should always be ashamed.
তোমারি সেবক করো হে আজি হতে আমারে॥\nচিত্ত:
Make me your servant.
Chitta-mazh dibarat adesh taba deho nath,
        Keep your actions at the door of the world.
     Shatter all the lustful hopes,
        Get rid of the fear of people.
     Retain goodness in silence and shamelessness,
        Immerse yourself in joy.
তোমারে জানি নে হে, তবু মন তোমাতে ধায়।\:
I don't know you, but my heart is on you.
             Without knowing you, the world still finds rest in you.
             But who has felt the infinite beauty?
                        She is Madhuri Chirnav--
             I gave my life without knowing you.
             You are the light of light, I am blind in darkness.
             You are free noble, I am engrossed in the stone.
You are endless, I am a small day - what a wonderful union you have with me.
তোমারেই করিয়াছি জীবনের ধ্রুবতারা,\n এ:
I made the constants of life to you,
    I will not be lost in this sea anymore.
Wherever I go, you are revealed.
    Pour the rays into the water of your eyes.
But the face always wakes up in the memory,
    If the heart is not lost, the roots and edges will not be lost.
Sometimes this heart wants to go astray
    He lost his face in shame.
তোমারেই প্রাণের আশা কহিব।\nসুখে-দুখে-শো:
I hope for your life.
In happiness-sadness-sorrow-in darkness-in light, I want to walk.
Lord, you know why you sent me to this world.
By your order, I will be happy in this country, whatever happiness or sorrow will give you will be accepted.
If I lose my way in the forest, Lord, I will call on your name.
I will take my feet in my heart when my life is longing.
Love will be found in your world, what your work will achieve--
When it's over, take it in your lap.   Where else can I get a break?
তোর ভিতরে জাগিয়া কে যে,\nতারে বাঁধ:
Who wakes up inside you?
Tie the wire.
Alas, he is thirsty for light
So Gumri is crying.
If there is life in the air
Why don't you play music on the harp,
If there is a light in the sky
Why is it dark in the eyes?
Birds are the words of the new dawn
Dil Kanane Kanane Ani,
The hope of new life in flowers
How many colors the language gets.
The night is over,
Nishith's lamp is lit by Hetha--
Why on earth in your building?
Hen became half-and-half?
ধনে জনে আছি জড়ায়ে হায়,\n তবু জানো মন:
I am full of wealth.
     But know that my heart wants you.
        You are in my heart,
        You know me better than me husband--
        Forgetting all the joys and sorrows
             Know that mom wants you.
I could not leave with pride,
Turn around and die,
If you can leave, live that alas--
     You know the heart wants you.
        All that I have is when
        With your own hands you will lift--
        I will give everything to you.
              I want you in my heart.
ধরণী, দূরে চেয়ে কেন আজ আছিস জেগে\nয:
Dharani, looking away, why are you awake today?
As if someone is angry with the northerners.
  Whose union song is Kananabeethi sounding today?
  The mouth wants a guest in the fresh clouds of the sky.
You are surrounded by the Kusumdor of Basan Kadam on your head,
Neelima's Kajal is worn by Sezechis Nayanpat.
  Navashyam Durbadle on that chest of yours
  Flashes of light flashed with lightning speed.
ধরা দিয়েছি গো আমি আকাশের পাখি,\nনয়নে দেখ:
I caught it, I am a bird of the sky,
I have seen a new sky.
What do you put on the leaves of the two ankhi?
A glimpse of dawn burst into laughter.
The heart wants to fly, where I am alone--
Live happily in the land of Ankhitakar.
Looking up at that window, I called...
Want to lose this song-joy.
ধরা সে যে দেয় নাই, দেয় নাই,\n যারে আম:
Catch that he did not give, did not give,
    I want you to join me.
            Where is he in company?
                Every day hidden behind hundreds of trifles.
            Come on mom dream come true
              Make your youth beautiful,
                Bring the south wind to bloom.
Ghuchao the pit of sadness,
    Ano Bani of the New Life Mantra.
        Angry hope of thirsty life
            Searching for language in the dark
                Lost in the void to the rhythm of the wind,
                    In the smell of falling leaves.
ধীরে ধীরে ধীরে বও ওগো উতল হাওয়া,\n:
Blow slowly, oh the wind,
        Nishit night whistle blows - calm down, calm down.
I wake up alone in fear of your flame,
        Speak your mind gently in your ear.
Your distant story is the message of your forest
        Ani brought the body to the corner of the room.
        I have something to say to the morning star,
        Take that word quietly in your ear.
ধীরে ধীরে প্রাণে আমার এসো হে,\n ম:
Come slowly to my soul, O
       Love me with a sweet smile.
Bloom in the heart.  Half eyed, Sakhi, want to--
       Laugh and laugh while crying.
ধীরে বন্ধু, ধীরে ধীরে\n চলো:
Slowly my friend, slowly
              Let's go to your temple.
I don't know the way, there is no light, black inside and outside,
              I have accepted your words
               Today in this forest.
                    Slowly my friend, slowly
          Let's go to the shore of darkness.
I will walk in the night at the beckoning of your wind,
          I received your smell
              Today in this springtime.
ধ্বনিল আহ্বান মধুর গম্ভীর প্রভাত-অম্বর-ম:
Resounding calls sweetly solemn in the morning-amber-midst,
    On the horizon, peace music is playing in the world temple.
A hero is beautiful in heart, Parambandhu in the whole world,
     Come to the joyous meeting-hall in the splendor of goodness.
Let the impurity, impurity, strife, hatred be pure, be it endless--
     No matter how many obstacles are lost in the daily welfare work.
Swara Tarangiya Gao Vihangam, Purvapaschimbandhusangam--
     Maitribandhanapunyamantra-sacred world society.
ফল ফলাবার আশা আমি মনে রাখিনি রে।\n আ:
I did not remember the hope of bearing fruit.
     Today I am throwing flowers in Dakshinsamir.
     The spring song the birds sing, its melody falls on the wind--
     I am playing the game of spring flowers.
I don't know brother, I don't think so, what will happen to me
When I will be cured of all scabies.
     This word will ring in my zero pulse that day.
     "I have given everything to the sweet land of honey."
ফাগুনের নবীন আনন্দে\nগানখানি গাঁথিলাম ছন:
Fagun's new joy
I composed songs in rhythm.
    Dil Tare Banabeethi Kokil's Kolgeeti
          Filled with the smell of bakula.
Madhavi's sweet mantra
Colorful horizon.
    Vani Maam took the flowers of Tuli Palash,
          He tied it with a manibandha.
ফাগুনের পূর্ণিমা এল কার লিপি হাতে।\nবা:
Phagun's full moon is in whose handwriting.
He did not understand the words, his heart was filled with pain.
   In what corner of life is budding
   When this word woke up on a sweet night.
Madhveer Manjari reminds me again and again
Varan's mala gantha is beyond remembrance
   Swapankaya has returned to Samiran,
   Shadow trembles in Benubne.
ফিরবে না তা জানি, তা জানি--\nআহা,:
I know it won't come back, I know it--
Ah, let the lamp shine for your way.
          I know the garland will not be tied,
Ah, still let the buds be in my Bakulbane
I brought the thirst of that day in my life.
          where are you wayfarer
But don't leave my door open.
          The night is my songless,
Ah, yet let thy harp be bound to tune--
Let the sad words surround him.
ফিরায়ো না মুখখানি,\n ফিরায়ো না মুখখান:
don't turn back face
    Don't turn my face, queen, oh queen.
    Why is Sunayani frowning today!
Laughter has gone, no sad words.
    Enchant me with your sweet grace
                Sudhasarase.
    Purify your heart and soul.
       Hero Shasisushovan, Sajni,
                Beautiful Rajini.
    Trishitmadhupasam Katar hridyo mam--
In which life will the stone return to him today?
ফিরে যাও কেন ফিরে ফিরে যাও বহিয়া বিফল:
Go back, why go back, go back, the desire to fail.
Forever you are far away like the unknown, hidden in the unknown river,
           Come close but don't come
               Desire to fail
           I can't understand you--
Who have you found inside, don't look outside.
           Say no to your pain
           It is like learning in a lamp
           Your eyes are burning
               What a silent greeting.
ফিরো না ফিরো না আজি-- এসেছ দুয়ারে।\nশূন্:
Don't come back, don't come back today - you're at the door.
Where do you go in the empty life in the empty world?
Go see him today, bring him to your heart and call--
Pour the nectar into the hearth.
Who wants to drink by keeping a dry soul dry.
Where do you go after hearing two empty words.
Take your words to him and take his words--
Go to him and leave it to you.
ফুল তুলিতে ভুল করেছি প্রেমের সাধনে,\nবঁধ:
I made a mistake in picking flowers in pursuit of love,
Friend, I will tie you with a sweet tie.
     I will not forget the illusion of illusion, I will lie at your feet,
     I will not cast a shadow of infatuation in my laughter-crying.
Only painful hope remains, only the silent language of life remains.
     If I am in the corner of the eye, would you not want to--
     If you don't have ink - or forget the colors.
ফুল বলে, ধন্য আমি মাটির 'পরে,\n দেবতা ও:
The flower says, 'Blessed am I, after the earth,'
  God, your service is in my house.
I was born in the dust, please give it to me.
         There is no dust in my heart.
bow your eyes
         The groups trembled.
Charanparash give, make the treasure of dust heavenly--
     I bow down to you.
ফুলটি ঝরে গেছে রে।\nবুঝি সে উষার আলো:
The flower has fallen.
I understand that he has gone to the land of dawn.
        Only that bird is mudya ankhiti
Sitting alone all day and singing.
Every day he saw whom he could no longer see--
Yet he always comes to the branch of the tree, and sits there,
He sings that song all day, where does he go in the evening?
রজনী পোহাইল-- চলেছে যাত্রীদল,\:
Rajni Pohail--The traveling party is moving,
       The sky will be full of color.
       Everyone is going to the festival.
Yellow blooms in the forest, the birds sing--
       Will there be another morning like this?
There is no more sleep in the eyes, bright light
       Just woke up today.
Let's go to the father's house, all year round
       Prasad-Nectar will receive alms.
That hero is his family in the door world
       Just met today at Hotha--
Brother and friend are just having a good time.
       Matiyache in the festival of love.
He gets as much as he wants--the heart is full,
       return home
রয় যে কাঙাল শূন্য হাতে, দিনের শেষে\nদেয়:
Roy that Kangal is empty handed, at the end of the day
He shows it in a dreamy night.
  In the light I see silence with a dirty face
  When it is dark, its brightness is one--
      The one who waves the garlands in his hair.
Hela was the faint string in the harp of the day
The alarm was raised that night.
  In the immense song of sleepy darkness
  The temple rises to the call of the whole sky--
      In the light of the stars, who looked for Roy Nirnimeshe.
রাঙিয়ে দিয়ে যাও যাও যাও গো এবার যাবা:
paint it go go go go now before you go --
In your own anger, in your secret anger,
In the fury of your young smile,
In the pitiful anger of tears.
Let the color be my soul, all my actions,
It takes before dawn, it takes to wake up in the middle of the night.
Wake me up before you go.
By putting your feet in blood.
      As they wake in the bosom of darkness,
      In the room of the stone cave, the stream rises,
            As the temple of clouds rises in the bosom of the clouds,
            As rhythm rises at the center of the world-dance,
Swing me like that
রাজ-অধিরাজ, তব ভালে জয়মালা--\n:
Raj-Adhiraj, but well, Joymala--
               Tripurapuralakshmi Behe Taba Varandala.
The weak are afraid, but fear is spoken;
               The young face is full of compassion.
Benevolent with good service, but at the door of the door, in a strange treat--
              Guna-Arun-Kiran, but all the world is ala.
রাজপুরীতে বাজায় বাঁশি বেলাশেষের তান।\n:
In Rajpuri, the flute plays the late tones.
     Walking on the road, the passer-by asks, 'What did you take your donation'?
Show everyone that I have something,
     I only have this Kakhani song with me.
     Many people want to keep me at home--
     Many flutes, many scissors, many arrangements.
At the time of coming to Bandhu, the song was only sung by Neelam.
     I will make her neck necklace precious.
রাজরাজেন্দ্র জয় জয়তু জয় হে।\n:
Rajarajendra Joy Joytu Joy Hey.
           O universal repentance,
Wicked thugs are fearful of punishment, bright swords are guarded by enemies--
           You are a miserable wretch
           O free-blocking but abhyudaya.
রাতে রাতে আলোর শিখা রাখি জ্বেলে\n:
Night after night keep the flame of light burning
              There is a seat in the corner of the room.
I think it's time to put out my lamp--
              Full moon, you come.
     He was by your side for so long
              Around your vision.
Today he will take whatever Persian he takes, let him take--
              He pours everything that is available.
রাত্রি এসে যেথায় মেশে দিনের পারাবারে\n:
Where the night comes and mingles with the day
   You met me at the estuary.
There, white and black are matched in the light of darkness--
   There the waves are running this way and that way.
   In deep blue silence, deep words rang out,
   A golden line appeared at the bottom.
I go to look in the face, but I can't see--
   Wake up with a dream, cry in the longing edge.
রিমিকি ঝিমিকি ঝরে ভাদরের ধারা--\n মন য:
Remiki Jhimiki Jhare Vadar Dhara--
   How does the mind become disoriented?
       as if someone called
         In Rajini, who did he shake at the door?
             Remiki Jhimiki Jhrae Vadar Dhara.
Bandhu please, take the light in your heart.
    Ankhi goes into the water in a half-awakened slumber.
Seeing the shadow under the dream, I thought to myself, who came?
        Remiki Jhimiki Jhrae Vadar Dhara.
রুদ্রবেশে কেমন খেলা, কালো মেঘের ভ্রূকুটি:
How to play in Rudrabesh, black cloud frown
    The bosom of Sandhyakash that breaks in that thunderbolt.
O beautiful one, all the branches were covered with flowers for you,
    They get lost in the dust due to the speed of the storm.
    Why hide your sweetheart suddenly on the wedding day
    Want to frighten the coward, she is very clever
If you want to bandage your severe wounds,
    Give your chest a break by pulling it hard.
রূপসাগরে ডুব দিয়েছি অরূপরতন আশা করি,\nঘা:
I dived into the ocean of hope for transformation.
I will not wander around the pier and float my worn-out boat.
  It's time to give up all the waves,
     Sudha now sinks down and becomes immortal and dies.
The song that is not heard is the song that plays constantly
I will take the harp of life to the gathering of the abyss.
  He wept in the last song, tying the eternal melody
     He who is silent will give a silent harp at his feet.
রোদনভরা এ বসন্ত সখী, কখনো আসে নি বুঝ:
Radonvhara this Basant Sakhi, never came before.
My grief is colored by King Shukarktimarage.
       Banamallika is decorated in the Kunjdwar, Priya nava patralika,
       All day-Rajni Animikha wakes up looking for someone's way.
In Dakshinsamir, in the far sky, alone in Birhi village, I understand.
In Kunjaban, my buds want to tear as many coverings as possible.
       I am in the closed door of this life.
       It is not given that you feel this pain.
ভয় হতে তব অভয়মাঝে নূতন জনম দাও হে॥\nদী:
Give me a new birth in the midst of fear.
From humility to inexhaustible wealth, from doubt to truth,
Give birth to a new life from inertia.
Out of my will, Lord, into your will--
From my interest, Lord, but in good deeds--
From many to one, from happiness to sorrow to peace--

love, love--

ভুবন হইতে ভুবনবাসী এসো আপন হৃদয়ে।\nহৃদয়ম:

না না, ভুল কোরো না গো, ভুল কোরো না,\n:
No no, don't make a mistake, don't go, don't make a mistake,

ভেঙেছ দুয়ার, এসেছ জ্যোতির্ময়, তোমারি হ:
You have broken the door, you have come, may you be victorious.
Timirbida's generous abhyudaya, may you be victorious.
       O conquering hero, on the verge of new life

Cut the worn-out passion into a solid wound, let the bond decay.

Ignite Arunavahni in the heart, let it be death.
ভেবেছিলেম আসবে ফিরে,\nতাই ফাগুনশেষে দ:
I thought I would come back.
So I said goodbye at the end.
If you go to Vasi Nayannir
Now on Shravandin, I die in doubt.
Now you cry in the darkness of the evening,
Alone in the rain, I wonder what I will call you back.
       When you are near Ankhi
       Then I see that everything inside and outside is full.
With the hope of that full day, I want to dispel the fear of boredom,
But you are lost in the dark night
It's just a waste of time.
ভোর হল বিভাবরী, পথ হল অবসান--\nশুন ঐ লোক:
The dawn is the bereavement, the path is the end--
Listen to those people get up and sing the song of light.
Blessed Holi Ore Panth Rajnijagarkalanta,
Blessed is the dying gray soul.
Samiran wakes up near the bosom of the forest,
Madhubhikshu came to the door of the Kunj.
However, the journey is full of tears
Shame, fear, and pride
ভোর হল যেই শ্রাবণশর্বরী\nতোমার বেড়ায় উঠ:
Dawn is the one who hears
Hena rose on your fence.
The wind brings the smell out.
My mind wanders in the corner.
When you fenced your flower garden--
You kept it hidden in the water of my forest.
When in the secret darkness in the tears of the rainy night
Your hide becomes sweet and calls out to you.
ভোরের বেলা কখন এসে পরশ করে গেছ হেসে॥\n:
When did you come and laugh in the morning?
Who broke the door of my sleep and gave me the news--
I woke up and saw that my eyes were floating in the water.
It seemed as if the sky spoke to the ear.
It seemed that all bodies were filled with music.
The heart is like a dew-dropped flower of worship--
The river of life overflowed the clan and spread to the limitless land.
শরৎ, তোমার অরুণ আলোর অঞ্জলি\n ছড়:

        Autumn, your dew-washed kuntle
        বনের-পথে-লুটিয়ে-পড়া অঞ্চলে
        This morning, the heart is excited.
manik-gantha oi-that in your kankan

শাঙনগগনে ঘোর ঘনঘটা, নিশীথযামিনী রে।\nকুঞ:

Urhi vilunthi lol chikur mum bandhah champkamale.

Gorje frequent, Bahu Dor Paob, Kahe Bhanu Taba

Who will come hard in the winter forest
Shiulis are dirty with fear in the arms of the forest.
Amlki dal sajal kangal, khsi dil pallabjal,

শীতের হাওয়ায় লাগলো নাচন আম্‌লকির এই ডালে:

From the side of winter, I understand that it is called,

শুধু তোমার বাণী নয় গো, হে বন্ধু, হে প্রি:

Sometimes give your heart to me.
The fatigue of the whole way is my thirst for the whole day
How can I satisfy the fact that I can't find the direction?
Tell me that you who are full of darkness.
My heart wants to give, not just take.
He carries all his savings.

শুধু যাওয়া আসা, শুধু স্রোতে ভাসা,\nশুধ:
Just go and come, just float,

just want to go away and cry,

শুভ কর্মপথে ধর' নির্ভয় গান।\nসব:
Have a good career' Nirbhay song.
End all weak doubts.
Ever-flowing stream of power
After that, he made his debut.
But awakened pure new life
Nik Diksha for sacrifice,
Respect for the cruel crisis.
Even though it is sad, wealth is great.
Let's travel, let's go day and night--

Jadatatamas be passed,

শুভদিনে এসেছে দোঁহে চরণে তোমার,\nশিখাও প:
Good day has come to your feet,
Learn the lesson of love, where else can you go?
That love is not stained with happiness, Lord,
The love that holds a bright shape in sorrow.
That love will last forever,
What happens in an instant is new.
That love's white smile is the morning ray,
The tears of love are like dew.
The path of love has gone to Amritsad
Show that love to both of you.
If Kavu is tired, take him in your arms, kind--
If you forget the way, show again.
শুভদিনে শুভক্ষণে পৃথিবী আনন্দমনে\n:
On auspicious day, the world is happy

Look at the cow lying near that foot,
     Take the king in your right hand.
With a formula, Dev, knit together--
It doesn't break, it doesn't tear, it stays in that hand.
Keep it safe with your dew--
     I don't know what to do in the middle of the sun
শুভ্র আসনে বিরাজ' অরুণছটামাঝে,\nনীলাম্ব:
In the white seat Arunchatamajhe,

       The bright sun is above the crown,

       Light love joy

শুভ্র নব শঙ্খ তব গগন ভরি বাজে,\n ধ্বন:
White new conch but the sky fills,

Arunruchi sits on the feet and reigns,

Take 'em across the whale,

শুষ্কতাপের দৈত্যপুরে দ্বার ভাঙ্বে ব'লে,\:
By breaking the door in the monster of dry heat,
    The prince suddenly came from nowhere.
From across the seven seas roaring thunder,
    Dunduvi rose up in a strange ring.
    Waking up from fainting at the feet of the hero,
    Bashundhara's hot soul takes a huge beating.
Decorate the plate of emeralds and tie the garlands,
    Utla swayed because her love was easy.
শূন্য প্রাণ কাঁদে সদা-- প্রাণেশ্বর,\n:

   Lord, you are the speed of birth and death,
       Give space to your feet.
শূন্য হাতে ফিরি, হে নাথ, পথে পথে-- ফিরি:

শেষ নাহি যে, শেষ কথা কে বলবে?\n আঘ:

শেষ বেলাকার শেষের গানে\n ভোরের ব:

         The talk in the game

শোনো তাঁর সুধাবাণী শুভমুহূর্তে শান্তপ্রা:
