His music in the skies,

শোনো শোনো আমাদের ব্যথা দেবদেব, প্রভু,:

শ্রাবণমেঘের আধেক দুয়ার ওই খোলা,\n আ:
The opening of the half-door of the sravanamegha,
      No path is seen from behind.
That across the eastern sky the northern rays fly,
      Sajal swings in the breeze.
      Who knows what will be hidden or revealed--
      Where is the house in the sky?
Every now and then I feel that
      Paraskhani multi-melodic wave-making.
শ্রাবণের ধারার মতো পড়ুক ঝরে, পড়ুক ঝ:
Let it fall and fall like the stream of Shravana
Your tone is behind my face. After the chest
May fall with the light of the east in the two eyes of the morning--
Let the soul fall deep into the darkness of Nisith.
Nishidin is after the happiness of this life
Let it fall and fall like the stream of Shravana.
Branches that don't flower, don't bear fruit at all,
Wake up that badal-baye direction of yours in that branch.
All that is worn out is mine, worn out, lifeless,
Let the stream of music fall layer by layer.
Nishidin is after the thirst of this life, after the hunger
Sh
শ্রাবণের পবনে আকুল বিষণ্ণ সন্ধ্যায়\n:
In the gloomy evening of Shravan Pawan
       My heart is at home with my partner
       Migratory birds want to return
       In the distant forest shade.
       I don't know if there is even today
       In the thick darkness of the forest--
       Will you respond to songless silent pursuit?
Alas, I know he is not in the worn-out nest, I know he is not.
       Pilgrims return to the pain of failure--
       The heart still calls out to the empty world
       Crying-awakening companions are infinite in the void.
দই চাই গো, দই চাই, দই চাই গো ?\n:
Do you want curd, want curd, want curd?
          Shyamoli is my cow
              He has no comparison.
      On the banks of the Kankanadi
      In the morning I took him to the wire--
      In the fenced field, along the river, along the edge, on the wire
           All day grazing, grazing cows.
      His body is black
      The more I see, the better.
      Let's sit close to him, he answers with a look in his eyes.
      My head rests on my back--
            Put his hand on his body, put his hand on it.
দয়া দিয়ে হবে গো মোর জীবন ধুতে।\n নইলে:
Please wash my life.
    Otherwise, can I touch your feet?
All the ink comes out of the branches of worship to give you,
    I can't wear it, so I spit on my feet.
    I had no pain for so long.
    Dirt was spread all over.
Today, on that white lap, the anxious heart weeps and dies--
    Don't let me sleep in the dust.
দাও হে হৃদয় ভরে দাও।\n তরঙ্গ উঠ:
Give, oh fill your heart.
         Waves rise in the empty ocean,
               Make me happy.
Give me the sudharaspan in which the Tribhuvana is born
দাঁড়াও আমার আঁখির আগে।\n:
Stand before my eyes.
                Your eyes are in my heart.
Stand before the sky in this wonderful yearning light, O,
  When I wear it, I want to look at it with my eyes.
   Increase the sweetness of this Dharani.
    Stand, O Nath, in the dusty region of Shyam, stand, O.
All that is, jump up, cover the world, stand up in life.
   Stand where Birhi is lonely and wakes up alone.
দাঁড়াও, মাথা খাও, যেয়ো না সখা।\nশুধু স:
Stand up, eat your head, don't go, friend.
Just a friend, back, nothing more--
How long have you met today?
And don't want anything, nothing, nothing--
I will see only that face.
What will not happen, my friend!
Just come back once.
দাঁড়িয়ে আছ তুমি আমার গানের ওপারে-\nআমার:
You are standing on the other side of my song-
Charan gets my tunes, I don't get you.
   Die and die in the wind, and don't tie it up.
        Come, come, cross into my heart.
        Playing music with you is a distant game,
        Whistles in pain all the time.
   When will you play my flute?
        In the deep darkness of blissful silent night.
দিন অবসান হল।\nআমার আঁখি হতে অস্তরবির:
The day is over.
Hide the shadowy light from my eyes.
Near the bosom of darkness is the seat of eternal light,
         Open your door there.
At the end of all words, let's come together.
Deep in the heart of the stammering words you sound,
         Speak that word in my ear.
দিনগুলি মোর সোনার খাঁচায় রইল না--\n:
Days did not stay in my golden cage--
      Those are my colorful days.
            They did not break the bonds of laughter--
                  Those are my colorful days.
The language of my life's music
       They were hoping to learn
             flew away, did not say all the words--
                    Those are my colorful days.
I see dreams, as if they are around
       Back around my broken cage--
             Those are my colorful days.
What is so painful?
        Are they all shadow birds?
              Sky-can do nothing
দিন পরে যায় দিন, বসি পথপাশে\nগান পরে গ:
Day after day, sitting by the wayside
I sing song after song in the spring wind.
    Bela doesn't want to run out, so play in tune--
        Ragini's mirage in the dream.
Day after day, but no see.
I sing song after song, Roy sits alone.
    The sound stops lest you come nearer--
    Love hurts the one it loves.
দিন যায় রে দিন যায় বিষাদে--\nস্বার্থকোলা:
Days go by, days go by in sadness--
In selfishness, in deception, in desire for failure.
You came in a moment, you will go away in a moment,
Janam spends his life in vain arguments and bad advice.
দিনশেষে বসন্ত যা প্রাণে গেল ব'লে,\nতাই ন:
At the end of the day, the spring that came to life,
I am sitting with that, on my lap.
     He will take the tune
     I am full of songs,
     Jhara goes with Madhavi.
          stop stop south
          Do not hide what message you have brought.
     The day that you do not remember that you are in the forest
     What flowers have you found?
দিনের পরে দিন যে গেল আঁধার ঘরে,\nতোমার:
Day after day that passed in the dark room,
How does my mind feel when I see your seat?
      Oh my friend, the flower arrangement is full of flowers today--
      At the rate of pain, I will tie the wire, I will keep it on my feet.
The sound of footsteps, the night stars wake up,
The north wind comes and blows in the forest of flowers.
      In Fagunbela, the path-seeking tune cries out in the chest-
      The words of life lose their language, fall into tears.
দিনের বেলায় বাঁশি তোমার বাজিয়েছিলে অনেক:
During the day you played your flute with many tunes--
The song came to life, you stayed away.
    Shudhai as many people on the way 'who played this flute'--
    They go by different names, they wander around in different doors.
Now the sky is dim, the weary day burdens the eye--
Return to the road, if I die, I find a lie.
    From the outside to the inside, you can get seats--
        Come play your flute
        In the heart of my soul
দিবস রজনী আমি যেন কার আশায় আশায় থাকি।\:
Divas Rajini, who should I hope for?
So startled mind, startled hearing, thirsty longing eyes.
    Wandering restlessly, I always think if I see--
    I want to be surprised when the bird calls in my ear saying 'who is here'.
When I wake up, I can't see it, I live in a dream--
If caught under the cover of sleep, it will be tied to sleep.
I love so much, I want so much, I don't think that he is not near...
    As if this desire will bring him with anxious emotions.
দিবানিশি করিয়া যতন\n হৃদয়েতে:
Take care daily
           Seated in the heart--
Lord, please come here, what will you do?
There is no noise in this very crowded place--
I have taken care of my heart.
They do not shine the light of the outer sun;
Only you, Dev, will do the radiation there.
Far away is the swiftness of desire, far away is the noise of joy--
Disgraceful flight of the subject.
Ananda sat there without a single word--
Thy priest, O Lord, shall worship thee--
He will sit in silence and continuously shed tears,
A grocer wakes up at the door alone
দিয়ে গেনু বসন্তের এই গান্খানি--\n বর:
With this song of spring--
     The rain will run out, I know it will be forgotten.
          Yet in the pain of this song on Falgun night
              Ankhi, however, was confused, this is a lot of money.
If you don't want to stay, sit and spend time
I will leave when the game is over.
    Falgun will come again, then listen again
       New words in the song of the new traveler.
দীপ নিবে গেছে মম নিশীথসমীরে,\nধীরে ধীরে:
The lamp has gone to Mama Nishitsameer,
Come slowly, don't go back.
         When you go this way in the dark you will know--
              The smell of rajnigandha fills the temple.
I will read it when I feel like it
Hour after hour I wake up singing.
         Afraid of waking up in the last night,
              If my voice is out of tune with a tired voice.
দীর্ঘ জীবনপথ, কত দুঃখতাপ, কত শোকদহন--\n:
Long life, how much sorrow, how much mourning--
  I still sing the song of His mercy.
Has opened the doors of his immortality--
Tiredness will be felt, tears will be wiped away, this path will end.
Sing the song of joy in the drink of eternity--
  No small grief.
What does Anant Aloy think about--
  I will not be burdened by the triviality of the moment, Mariaman.
দুই হৃদয়ের নদী একত্র মিলিল যদি\n:
If the rivers of two hearts meet together
        Tell me, god, whose drink can be enjoyed.
In front of him is your love,
        Your eternal heart wants to join the two.
I hope the two have met.
Two people are going after that one goal.
        There are hundreds of obstacles in the way, how many rocky mountains,
          It will break two balls into one.
Finally the journey of life is over
In the lap of your love, let the cows find refuge,
             The happiness of two hearts is the sorrow of two hearts
               Your feet meet the hopes of two hearts.
দুইটি হৃদয়ে একটি আসন পাতিয়া বসো হে হৃদয়:
Take a seat in two hearts, O Hridyanath.
  Please keep the hands of Mangaldor tied for good.
  Pranesh, your love eternally awakens in the heart forever springing,
  Do the sweet union of the twin souls, O pitiful eyes.
  The path of the world is long and great, two sects are young outside,
May your Prasad-Arun make Prakash new dawn today.
  But goodness, but greatness, thy sweetness, thy truth--
    Day and night in the heart of the dew.
দুখ দিয়েছ, দিয়েছ ক্ষতি নেই, কেন গো একলা:
You gave pain, you gave no harm, why leave the cow alone?
     If you call those who were close, you stay close.
Pran does not respond to anyone, Ravi Shashi is not seen.
     The helpless one who walks this way - call him, Lord, call him.
     When the light of the world goes out, the darkness of sadness thickens--
     Show where the eternal light is burning in your life.
On the edge of the dry stream, the thirsty soul weeps--
     Where is the source of infinite love, don't keep me thirsty.
     Who is my kinsman--today comes and tomorrow is gone.
     The only thing that turns around is the rest of the world
দুখ দূর করিলে, দরশন দিয়ে মোহিলে প্রাণ॥:
If you remove the sorrow, you will enjoy the life with vision.
Seven people forget and mourn for you--
Where am I?
দুঃখ যে তোর নয় রে চিরন্তন--\nপার আছে রে:
Sorrow is not yours, O Eternal--
The huge cry of this sea is over.
         As long as the pain of this life is here, it will all be over.
             Eternal comfort in the midst of eternity.
     Death is not yours, eternal--
If you cross the door, you will tear the bond.
       At this time, if the yolk of your worship falls in the storm,
           At the time of going, the dish will be filled with garlands and sandalwood.
দুঃখরাতে, হে নাথ, কে ডাকিলে--\nজাগি হেরি:
On a sad night, O Nath, who calls--
Jagi Herinu is a love picture.
Herinu Ushaloke the world is still in the lap,
Waking up, the dawn is bright.
Ananda Gatha in Shuninu Bane Upbane,
Hope is in the heart of the poet.
দুঃখের বরষায় চক্ষের জল যেই নামল\nবক্:
Tears fell in the rain of sorrow
A friend's chariot stopped at the door of the chest.
The vessel of communion is full of separation-pain;
Arpinu has no regrets in his hands and I have no regrets.
What hope is stored in the long-deprived heart,
In the twinkling of an eye, that parasha's thirst disappeared.
I know for whom I cried all these days.
Blessed is the awakening, blessed is the cry, blessed are the blessed.
দুখের বেশে এসেছ ব'লে তোমারে নাহি ডরিব হ:
If you come in the guise of sorrow, you will not be afraid of me.
     I will hold you tight where the pain is.
Covered in darkness, my husband, I will still recognize you--
     If you come in the form of death, Lord, hold your feet, O mortal.
     Like do it-don't see you, I don't want you.
     The water is falling in the eyes today, the water is falling in the eyes
     Bajiche Bajuk Bajuk Bajuk Bajuk Bajuk Bajuk Bajuk Bajuk Bajuk Bajuk Bajuk.
Let me know that you are holding the pain in your chest--
     I don't want anything, I don't want to talk, I want to be in the Lord.
দুজনে দেখা হল মধুযামিনী রে--\nকেন কথা:
The two met Madhujamini Ray--
Why didn't you speak, went away slowly.
Nikunje is doing in the south.
The leaves are swinging back and forth.
Ankhibari of the two went secretly,
The words of the two lives remained in the lives of the two.
And it is no longer seen, alone in the world--
Forever on the banks of the Yamuna.
দুটি প্রাণ এক ঠাঁই তুমি তো এনেছ ডাকি,\n:
You have brought two souls to one place.
       Your happy eyes are awakened by good deeds.
You are tied to this worldly love
       He is bound in love and covered with love.
       By your command, you will enter the world.
       Mayamohe will avoid you by saying you are blessed.
Both of you will continue your work today.
       Heart to heart, heart to heart, keep you in my heart.
দুয়ার মোর পথপাশে, সদাই তারে খুলে রাখি।:
Always keep the door open on the side of the door.
When his chariot comes, Ankhi wakes up worried.
  I hear the Guru growling in the distant clouds,
  In the morning, I hear the gentle death-death in the wind.
  I wake up in my chest with surprise.
Everyone can see it without looking back
Utal Rolle Kallole sings the song of the path.
  How far the autumn clouds float away and disappear
  Where all paths meet in a hidden surpur.
  My soul is bored in a country that flies in a dream.
দুয়ারে দাও মোরে রাখিয়া নিত্য কল্যাণ-ক:
Give me at the door and keep me in daily welfare work.
Heed the call to return to your kingdom.
Mojia Anukhun is lazy without falling in lust,
George's life has become a day of failure.
Let me not be surrounded by more and more doubts.
Do not return by various paths to the many-collected shelter.
Do not be under the rule of many men in the seat of fear,
I will return in fearless glory as your servant.
দূর রজনীর স্বপন লাগে আজ নূতনের হাসিতে,\n:
The dream of a far-off day seems to be the smile of a new one today.
Far Fagun's pain wakes up today in Fagun's flute.
Alas, when will he leave tomorrow, Alas?
Today, in the mirage of this time, float in a new illusion.
When the great days are over, my yolk is shed
That young man wore garlands of flowers.
Hearing the last words he was crying in despair,
The void in you is filled again with a new look.
We played games, we also sang songs.
We also sailed, we sailed.
He did not lose it, he did not lose it, he did not lose it--
I got it back yesterday with the light of new eyes
দূরে কোথায় দূরে দূরে\n আমার মন বেড়ায়:
far away far away
  My mind wanders.
In the melody of the flute in which the wind cries.
The road that crosses all countries becomes boring
Who wants to go to Kangal Paran along that path?
দূরের বন্ধু সুরের দূতীরে পাঠালো তোমার ঘর:
A distant friend sent a messenger of sound to your house.
The milanveena that rings in the heart is invisible.
The word of the mind secretly floats in the air in the air,
In the forest, under the forest, murmuring in the fickleness of the branches.
You got a bouquet of flowers on your chest.
Keep it wet with tears of happiness.
Take the turn of the meeting in Sahana, decorate carefully the branches of the wedding--
Malati's garland, covering the region with Kanakpradip bring her way-' later.
দে তোরা আমায় নূতন করে দে নূতন আভরণে॥\nহে:
Give me new clothes.
Hemant's cursed land is empty,
In the spring, let the pity be released in the new Lavanyadhan.
Let's forget the shame of empty branches in Pallava-cover.
In the magic of love
On the harp of Pulkit Prana
Greetings from Chirsundar.
Let the joyous dance flow from limb to limb.
Young Pak honor is desired in the assembly.
দেওয়া নেওয়া ফিরিয়ে-দেওয়া তোমায় আমায়--\n:
Give back to me--
        Janam Janam This is going on, does death stop it?
When I wake up to your song, I want you to love me.
Once again, in my song, in the water of the earth, you will come down.
Oh, your golden light stream, its edge--
I repay him by blooming my black clay flowers.
When I drink in the scent of my autumn Shefalibon
Then he pulls the sail, but in the love-rain of the night.
দেখ্‌ চেয়ে দেখ্‌ তোরা জগতের উৎসব।\n:
Look at the festival of the world.
     Listen, eternally rise and win, Lord.
Shashi Ravi is as many poets in the world
     Go back to the eternal sky.
     I don't know what beauty they saw,
     I don't know what great amritdhara he drank.
I don't know who they are running to--
     Nikhil Bhava is as if he is overwhelmed with joy.
     Look at the sky, radiant with rays.
     Look at the world, flow of beauty.
Ankhi Mor who is looking at Animikhe--
     What kind of things have awakened in the soul?
হম যব না রব সজনী,\nনিভৃত বসন্ত-নিকুঞ্জ-:
Hum yab na rab sajni,
Nivrit Basant-Nikunj-Bitaan will come pure dew--
Will come thirsty for companionship, Shyam Hamari Ashe,
Fukarbe Barley ⤗Radha Radha' Murli Uradh breath,
All the gopinis will come quickly.
Barley all the gopinis will wake up, I will not wake up.
But will Kunjpath Hamari Ashe Herbe Akul Shyam.
Bon bon feri so ki fukarbe ⤗Radha Radha' name.
No Yamuna, so one Shyam Mom, Shyamak hundreds of women--
Ham Jab Jaob, hundreds of Radha's feet will be there.
But sakhi yamune, jai nikunje, kah tayagab de.
Hamari Lagi A Brindavanam Kah
দেখব কে তোর কাছে আসে--\nতুই রবি একেশ্বর:
Let's see who comes to you--
You are Ravi Ekeswari.
     I will be alone by my side.
দেখায়ে দে কোথা আছে একটু বিরল।\nএই ম্রিয়:
Show me where is a bit rare.
You are so happy in this lovely face
      Tell me in which life Dhalib shouted.
      I've done it, but it's fun to increase--
      How hard it was to hold back the tears.
But I can't do that friend - Yatna does not stay covered,
      Tears rose from the heart.
If the pain is due to pain, it should be cleaned
      It's very quiet, but it's heart-warming.
Just ignore it and tell me how it is.
      How can I only smile on the outside?
দেখে যা, দেখে যা লো তোরা সাধের কাননে:
Look at it, look at it in the ear of your saint
The yolk of my saint has burst forth, the malay is pouring out the survi lutiya re--
The heather is blooming, Tatini is running, Kanan dawn is happy.
    Aay aay sakhi, aay lo hetha, both of us will talk about our hearts.
            Tulib Kusum and Milli Re--
    Happily, I will make garlands, I will wear stars, I will make Rajni Bhor.
    I will sit in these ears and sing, I will spend my life in the dream of happiness.
            Let's play a mind game.
    Mishi Divas Nishi is half asleep in his life.
দেখো দেখো, দেখো, শুকতারা আঁখি মেলি চায়:
Look, look, look, Shuktara wants to fight
           On the edge of dawn.
Called Ray Shiuli Phulere--
           Oh oh oh oh oh
And whoever lights the lamp,
           Who wears a tip on the forehead,
   Whose arrival sings - Aay Aay Aay.
Ja go ja go sakhi,
In whose hope the sky rose Pulki.
Listen to that moment by moment in Malati's forest
Shishirbaya said - Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh!
দেশ দেশ নন্দিত করি মন্দ্রিত তব ভেরী\n:
Country Country Nandit Kari Mandrit Taba Veri
        As many warriors came, they surrounded the seat.
        The day is coming, where is India?
        Is he still missing in the back?
        Lauk Vishwakarmavar Milli with everyone.
Send 'Bhairav, then the mighty call, O awakened Lord.'

        Those who despised suffering
        The deathbed has passed, broken charms.  
        The day is coming, where is India?
        Immobile Nibiryabahu is without action
        Failure is a joyous life
Give me life, give me life, give me life, O awakened one
দেশে দেশে ভ্রমি তব দুখ গান গাহিয়ে\n:
Wandering from country to country singing sad songs
           In the city, in the wilderness, in the forest.  Tears in both eyes,
               The stony heart weeps hearing that story.
           Ayut Pran is burning up, Milli sings a song together
           Nayen Anal Bhai zero trembling in thunderous thunderbolts!
                   Scared to be silent.
               Brother friend, I have no one without you.
               You are father, you are mother, you are my everything.
            Mother, I will cry in your sorrow, I will cry in your sorrow.
            I left it to you
দৈবে তুমি কখন নেশায় পেয়ে\nআপন মনে যাও তু:
God, when did you get drunk?
You sing to your heart.
     Write melody in the sky
         Looking at his drink.
My heart goes away, forgets the exact address of the familiar day,
     Bees lose themselves as if following the path of smell.
              In the pull of music
     From the moment-surrounded gem to infinity.

Dharani is walking in Shihra, Kankanke Kinikini in the pitcher.
Parul Shudhail, who are you, the illusion of the unknown Kanan.
Kamini flowers are raining, the wind is blowing hair,
In the dark, the stars are shaking, the membrane is jingling.
নৃত্যের তালে তালে, নটরাজ, ঘুচাও:
To the beat of the dance, Nataraj, Ghuchao Ghuchao Ghuchao all stop O.
       Break the sleep, wake up the free rhythm of the heart.
             Saraswati's manasaras at your feet
             From age to age, time to time, tune, tune, beat, beat
       Raise the waves, wake up the smell of Amlakmalgandha.
                                         Namo namo namo
                               Your dance Amit Bharuk Chitta Maam.

Your form of liberation in dance, your magic in dance,
       Shadow dances in molecules in molecules in the universe.
পড়্‌ তুই সব চেয়ে নিষ্ঠুর মন্ত্র--\nপাকে:
Read thou cruelest mantra--
Let him tie his mind with spots.
Wherever you go, never avoid me
                     Can't, can't
পথ এখনো শেষ হল না, মিলিয়ে এল দিনের ভাতি।:
The path is not over yet, the day has come.
   When will the dark night come between you and me?
       Now bring your flame
              light my lamp
       The companion of the path will meet in the light of the light.
Well, that face of yours is beautiful, O--
   The great sadness of the long journey therefore clings to me.
       In the shadow-back in the dust-walking
              Don't speak your mind,
       The last word will light your lamp, my lamp.
পথ চেয়ে যে কেটে গেল কত দিনে রাতে,\nআজ ত:
How many days and nights spent looking for the way,
Today you will meet me as a soul mate.
  The shadow of your face will create the sweet illusion of tears.
      I will be silent and ask for your drink.
      I don't care what they all say,
  My heart was broken by the weight of your sweetness!
Don't you hide me in your arms,
     Don't want your eyes in my pain?
পথ দিয়ে কে যায় গো চলে\n ড:
Who goes along the way?
                Calling he goes.
           I have to stay at home.
What music sounds in the wind of the road, sounds in my chest--
           In bad pain
   Ban came running from the sea at full moon,
       I felt a tug on my soul.
I draw according to my own mind and read why
          What do you think?
পথহারা তুমি পথিক যেন গো সুখের কাননে\n:
You are a wanderer like a cow in the ears of happiness
          Ogo go, go where.
  Bibash Bival's crazy eyes filled with happiness
          You want, who you want.
Where has the bored heart gone, where is Dharani lying?
Maya Tarani Bahiya as if Go Mayapuri-Pane Dhao--
          No Mayapuri-Pane Dhao.
পথে চলে যেতে যেতে কোথা কোন্‌খানে\n:
Somewhere to go on the way
         Who knows when you will come.
With the smell of unknown saffron, with your secret pleasure,
         In any song of any passerby.
Suddenly all the earth trembles with great sorrow,
     All the signs of all paths are broken
             Death-injury takes life--
         Who knows when you will come.
পথে যেতে ডেকেছিলে মোরে।\n পিছিয়ে পড়ে:
You called me to go on the way.
     I have fallen behind, how can I go?
     There is an intensive study, the path is gone.
     Respond, respond to the darkness.
Afraid, lest as I go round and round, as far away as I go--
     I think you're close, but I'm afraid, just in case
     I am there, you are not there.
পথের শেষ কোথায়, শেষ কোথায়, কী আছে শেষ:
Where is the end of the road, where is the end, what is at the end
   So much desire, so much effort where?
        Waves rise and cry, thick darkness ahead,
There is a country in which country?
   Today, I think in my mind in search of mirages
I understand that there is no end to thirst.     I feel afraid that--
   The broken sail-torn pain goes aimlessly
পরবাসী, চলে এসো ঘরে\n অনুকূল সমীরণ:
Foreigners, come home
       Full of favorable balance.
Look how many times it has been crossed,
       Sarigan got up in amber.
       Arranged in the sky,
       Invitation to the air.
The mind did not respond, so you are homeless
       Exiled outside in the heart.
পাখি আমার নীড়ের পাখি অধীর হল কেন জানি--\:
I know why the bird in my nest is impatient--
Can you hear the murmur of the morning light in the sky?
     The call is raised in the clouds, the lazy fan wakes up--
     He was bored by that blue sky.
The bird from my nest has now disappeared into the sky.
He did not go in search of anyone, he did not go for any work.
     Full of music, full of music, want to give so wasted--
     All the words of your soul in the sea of silent songs.
পাখি বলে, 'চাঁপা, আমারে কও,\n কেন তুম:
The bird said, 'Chapa, tell me,
    Why are you silent?
I sing that song with all my heart
All morning's gift of melody,
    Do you take it to heart?
    Why do you remain silent?'
When he hears the pressure, he says,
Who can hear me sing
    No no bird, he's not you.'
The bird said, 'Chapa, tell me,
Why do you stay secret?
    Utla Bay near Fagun
    He who calls to fly,
      Do you take it to heart?
      Why do you stay in secret?'
When he hears the pressure, he says,
Who can see my flight
      No no bird, he's not you.'
পাগল যে তুই, কণ্ঠ ভরে\nজানিয়ে দে তাই সাহ:
You are crazy, voice full
Dare to tell.
        If you shake your door
        Stay in the corner, don't respond--
            Let everyone say without creation, let everyone say what is your job.
Say, I'm nobody.
Nothing happened.
        Laughter will rise after listening,
        The flute will play from side to side--
            The wind will say 'love', the sky will be tied to the door.
পাছে চেয়ে বসে আমার মন,\nআমি তাই ভয়ে ভ:
My mind is waiting for fear,
I am so scared.
     Lest the eyes be blinded,
That's why I don't pick it up.
পাছে সুর ভুলি এই ভয় হয়--\n:
I am afraid of forgetting the tune--
                 Lest the broken wire win.
Lest there is Nimgan, Punya Lagan in the festival time
                 Hela play decays--
        Lest the meeting is lost without song.
                 When my call is heard in the frenzy
Lest my rhythm does not match his rhythm in that storm.
When death comes and calls at the end with a welcome song, lest it die
                  My word is all--
        Lest there is a farewell without a song.
পাতার ভেলা ভাসাই নীরে,\n পিছন-প:
Rafts of leaves floating in the water,
          I don't want to go back.
Karma is my burden, play is my walking game.
My seat was not fair, I did not build a house on the bank of the stream.
          When it comes to binding
          Fortune smiles on me.
The path that drags me with the call of the dust-blowing wind--
Let's go to Dharitrire with new and new songs.
পাদপ্রান্তে রাখ' সেবকে,\n শান্তিসদন:
Keep the servant at your feet,
     Shantisadhan Sadhana Devdev O.
Parsing all people, removing all delusions,
Grief Disruption, Grief Relief,
     O true form of love,
     Devmanujbanditapada Visbhupa
Hridayananda Purna Indu, you are infinite love.
Thirsty Amiyabindu, Karunalaya Bhaktabandhu
     Love-eyed servant,
     O Lord of the Heart
     Virtue-filled heaven, sweetly lost all the worlds,
     Sudha Gandhamudit Pavan, Dhvanit Geet Hridyabhavan.
     See you in the empty life,
     I hope you will meet all the tears in the nectar flood.
Body'
পান্থ তুমি, পান্থজনের সখা হে,\n পথে চ:
Panth, thou friend of Panth,
    Walking on the road is the way to find you.
Where is the joyous song of the journey
    Sing your song with her voice.
                He doesn't want John to go back and drink.
                Air or sea only shore to shore,
                The storm calls out to him
                   Whose wind you felt.
Panth, thou friend of Panth,
    Your way of thinking.
Open the door and welcome whoever wants
    His desire is your desire.
                He is not afraid of danger.
                No rule
পারবি না কি যোগ দিতে এই ছন্দে রে\n এই:
Can't join this rhythm?
   This is the joy of falling, floating, and breaking.
Don't listen with open ears to the sky
   What tune is played on the death knell Tapan-Tara-Chandre Re--
   It is the joy of burning and burning.
Who knows where to the tune of maddened music,
   He doesn't want to go back and forth, he doesn't want to stop.
   It is the joy of looting, running, and walking.
The six seasons dance in that joyous footstep,
   The flood flows to catch the rain and sing to the smell.
   To throw away, to leave, to die in joy.
পিতার দুয়ারে দাঁড়াইয়া সবে ভুলে যাও অভি:
Standing at the father's door, just forget the pride.
Come, brother, come, live, live, don't leave a gap.
Wash away the dust of the world, come with a smile on your face.
Come with the plate of the heart, brother, Premful Rashi-rashi.
If you stay in your dull heart, forget him--
Orphan John's mouth drinking oh, if you don't want to raise your face!
How painful will the next life be if you suffer from a severe injury--
No more quarrels over trifles.
Even if you come to him, he will not forget you today.
Will he not open his heart to call to his heart?
Laib Batia all milia pray
পিপাসা হায় নাহি মিটিল, নাহি মিটিল॥\n:
Thirst is not quenched, it is not quenched.
   Gorlarspane jorjarparanae
    I beseech you, O Karzod,
Add the fire of the family to the nectar of love.
পুব-সাগরের পার হতে কোন্‌ এলো পরবাসী--\n:
Who came from across the East Sea--
      The sound of the wind is played frequently in the air
               Snake playing flute
      Suddenly, from where to Kulu Kulu Kalsro
      The stream of water is running joyfully.
That beginning has become a frequent deep Guru Guru Damrurab on the horizon today.
      After hearing that today, the sky fell in groups
            Agnivaran nag Nagini ran bored.
পুব-হাওয়াতে দেয় দোলা আজ মরি মরি।\nহৃদয়নদ:
Today, the wind is shaking.
Ripples wake up at the heart of the river.
Looking for a way, he spends time idly at the lonely ghat
The sound of your voice comes with the sail.
Pain is not my root, not my obstacle.
Paran does not know my sleep, does not know wake.
It will be found that today Akul-pane in your song in my song,
Will be washed away in the juice bowl today.
পুরাতনকে বিদায় দিলে না যে ওগো নবীন রাজ:
If you don't send away the old, that is the new king.
If you only play the flute, it will be worn by the young king.
  The mantra that charmed him with his soul,
  Bikshiya got up in a new dress, that new king.
  If you give your color, you dye and his clothes, Ogo Nabin Raja.
  If you give your garland, it will melt and play trick--
  His harp plays to your tune, O young king.
প্রেমের মিলনদিনে সত্য সাক্ষী যিনি অন্তর:
True witness on the day of love who is intimate
             Nomi to him I-- nomi nomi.
  In danger, in wealth, in happiness, in sorrow, the companion who is intimate day and night
             Nomi to him I-- nomi nomi.
        Whose gaze is upon the stars in the nightingale,
             Whose sight spans the limits of life and death,
Whose vision is like a flame in the bright sun-light, intimate in the living-soul
             Nomi to him I-- nomi nomi.
  All the activities of life should be offered at his feet.
        One who witnesses Nikhil, Antaryami
             Nami said to him, I-- no
প্রভু, বলো বলো কবে\nতোমার পথের ধুলার:
Lord, tell me when
Your path will be colored by the color of the dust.
         The flowers of worship bloom in the colored dust of your forest,
         When will that dust embrace me?
         Pilgrims covered in dust at their feet to bow down
         Those who leave will know me as their own.
প্রমোদে ঢালিয়া দিনু মন, তবু প্রাণ কেন:
The mind is filled with joy, but why does the soul cry?
  There are smiles all around, but why does the soul cry?
   An sakhi, veena an, open your soul and sing,
    Dance together round and round--
        Why does the soul cry?
  But leave the lyre, take the song and the gus--
        How will the pain go?
I spend the night in my ears, I wear flower garlands,
        How did the joshna bloom--
             Why does the soul cry?
প্রলয়নাচন নাচলে যখন আপন ভুলে,\nহে নটরাজ,:
When you forget yourself while dancing
O Nataraj, the binding of the knot has fallen off.
            Janhvi therefore looses mad direction in free flow,
                        His waves rose in the music.
    Rabi's light responded to the sky,
Heard the greeting outside the house.
            You are the mother of your stream, your partner is your companion.
                        All-loser is the root of the one who got everything.
প্রাঙ্গণে মোর শিরীষশাখায় ফাগুন মাসে\n:
In the month of Fagun in my head branch in the premises
                      What excitement
     Tireless blooming game.
           A calm and peaceful evening
Every day that flower head looks at me asking questions,
             'What's come--what's come.'

    And every year on this day in the month of Fagun
                   What excitement
           The sound of dancing was heard in Shirish-dal
                  In Swargapur's Kon Nupur Tal.
Every day that fickle soul was purified, listen and see
             'Didn't come--didn't come.'

   When again on such a day
প্রাণ চায় চক্ষু না চায়, মরি একি তোর:
Life wants eyes not want, die alone your shame.
Beauty comes and goes, but who cares for false decorations?
No silent speech in the mouth, silent in the heart.
What a cruel smile in the mouth, but in the heart of the crying!
The money is stinging, but the bed is a bed
In the ocean of reconciliation, the marrow of eternal separation.
প্রাণ ভরিয়ে তৃষা হরিয়ে\nমোরে আরো আরো:
Filled with life and quenched thirst
Give me more and more life.
       But in the world, but in the building
Give me more space.
       More light more light
In this eye, Lord, pour.
       The flute is filled with melody
You give more and more.
       more pain more pain,
Lord, give me more consciousness.
        Break the barrier by running the door
Give me relief, give me relief.
        More love more love
Let me sink down.
        Good luck to you
You donate more and more.
প্রাণে খুশির তুফান উঠেছে।\n ভয়-ভা:
A storm of happiness has arisen in Prana.
        The barrier of fear is broken.
Sadness is hard to embrace today
        Disappeared heart is racing.
This thought was that there would be no place for anyone in Hetha.
        Everyone gathered after breaking the door.
I washed you with care,
        He fell in the dust with joy.
প্রাণে গান নাই, মিছে তাই ফিরিনু যে:
There is no song in my life, so I return
      He finds music in the flute.
Saying goodbye to love
       Whom do you worship?
In the forest, there is fire, but what is the fire?
       Your ashes are in vain - you will die later.
  Hey, turn off your house lights
       What do you think, on the way back, day and night--
The light that falls on the ankhitara in hundreds of streams
     Who gets his eye?
প্রেমানন্দে রাখো পূর্ণ আমারে দিবসরাত।\nব:
Keep me full of love day and night.
I look at you forever beautiful in the world,
Your pitiful look in the moon-sun-rays.
I do in happiness, O drink, but prasadbari,
In distress, I am blessed.
Burn the immortal lamp in life, but eternal hope,
Good morning at your feet at the end of death.
Laho laho mam All joy, all love songs--
You are the only one outside my heart.
প্রেমে প্রাণে গানে গন্ধে আলোকে পুলকে\nপ্:
Love, soul, music, smell, light, pool
Flooded Nikhil Duloke Bhuloke
          Your nectar is dripping.
Today, all the broken parts are closed
Anand wakes up holding the idol,
          Life was filled with intense interest.
Consciousness is my source of well-being
Shatadalsam Futile Param Harshe
          All the honey is at your feet.
The silent light woke up in the heart
Arunkanti of Udar Usha,
          The cover of the lazy eyes was removed.
প্রেমের জোয়ারে ভাসাবে দোঁহারে-- বাঁধন:
Love's tide will float in the mist-- Untie the bonds, give, give, give.
I will forget the thought, I will not look back-- raise the sail, give it, give it, give it.
     Waves rose in the strong wind, hearts fluttered, fluttered, fluttered--
Crazy sailor, forget the telescope - raise the sail, give it give it.
প্রেমের ফাঁদ পাতা ভুবনে।\nকে কোথা ধরা পড়:
The trap of love is in the world.
Who knows who got caught where--
When all pride is broken, Salil flows into the eye.
In this happiness, you only want to take, you don't know to give.
Let's cast the shadow of happiness when it will go, let's get rid of the pain.
When the whistle blows, the pride floats, wears and comes to bind.
বকুলগন্ধে বন্যা এল দখিন-হাওয়ার স্রোতে।\n:
The flood came to Bakulgandh in the south-wind current.
Pushpadhanu, Vasao Tari from Nandanti.
Palashkali wrote your final letter to the side,
Awakened the excitement in the forest mountain.
There is only one seat in the sky--
A message of hope from the daily vile
Leaf by leaf, grass by grass, leaf of new life comes,
Palash Jabaya Kanak-Chapaya Ashoka Aswathe.
বজাও রে মোহন বাঁশি!\nসারা দিবসক:
Play Mohan flute!
All-day longing-burning-sorrow
      Heartbreaking Tiyash Nashi.
Rizh-Mind-Bhedan Flute playing
      What did you learn, ear!--
Hane Thirthi's Maram-Abashkar
      Little honeyed arrows.
Urah Biakulu used to collapse,
      Dhulu Dhulu Asha Nayan.
How many hundreds of years of rheumatism
      Wear it patiently.
How many hopes were not fulfilled, friend,
      How happy Payan was.
Many, many hundreds of sufferings
      Hie barbed arrow.
The heart is bored and the eyes are excited
      Very sweet song.
It is Yamuna-Barim
      Darb
বজ্রমানিক দিয়ে গাঁথা, আষাঢ়, তোমার মালা।\:
Garland with thunderbolts, Ashad, your garland.
The fire of electricity in your beautiful chest.
By your spell the rocks melt, the crops grow--
The desert brings flowers to your feet.
Leaf by leaf, leaf by leaf
Guruguru Megher Madal is playing in your festival.
Bring life to the stream of green beauty
Keep the terrible flood of death on the left.
বড়ো থাকি কাছাকাছি,\n তাই ভয়ে ভয়ে আছি।\:
grow up close
  So I am afraid.
Nayan Bchan where and when
  Don't live if you play, live.
বড়ো বিস্ময় লাগে হেরি তোমারে।\nকোথা হত:
Harry is very surprised to lose you.
Where did you come from?
Why do I love that face and smile so much?
        Why do you float silently in tears?
Let the memory of losing you wake up
You are forever and ever.
If you don't stand up, let's not blow the whistle in the heart--
        As much light as laughter drowns in darkness.
বড়ো বেদনার মতো বেজেছ তুমি হে আমার প্রাণে:
You ring like a great pain in my soul,
The mind knows how the mind thinks.
      I have you in my heart forever.
            I keep looking at my eyes with water in my mouth.
You need big hope, big thirst, big desire
I woke up with great happiness, great sadness, great affection.
      Like this birth, it has become what will happen.
            The mind is swept away by death.
বঁধু, তোমায় করব রাজা তরুতলে,\nবনফুলের বি:
My friend, I will make you a king,
I will give a garland of wild flowers.
    To get a hearty god to put on the throne,
         I will introduce you to Ankhijal.
বাঁধু, মিছে রাগ কোরো না, কোরো না।\nমম:
Bandhu, don't be angry, don't be angry.
Mm mind understand mind see mind mind--remember, have mercy.
      I can't keep you
      So I stay close to you--
      I smile in my face, I want to cry in my heart - he is not my trick.
      Day's meeting, Tilake's happiness,
      Just a smile for a moment--
      In the blink of an eye, there is the pain of eternal birth in the chest.
      Why are you so sadhadhi?
      Why do I cry in the dark?
      After coming back from far away, I want to fail.
বঁধুয়া, অসময়ে কেন হে প্রকাশ।\nসকলই যে স:
Bandhuya, why untimely revelation O Prakash.
Everyone is believing that it is a dream.
You are the star of heaven, lost when you die--
When you forget, tears are smiles of joy.
বঁধুয়া, হিয়া-'পর আও রে!\nমিঠি মিঠি হাসয়:
Bandhua, hia-'after come!
Sweet sweet smile, soft honey speech, my face - 'After you want!
Yug-yug-sam how many days have passed, Shyam, tu aoli na--
Chanda-Uzor Madhu-Madhur Kunj-'Then don't play the murli!
Loi Goli Sath Bayanak Has Re, Loi Goli Nayan-Ananda!
Zero Kunjban, empty heart, heart and mouth!
Ethi was eager gop-nayanjal, there was talk and laughter!
It was a silent flute, there was talk and then flute!
Tuzh mukhai wants the end of centuries of misery.
Lesh smiled and removed the huge regret.
Blessed are you, Bhanu Gahiche, his lover is not.
বনে এমন ফুল ফুটেছে,\nমান ক'রে থাকা আজ কি:
Such a flower bloomed in the forest,
What is the style of staying in the standard today?
By shedding the dignity
Let's go to Kunjmazh.
Today, the cuckoo sang the moment,
That flute sounds in Kanan.
What's the style of staying in the standard today?
Today, honey is mixed with honey, paranbandhu
There in the moonlight.
What's the style of staying in the standard today?
বন্ধু, রহো রহো সাথে\nআজি এ সঘন শ্রাবণপ্র:
Friends, stay with us
Aji is in the thick of hearing.
Were you in my dream the night I lost my partner?
Friends, time is wasted.
