             That foot is your king
       Behind everyone, below everyone, among everyone.
When I bow to you, I stop wherever my bow goes.
       Where your feet are under shame
            I do not bow down there
       Behind everyone, below everyone, among everyone.
           Pride does not reach where you are
                  Riktbhushan din poor dress
       Behind all, below all, among all.
Dhane means where there is abundance, I hope for your company.
যারা কথা দিয়ে তোমার কথা বলে\nতারা:
Those who talk about you
They only build a fence of words, group after group.
        One thing
        can't understand
        Meaning the more the meaning of words increases.
Those who don't talk and play only tunes
All of them are close to each other.
        Do you understand or not?
        not looking for him,
        The pain is at your feet.
যারা কাছে আছে তারা কাছে থাক্‌, তারা তো প:
Those who are close, stay close, they cannot know--
  You are closer to my heart than them.
Let those who speak say, I will not turn anyone away--
  They do not know that life is full of unspoken words.
  You are destined to be silent in my silent heart.
O Lord, I will not ask anyone to leave your path.
  As much love as there is, all the love is in you.
  Loved by all, but love is in my heart.
Lose your bonds with everyone as if this is always my sadhan--
  Everyone can be together as if in mind but to bring worship.
    everyone
যারা বিহান-বেলায় গান এনেছিল আমার মনে:
Those who brought music to my mind in the morning
    In the evening, they slowly meet in the shadows.
    Sitting alone on the banks of the road to Hetha,
Today they came around the door of my dreams.
Surhara all the pain as they come back to find him.
Hour after hour goes by, just sitting and counting
    The sound of the garland of silent chanting echoes through the darkness.
যাহা পাও তাই লও, হাসিমুখে ফিরে যাও,\nকা:
Take what you get, go back with a smile,
Whom you want, why you want-- who can fulfill hope.
Hardly wants, who gets.  The family is gone--
Whoever laughs, whoever cries, whoever lies at the door.
যিনি সকল কাজের কাজী মোরা তাঁরি কাজের:
He who is the doer of all works is his partner in work.
Whose multi-colored color, the color of Mora Hari juice.
           His great rhythm
           Mora goes happily,
The way he plays the flute, the way he dances.
           In this birth-death game
           At the Mora Milli Hari Mela,
This life of sorrow and happiness is the beginning of my playing.
           He called her Yabe
           His Jalad-Mandra Rabe
On the forked foot of the holiday path, the sea passes through the longi.
যুগে যুগে বুঝি আমায় চেয়েছিল সে।\n:
He wanted me for ages.
       He is sitting on the side of my path.
Today, why do you remember me in the corner of my eyes?
          I saw it in the open air--
       He is sitting on the side of my path.
Today that moon will be welcomed with the music of light,
       The darkness of the night's face will open with a hint.
    That light will be seen in a blink of an eye,
          All the covers will go that fall.
       He is sitting on the side of my path.
যে আমারে দিয়েছে ডাক, দিয়েছে ডাক,\n:
Who called me, called me,
        I was speechless.
        I know the name
  Ogo Tari Namkhani stay in my heart.
    I am divorced
        I do penance in the jewelry of the heart.
    Let us be pure in the pub of sorrow
        What is dirty in the heart is blocked--
    The opening of the insulting nagini.
যে কেবল পালিয়ে বেড়ায়, দৃষ্টি এড়ায়,:
That only runs away, avoids sight, calls out at a hint,
Did he catch the scent-filled spring in this music today?
         He rose to his northern Ashokashakha.
         Today, in Palashvan, the color of the bull is raised.
         Does he fall on his feet in the manner of Mallika.
  No go no, did not catch, floated away with a sigh full of laughter.
Miche forgets his mind with this swaying, he goes through the waves in his dreams.
         He hides himself in the empty night of parting,
         To find his ever-awakening seat behind the eye-
যে ছায়ারে ধরব বলে করেছিলেম পণ\nআজ সে মেন:
I bet that I will catch the shadow
Today he accepted the bond of my song.
      In the sky, whose side meets the fleeting beauty of autumn clouds
          Today I hear his hum in his own voice.
      In the air of a lazy day
Gandakhani could match the secret comings and goings.
      Today in the shade of autumn my Ragini met,
           He plays the kankan to the rhythm of that union.
যে ছিল আমার স্বপনচারিণী\n:
That was my dream girl
                  I could not understand him
                      The days have passed in search.
            If you call me good luck,
               Shame covers me,
                      I was able to understand you easily.
Who will return to me with disrespect,
    Who will call me closer,
         Whose love's pain is worth me,
             I can't cope with this constant doubt--
                I could only understand you.
যে তরণীখানি ভাসালে দুজনে আজি, হে নবীন সং:
The two of you who floated in Taranikhani, O new world,
He is the one who is the backbone of this world.
Kalparabara who is doing forever is uninterrupted
        Today is the day of good fortune.
Take the path of eternal life, take it full of goodness.
In happiness, sadness, grief, darkness, light, go in search of nectar.
Don't be bound by laziness, go through the storm with a smile,
        Let your love spread across the country and the world.
যে থাকে থাক-না দ্বারে, যে যাবি য:
Those who stay do not stay at the door, those who go cannot go.
If that morning bird calls your name, I call you
           You go alone.
The buds want to drink the juice of the dew in the dark night.
Nisha does not want blooming flowers, her thirst for light in her life,
           He cries in the dark.
যে দিন ফুটল কমল কিছুই জানি নাই,\n:
The day the lotus blossomed I knew nothing,
            I was of a different mind.
I did not bring it to him,
            He stayed in the company.
     Sometimes hia is anxious
     He was surprised to see the dream,
     Smells like bad honey
            Where in the south?
Wow, that aroma brings back nostalgia
            Take me home.
As if in search of her up and out of breath
            The world is in a new spring.
     Who knows, he is not far away.
     Amari Go Amari is that
     Alas, this honey has bloomed
            My heart's desire
যে দিন সকল মুকুল গেল ঝরে\nআমায় ডাকলে:
The day when all the buds fell
Why do you call me like that?
        The path to go is covered with dry leaves,
        Can I fill my empty branch with flowers?
        Songs are in my heart
What does your flute say?
        No arrangements, no wealth, no cover, no cover--
        This empty arm will bind you in my arms.
যে ধ্রুবপদ দিয়েছ বাঁধি বিশ্বতানে\n:
The constants you have given bind me to the universe
     We will meet in the song of life.
The sky is still bright blue - in the heart there is a match,
     Peaceful deep words in the silent soul.
     Usha Nishitkul plays the hymns
     My new hope will wake up with that sound.
As simple as a flower, the dawn will rise to the full,
     Sandhya mam knows how to die with that tune.
সকরুণ বেণু বাজায়ে কে যায় বিদেশী নায়ে,\n:
Who goes to the foreigner in the sad Benu Bajaye,
  She felt angry.
    That sound floats out of whose far-off distant hearer
      Unknown pain, in the sea's impatient bay
                           In the shade of the forest
Hearing that, Aji Bijan is heartbroken
  Bhairavi, wet with autumn dew, rings silently.
    The image brings to mind light and song -- as if on a deserted riverbed
      Who is walking with lazy feet to fill the pitcher with water
                           In the shade of the forest
সকলকলুষতামসহর, জয় হোক তব জয়--\n অমৃতবার:
Sokkalushtamsahar, may victory be victory--
  Do Amritbari irrigation
  Great peace, great power, great virtue, great love.
Let Timirrati be destroyed by Jnansurya-Udaya-Vati--
  Dispel the nightmares with misery.
  Mohmlin ultra-dourdin-shankit-chit Panth
  Complicated-gahan-passage-doubt-perplexity.
Merciful, Magi Sharan-- the terrible Karha Haran,
  Give the identity of freedom from suffering.
সকল ভয়ের ভয় যে তারে কোন্‌ বিপদে কাড়বে?\n:
Fear of all fears that will bite him in any danger?
    When will he leave the life that is tied to life?
Otherwise, everything will be floating in that abyss,
    The profit after all losses will only increase.
With happiness, brother, I live in fear, there is a way he gives--
    Sadness is the happiness of the rest who will shake the happiness?
The one who read at the end of the reading found a place on the floor,
    The fear is over, he is alive - who will carry him?
সকল হৃদয় দিয়ে ভালোবেসেছি যারে সে কি:
I loved with all my heart, to whom he can return the love!
I live outside the world, I don't know what happens in the world.
         Who knows who he wants to die for
         I don't know if he gets it or not.
         I came to the heart of the unknown because of fear.
         I love all of you - that Rupashi,
         That game, that song, that sweet smile.
         My life is covered with that.
         Where is your limit in the middle of the world?
সকলেরে কাছে ডাকি আনন্দ-আলয়ে থ:
Calling everyone to be happy
                    Distribute the nectar.
          Paya Anant Pran Jagat Gahiche song
                   Wandering in the sky.
          The sun does not want to rest in the empty path,
                   With relatives.
          The constellations run with endless balls of Lovia,
                   The rays are moving in all directions.
          Paya Amritadhara Nava Nava Graha Tara
                   Bikshiya got up and watched
          Awakens new life, Chi
সকালবেলার আলোয় বাজে বিদায়ব্যথার ভৈরবী--\:
In the morning light, the pain of farewell is bad--
           And your flute, come poet.
Dew with the fragrance of dewy autumn leaves
   Leave the song in the longing air, no if there is no rose, Lord.
        Such dawn will come again on the golden horizon,
               Kunder dul Seemante.
In the shadow of the doves, the green is soft and sweet
         The beauty of your song
                    This picture will wake up again.
সখা, আপন মন নিয়ে কাঁদিয়ে মরি, পরের ম:
Friend, die crying with your mind, what will happen with the next mind.
If you don't understand your mind, who will understand the next mind?
I return to my mind with a senseless mind, desire cries in my heart, and laughs--
If you want to give this mind, why do you want to take it?
Know everything in your heart as a dream, you have no one in this tribhuvan--
Why are you returning to the person who is returning to his home?
Nayan meli only see, with heart only find peace--
He does not want to look at you and stay in your heart.
সখি লো, সখি লো, নিকরুণ মাধব মথুরাপুর:
Sakhi lo, Sakhi lo, Nikrun Madhav goes to Mathurapur Barley
Karol Bisham Pan Manini Radha will not cry, will not stop.
        Hard-hiya sai hasayi hasayyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyy
Aol Madha walks gently, Radha weaves and drinks.
Chahoi Rahal Sa Chahoi Rahal, Danda Danda Sakhi, Chahoi Rahal--
        Evil is evil, the eyes of Sakhi Nayne Bahl Bin Bin Bin Dhar.
Baithal smiles gently, says Shyam in such a soft and sweet language!
Tutei Gail Pan, Tutil Man, Gadagad Akul Baikul Pran,
Fukroyi Uchsoyi cried Radha-- Gadagad Bhash Nikashal Aadha--
Shyamak legs crossed arms
সখী, আঁধারে একেলা ঘরে মন মানে না।\nকিস:
Sakhi, the mind does not mind alone in the dark.
He who is thirsty for anything does not know the way.
    Go to the clear water, the deep whale, the clear water
    As if whose words Kavu brings to his ears - Kavu does not bring.
সখী, আমারি দুয়ারে কেন আসিল\n নিশ:
Sakhi, why did you come to my door?
       Yogi is a beggar at Nishivhor.
     Why did the harp play in a pitiful voice?
I come whenever I see his face,
     Think whether I will call him or not.
Shravane Andhar-dishi Sarate Bimal Nishi,
     The south wind in spring, the flourishing forest--
How many songs are sung by Niti Niti
     The mind does not work, it floats in the ankhijal.
সখী, প্রতিদিন হায় এসে ফিরে যায় কে।\nত:
Sakhi, every day comes and goes back.
Give him a yolk of my head.
If Shudhaya gave any flowers,
I swear, don't say my name.
Sakhi he comes and sits in the dust under the taru
Place the seats there.
The pity he evokes in his pitiful eyes--
It's like he can't say what he wants to say.
সখী, ভাবনা কাহারে বলে। সখী, যাতনা:
Sakhi, Bhavana Kaare says.   Sakhi, Yatna Kaare says.
You say Divas-Rajni 'love' 'love'--
Sakhi, how many love!  Is he just suffering?
Is he only tears?  Is he just the breath of sorrow?
But people do not expect such misery.
             Everyone is beautiful in my eyes,
Everyone is young, everyone is beautiful, the sky is blue, Kanan is green,
The details are beautiful, the yolk is soft -- all are like me.
They only laugh, only sing, want to die laughing--
He doesn't know pain, he doesn't know crying, he doesn't know the suffering of a saint.
The flower is a smile
সখী, সে গেল কোথায়, তারে ডেকে নিয়ে:
Sakhi, where did he go, call him and bring him.
          I will stand around the wire.
Today in this sweet evening among the flowers
          He will laugh and laugh, I will see him.
The stars are shining in the sky, the wind is blowing in the south,
          The bird sang sleepily.
  Come with the joyous, sweet spring
    Enjoy the beauty, coolness.
সঙ্কোচের বিহ্বলতা নিজের অপমান,\n:
The embarrassment of shyness is self-inflicted,
            Don't imagine the crisis, Mariaman.
Free yourself from fear, take strength within you, conquer yourself.
            Protect the weak, attack the wicked,
            Don't know how to help yourself.
Free yourself from fear, don't rely on self-doubt.
            Religion when the conch shell will call
            Be silent, humble, bet your life.
Free yourself from fear, give yourself a hard identity in difficult work.
সংসার যবে মন কেড়ে লয়, জাগে না যখন প্রাণ:
When the world takes away the mind, when the soul does not wake up,
    Even then, O Nath, love sits near you and sings.
Introvert, forgiveness is the vain gift of my empty mind--
    Worship without flowers, worship without devotion.
    But call the name in a dry voice, hope earnestly--
    If the juicy rain of intense love comes down to the mind.
Soon you will fill yourself with your nectar,
    With this hope, I give an empty heart under my feet.
সংসারে কোনো ভয় নাহি নাহি--\nওরে ভয়চঞ্চল:
There is no fear in the world...
O fearful soul, scarce in life and death
      I am at his door.
Abhayasankha sounds pure amber and solemn,
Dishi Dishi Divanishi mourns happily
      People to people
সংসারে তুমি রাখিলে মোরে যে ঘরে\n সে:
In the world you put me in the house
      In that room Lord forgot all the sorrows.
Taking pity on Nishidin
      Keep one of its doors open.
In all my work in all my leisure
At the gate of that door you entered,
From there, the air is expelled from the heart
      Just remove the dust from the feet.
As shelter crumbles, husband,
      Staying in a shelter is like chit lagia.
I always bear that passion
      Dagia gives a name repeatedly in the chest.
When sadness comes to life
At your command let him bring,
No matter how harsh words hurt
      In all the blows, the sound woke up.
সজনি সজনি রাধিকা লো দেখ অবহুঁ চাহিয়া,\:
Dear Radhika, look at me.
Mridulgaman Shyam Awe Mridul Gan Gahiya.
Pinah bright yellow, Pinah blue clothes.
Sinthi Karah Rangiya by Sundari Sindur Deke.
Sahchari all dance and sing together,
Chanchal Manjiraab Kunjgagan chao re.
Sajni, of Uzar', lit the lamp of the temple,
Suravi Karah Kunjabhavan Gandhsalil Dhalia.
Mallika Chameli Beli Kusum Tulah Girl,
Ganth Yuthi, Ganth Jati, Ganth Bakulmalika.
Trishitanayan Bhanusingha Kunjapatham Chahiya--
Mridulgaman Shyam Awe Mridul Song Gahiya.
সতিমির রজনী, সচকিত সজনী শূন্য নিকুঞ্জ:
Satimir rajni, sachkit sajni zero nikunja-aranya.
Kalaitamalaye, Subijan Niloye Bala Birahabishanna.
Stars float in the blue sky, Yamuna sings.
Padap-Marmar, Nijhar-Jharjhar, Susumit Ballibitan.
Thirsty eyes on the forest path--
Don't look at it, turn your eyes, tie the flowers!
Soon Radha Chahal is chakkit, distant khepal mala--
Kahal sajni, hear flute playing, kunje aol kala.
The flute was playing in a distant and distant direction.
Kantha Milaol Dhaldhal Yamuna Kalkal Kallolgan.
Vane Bhanu, of Sun Go Kanu, Piasi
সত্য মঙ্গল প্রেমময় তুমি, ধ্রুবজ্যোতি তুম:
True goodness loving you, constant light you in the dark.
You are always by the side of those whose hearts are filled with sorrow--
              All sorrow is on that side.
In your knowledge, in your meditation, how sweet is the name
              A devotee knows,
       You tell the one who knows.
  Oh, tell him who knows.
সব কাজে হাত লাগাই মোরা সব কাজেই।\n:
I put my hand in all the work.
        There is no barrier.
I see, I understand, I just try to break it down.
   Mora travels in all countries in all kinds of clothes.
        Win or lose, win or lose--
  If I give up then I will die of shame.
       With the strength of our hands we lift and create,
          We build a house with our lives, we live in it.
সব দিবি কে সব দিবি পায়, আ য় আ য় আ য়।:
Who gives all, gets all.
The call is heard, 'Ay, ay, ay'.
    He will come in a golden chariot-- Jagbi who is on the empty road
    Paush-Rajni is hoping for him, ay ay ay.
For a moment only his game, ha ha ha ha ha ha.
Then it's time for him to go, ha ha ha ha ha ha.
    When Jagbi leaves, Dhanratan will be understood--
    The liability to be borne,
সবার মাঝারে তোমারে স্বীকার করিব হে।\n:
I will acknowledge you among all.
         In the midst of all, you are in my heart.
         Not only in your mind, not in the corner of your house,
Not only in your works--where your glory shines
         I will acknowledge you in the midst of all that.
         Dhulok forget your heart.
         I will accept all sacrifices to you.
         Accept all and bless you.
         Not only in your praise, not only in music,
Not only in the seat of solitary meditation--but where the world is awake,
         There you are in action
সবার সাথে চলতেছিল অজানা এই পথের অন্ধকারে:
Walked with everyone in the darkness of this unknown path,
In the sudden morning light, I saw him next to me.
  In an instant the night became the dawn, the eternal treasure is mine,
    The end of the identity is as if there is no place at all--
       Known saffron blooms on the edge of this unknown jewel forest
                  In the darkness of this unknown path.
    I know that at the end of the day, sunset will descend in the middle of the path--
When will the cover fall again, the bond of care will not be there.
           Then I will get a glimpse of identity in my mind moment by moment
    I will know that I am walking in the light of darkness on the path of eternity--
সভায় তোমার থাকি সবার শাসনে,\nআমার কণ:
In the meeting, I am your rule,
My voice trembled with terror.
          All the people look
I could not see with my eyes
Where are you laughing in your seat?
          When will I lose this shame,
Will sit in the privacy of your lonely house.
          which is to be heard
Gob near that foot,
Listen from behind the door or no one listens.
সময় কারো যে নাই, ওরা চলে দলে দলে--\n:
No one has time, they go in groups--
     Alas, the song drowns in the noise.
           How many feats are written in stone, they will be very proud.
           Goes and wants to drink flute and laugh.
I know the work of the world
      You listen to my song.
          I stir the darkness when I pick up the stars
               Listen to that in silence but in the blue sky.
সমুখেতে বহিছে তটিনী, দুটি তারা আকাশে ফ:
Tatini is out in front, two stars are bursting in the sky.
                 Parimal Lutia in the wind
        A faint smile is falling from the darkness of the evening.
            The day bids farewell, the Yamuna laments--
                 In the evening, Lutia is crying on her legs.
        Come, my friend, I call you-- I sit in the mud,
            Look at the water in the sky and watch the water play.
                 Ankhi-'Later the stars will rise one by one.
সর্ব খর্বতারে দহে তবে ক্রোধদাহ--\nহে ভৈর:
In spite of everything, anger is burning.
O Bhairav, give strength, devotee-drink.
Remove Maharudra, that which impresses, that which is small--
  In death, the little soul will be encouraged.
   Amrit will rise in the churning of sorrow,
    Those who are afraid of death will be saved from fear.
But the bright sun will melt away
    The stream of unchained sacrifice.
সহজ হবি, সহজ হবি, ওরে মন, সহজ হবি--\nকাছ:
Be easy, be easy, oh mind, be easy--
You are far away from those who keep close things away.
Why don't you want to donate your two hands? I want the donor to--
    You give easily and you take everything easily.
    Be easy, be easy, oh mind, be easy--
    Poet, come out of your words.
There is a world beyond all words to get the heart,
    Dawn and sun are looking at silent flowers.
সহসা ডালপালা তোর উতলা যে, ও চাঁপা,:
As soon as the branches are upside down, they are strained, they will do it!
      I don't know who you saw in the sky.
What melody comes and floats in the air, and it is pressed, and it will be done!
      I don't know whose dancing is bad.
                You are surprised every now and then.
           An unknown thought arises in your mind.
What color matan got up swinging, swelling and straining, and Karbi!
              I don't know who dressed up in colorful clothes.
সহে না যাতনা।\n দিবস গণিয়া গণিয়া বি:
Don't go along.
      Divas Gania Gania rare
Nishidin sitting just looking for a way to drink--
          Friend, don't come.
          Don't go along
      Day goes, night goes, everything goes--
          I sit down!
      No ball in the body, no sleep in the eyes--
      Ankhizal has dried up.
One by one all hopes are dashed--
           Don't go along
সাধ ক'রে কেন, সখা, ঘটাবে গেরো।\n এই:
Sadh Kare Ken, Sakha, will do it.
      This time mean-mane fero fero.
          There is no eyelash on the leaf of the eye,
Is your mind on the expense account,--
      Laughter is tied to life.
          Friends, come back.
সারা বরষ দেখি নে, মা, মা তুই আমার কেমন ধ:
Don't see me all year, mother, mother, how are you doing to me?
I lost my eyes and became blind.
     Eli ki Pashani Ore.  I will see you with my eyes full--
     Nothing stops that, mother, the stream of burning eyes.
সার্থক জনম আমার জন্মেছি এই দেশে।\n স:
Sarthak Janam I was born in this country.
     Sarthak Janam, Mother Go, I love you.
I don't know whether you have riches or not like a queen.
I only know that my body is growing in your shadow.
I don't know in what forest the flowers are so eager to smell,
     In which sky does the moon rise with such a smile.
Your light first met my eyes,
     Keep your eyes on that light.
সীমার মাঝে, অসীম, তুমি বাজাও আপন সুর--\n:
Within limits, infinite, you play your tune--
Your manifestation in me is so sweet.
How many colors, how many smells, how many songs, how many rhythms
Arup, the beauty of your form awakens the heart.
Your beauty is so sweet in me.
When you meet me, everything opens up.
The world ocean swells and sways.
If there is no shadow in your light, he finds it in me.
She is beautiful in my tears.
Your beauty is so sweet in me.
সুখে আমায় রাখবে কেন, রাখো তোমার কোলে।\n:
Why keep me happily, keep me in your arms.
      Let happiness burn.
Let not the ground under your feet, when you hold the knot--
      Pick it up and swing it with the swing of that arm.
      Where I build a house, let me come.
      If you float, I want salvation.
I have given up, my fear is over--- your victory is my victory
      I'll catch you, I'll catch you if that's the case.
সুখের মাঝে তোমায় দেখেছি,\n দ:
I saw you in happiness,
             I found you in sorrow.
I lost you and kept you secret,
             Get it again and lose it again.
Eternal life is my harp-string
You hurt again and again,
That's why I have different tunes
              I took your heart in my heart.
Today I am not afraid anymore
              If Leela runs out, Hethakar.
New light in new darkness
Take if or in New Sindhupar
But you are my you--
             I will know you again.
সুন্দর বটে তব অঙ্গদখানি তারায় তারায় খচ:
It is beautiful, but the limbs are full of stars--
      I know the beauty of gold and jewels, written in colors.
The sword is more attractive to you, drawn with curved lightning
Garuda's fan blood is like a cow in the sky due to Ravi's anger.
  The burning pain of the final awakening of life--
  Instantly curdled whatever is there is intense intense consciousness.
    It is beautiful, but the limbs are full of stars--
The sword is yours, O God, Vajrapani, composed in the utmost beauty.
সুন্দর হৃদিরঞ্জন তুমি নন্দনফুলহার,\n:
Beautiful Hridiranjan, you are beautiful,
    You are eternal new spring in my heart.
        Blue amber kisses, Dharani charms the feet,
          A hundred times as the music echoes around the region.
How many rays of light are shining, the smell of flowers in the pool--
   Dazzling rhythm in the limbs.
       A hundred bonds of meaning are torn by you--
           Let the flower sandalwood of the heart be a gift.
সুন্দরের বন্ধন নিষ্ঠুরের হাতে ঘুচাবে কে:
Who will break the bond of the beautiful in the hands of the cruel.
Who will wipe the tears of the helpless in the eyes of the afflicted?
     Vasundhara is saddened by Hero's tears,
     Poisoned by the onslaught of injustice--
            In the oppression of the strong
         Who will save the weak.
Whose mercy will you call the insulter?
সুমঙ্গলী বধূ, সঞ্চিত রেখো প্রাণে স্নেহম:
Sumangali Bhudu, save the life sweet.  Aha
    Be thou true in love, be steadfast in mercy--
             Be calm in happiness and sadness with a smile on your face.
    Be victorious in injury, benevolent in steadfast patience.  oh
             Let's listen to the words of wisdom,
    May peace be spread on all sides with the virtue of gracious humility--
             Forgive me, family.
        As if the pride of the material does not detract from the soul.
    As the mind knows, it mocks tomorrow's riches--
However, the dust should not cover the eyes forever.  oh
সুর ভুলে যেই ঘুরে বেড়াই কেবল কাজে\n:
Forget the music and wander around only for work
     The rebuke of your eyes hurts in the chest.
Udhao Akash is generous and full of blue-blue-sudhya
     Far away from matching, Parash doesn't match them that-
     The rebuke of your eyes hurts in the chest.
     The world that blows in the wind of that melody
     My mind wanders.
I have no place in the world to put you here.
     Lose the meeting place in your midst--
     The rebuke of your eyes hurts in the chest.
সুরের গুরু, দাও গো সুরের দীক্ষা-\nমোরা:
Master of melody, give initiation to melody.
This is our alms, the lamentation of Mora's tune.
      Mandakini Dhara, Ushar Shuktara,
      Kanakchampa learned the music in his ear.
      Fill your heart with your tune
      I will go where Besur is bad everyday.
      Whirlwind wakes up at the speed of noise,
      Take my harp test there.
সে আসে ধীরে,\n যায় লাজে ফিরে।\:
He comes slowly,
          Goes back to shame.
Riniki Riniki Rinijhini Manju Manju Manjire
          Rinizhini-Jhinnire.
Bikach Neepkunje Nibirtimirpunje
The scent of flowers comes to the inner temple
          Mad Sameer
Afraid Chit Trembling over, region flying fickle.
Blooming grasses, tinkling forest songs--
Komalpadapallabatalchumbit dharanire
          Nikunjakutira
সে কোন্‌ পাগল যায় যায় পথে তোর, যায় চল:
He is a madman who goes your way, goes on that lonely night--
      Call him or call him in your yard.
The words of a distant land and those who go say, Alas, who understands them--
            What tune is playing at once?
            Will it be tomorrow morning or not?
                     Why did you get a seat in vain?
           Bandhan-khera festival
           The song that he should sing
                   In honor of the new light.
সে দিন আমায় বলেছিলে আমার সময় হয় নাই--\nফ:
That day you told me I didn't have time--
If you go back, that's it.
      It's still time to play -- Mallika's fair in the forest,
      Falling raining wind is always up.
Today is the day of Hemant
Kuhilibilin, without bhushan.
      There is no time left, is it time to--
      At the end of the day, I want to sit at the door and drink.
সেদিন দুজনে দুলেছিনু বনে, ফুলডোরে বাঁধ:
On that day, both of them were hanging in the forest.
  Don't forget that memory.
That day there was in the air, you know--my mind's delirium,
  Compared to your smile spreading in the sky.
  On the way, the full moon rose in the sky.
  It was seen in you what I know what Maha lagna.
Now it is not my time anymore, outside alone is the burden of sorrow--
  Don't open the rakhi that Bandhinu wears, don't open it.
সে যে পথিক আমার,\n হৃদয়পথের পথিক আম:
He is my guide,
      I am the traveler of the heart.
  Alas, he did not come, did not come,
         It did not come this way.
      And he didn't want water.
  My heart is a desert,
               His juice dried up--
  He didn't want, didn't want, didn't want water.
সে যে পাশে এসে বসেছিল, তবু জাগি নি।\:
She sat next to him, but did not wake up.
What sleep did you get poor thing?
      Came in the silent night, harp in hand--
      A deep ragini played in the middle of the dream.
I wake up and see the south wind, driving me crazy
Its smell floats in the darkness.
      Why does my wax go, can't get close--
      Why didn't he put his necklace on his chest?
সে যে বাহির হল আমি জানি,\nবক্ষে আমার ব:
I know that he is out.
The words of his path sound in my chest.
      Where and when did he come to the seashore, at the end of the forest,
          The sky whispers that word.
Alas, I live so far away,
I don't know how many times he has to come.
      I covered the whole way, leaving it to me.
          May his feet fall in my pain.
সে যে মনের মানুষ, কেন তারে বসিয়ে রাখি:
He is a man of the heart, why do you put him in the eyes?
        Do not cry inside your chest, let the eyes float to the eyes.
When the light goes out, the night comes, place this seat in your heart--
        He will come in the darkness of separation.
        In his secret way of coming and going
        He will come and go as he likes.
No matter what you say to tie the wire, it doesn't stay, there is a tie--
        Only you are bound in that bond.
সেই তো আমি চাই--\n সাধনা যে শেষ হবে ম:
That's what I want--
  I have no idea that the pursuit will end.
It's not about the fruit, but it's a mystery who will bear it--
  As a result, the fruit is thrown into the dust and the flower blooms again.
      This is how the infinite confusion in my life,
      Daily new pursuits daily pain!
As soon as I get it, I throw it away, and I join hands again--
  It is not enough to give daily, so is taking daily.
সেই তো তোমার পথের বঁধু সেই তো।\nদূর কুস:
That is your friend.
It is the honey that brings the smell of distant yolk.
        That's your roadblock.
This light is his darkness, this is there or not.
সেই তো বসন্ত ফিরে এল, হৃদয়ের বসন্ত কোথ:
The spring has returned, where is the spring of the heart?
All desert, Malay-Anil came and cried and went back alas.
      How many flowers were in the heart, they fell, the hope dried up--
                Birds fly in different directions.
            In dead spring covered with dried leaves,
                I'm going to die.
                       Furile all.
      The gentle smile of the dawn, the beauty of flowers, will return?
            Kiba Jochana Futit Re, Kiba Jamini--
All are lost, all are gone, life is lost
সেই ভালো, মা, সেই ভালো।\n থা:
That's good, mother, that's good.
             May your mantra, may your--
        No more work, no work, no work...
No no no--read the mantra you, read your mantra--
                         There is no way left.
                He will come, he will come, he will come,
My life-death will come to the limit.
           Panth will arrive in the intense night,
I will light the lamp with heartburn--
           He will come, and he will come.
সেই ভালো সেই ভালো, আমারে নাহয় না জানো।:
That's good, that's good, I don't know.
    You won't be sad if you go away, why should you feel ashamed when you are close?
I like the sound of the spring, the shadow of Benuban is sweet--
       Don't stay in such a smell - the meeting place of the widow is decorated.
    I secretly saw the play of expressions in your anxious eyes.
    Concave forehead, yellow hair, seen during the storm.
I don't have to tell you what I mean--
    Longing for the unspoken words playing my flute.
সোনার পিঞ্জর ভাঙিয়ে আমার প্রাণের পাখিট:
Let the bird of my life fly by breaking the golden cage.
He does not sing Hetha song!   He no longer wants me!
Whose call he heard from far Canaan--
               Let the bird fly.
When I opened my eyes, my sad dreams disappeared.
He tied his arms with laughter and tears
Tearing your heart out crying oh oh oh
               Sadh's dreams are gone.
He who goes goes, does not want to return, he who stays only does yah yah--
The water of the eyes dries up in the eyes -- hope hides in the heart.
can bind
স্বপন যদি ভাঙিলে রজনীপ্রভাতে\n পূর্ণ:
If the dream is broken in the dawn
     Fill it with blessings.
        Put me to work.
        Renew this life.
Open my door and call me to your house.
স্বপনে দোঁহে ছিনু কী মোহে, জাগার বেলা হল:
Dohhe chinu ki mohe in dreams, it's time to wake up--
          Say the last word before you go.
            Give something like that in return
            The pain will be excruciating--
            Forever in my mind
       Goodbye, if you dig, you will draw easily.
Nimeshahara is like dawn
   Will rise far away in Birhakashval.
           This is the last cry at the end of Rajneesh
           The strings of the lyre fell and tied,
           A lost gem is bound in dreams--
      O Birhini, open the farewell door with your own hands.
স্বপ্নে আমার মনে হল কখন ঘা দিলে আমার:
In my dream I thought when a blow came to my door, Alas.
      I didn't wake up, I didn't wake up,
          You meet in the dark, alas.
            In the unconscious mind, there is a humming sound,
          The shadow of Kampil forest is in the shadows.
      I didn't wake up, I didn't wake up, the river can be a forest.
          The traveler came home at two o'clock.
            I don't know if the silent harp played in the poem--
                  Don't wake up, don't wake up.
              The smell of the forest was surrounded by the edge of sleep.
স্বরূপ তাঁর কে জানে, তিনি অনন্ত মঙ্গল--\:
Who knows His form, He is eternal goodness--
The eternal world is in that great ocean.
He is absorbed in his incomparable majesty--
Searching for him, fruitless Veda Vedanta.
Parabrahma, Absolute, Supreme--
He is the original cause, He is the past.
স্বর্ণবর্ণে সমুজ্জ্বল নব চম্পাদলে\nবন্দি:
Shining golden nava champadale
Bandiva at the feet of Sri Munindra.
The air full of virtue is fragrant,
I am holding his feet in garlands.
স্বামী, তুমি এসো আজ অন্ধকার হৃদয়মাঝ--\n:
Husband, you come today in the middle of the dark heart--
  I am ashamed of sin, I call you.
Crying is rising in the soul, mind does not mean peace,
  He does not know the way in his darkness.
Dhik Dhik Janam Maam, failed affairs--
  Failed momentary love is broken again and again.
The heart melts in grief, tears flow in the eyes,
  The thirst for the subject has increased to the point of intoxication.
হবে জয়, হবে জয়, হবে জয় রে,\n ওহে:
There will be victory, there will be victory, there will be victory.
        O brave O fearless.
The victorious soul is eternal, the victorious rejoicing,
Winning love, winning weakness, winning Jyotirmoy Re.
    This darkness will decay, it will decay,
        O brave, O fearless.
Give up sleep, sweet eyes, get rid of fatigue,
Be the light of hope.
হম, সখি, দারিদ নারী।\nজনম অবধি হম পীরিত:
Hum, Sakhi, poor woman.
Janam upti ham piriti karnu, mochnu lochanbari.
Form nahi mam, nahi nahi guna, dukhini Ahir jati--
I don't know what luxury-style youth is soiled--
Abla woman, I know how to live with a small heart.
Ek Nimikh Paul Nirkhi Shyam Johnny, Soi Bahut Kari Mani.
Kunjapathe jab nirkhi sajni hum, shamak charanak chini
Hundreds of berries dust chumbi sakhi, ratan pai janu dina.
My god, what do you ask for in this miserable world?
Janam-abhagi upekhita hum bahut nahi kari as--
Far away I will lose my form, far away I will hear the flute,
stay far away
হরষে জাগো আজি, জাগো রে তাঁহার সাথে,\n:
Harshe wake up today, wake up with him,
     Alone with him in love.
The sky is a hero with divine eyes
  Which great man wakes up in Mahayoga--
    Nikhil Kale Jade Jibe Jagat
      In the body, in the soul, in the heart.
হল না লো, হল না, সই, হায়--\nমরমে মরমে লু:
Come on, come on, come on, come on--
Secretly hidden, not told.
Tell me tell me how much you think of him--
Did not take, did not sign.
Did not say anything, wanted,
He went away, and he did not return.
How much do you think when you say "Firab Firaab"?
Did not take, did not sign.
হা, কে বলে দেবে সে ভালোবাসে কি মোরে।\nক:
Ha, who's to say he loves more?
Kavu or he wants to laugh, Kavu turns away,
Kavu or She Laje Sara, Kavu or Bisadamayi--
Shall I go to him?  Shudhav Charan Dhre?
হ্যাদে গো নন্দরানী, আমাদের শ্যামকে ছ:
Hade go Nandrani, release our Shyam.
We shepherd-boys stand at the door.   Give us Shyam.
        Hero Go The morning came, the sun rose, the flowers bloomed in the forest.
        We will go to the group with Shyam today, I thought.
        Ogo, put on yellow clothes and bring him to your lap.
        Give Mohan Benu in his hand, Nupur gets it.
        We will all dance under the tree in the sun.
        Nupur runujhunu will play, the flute will play honey.
        I will make a garland of wild flowers, I will wear it on Shyam's neck.
হারে রে রে রে রে, আমায় ছেড়ে দে রে, দে:
Give up, give up, leave me alone, give up...
Just like the forest birds are happy.
     Ghansharavanadhara such as Bandhanahara,
Clouds and wind are like robbers robbing the sky.
Lose it, lose it, who will hold me--
As the dance of fire surrounds all canons,
     As thunder roars in storm clouds,
       All the obstacles in the bosom of laughter.
হা সখী, ও আদরে আরো বাড়ে মনোব্যথা।\nভালো:
Ha Sakhi, and love increases heartache.
If it is not good, why does it talk about love?
Miche pranay's smile bolo tare nahi basi.
I don't want her love, I don't want love.
    Bolo bolo, sajni lo, tare--
    And as if he comes to Nako Hetha.
হাওয়া লাগে গানের পালে--\nমাঝি আমার, বোসো:
The wind blows to the music--
The boat is mine, Boso Hale.
        If you get rid of it now, you will live.
        Life dances in waves
To the rhythm of this wind.
  The day has passed, the night has come.
    No one is my ghat mate.
      Cut the ties, let me go--
    I pass by the starlight,
      The sound has woken up at the time of departure.
হাঁচ্ছোঃ!-- ভয় কী দেখাচ্ছো।\n ধরি টিপ:
Gasp: What are you afraid of?
    Hold and press, punch in the face--
         Tell me what comfort you get.
              yawn   yawn
হাটের ধুলা সয় না যে আর, কাতর করে প্রাণ।\:
The dust of the market does not burn anymore, the life is cut.
Bathe me in your melodious flow.
            Wake up to the gentle roll, let the blood rise in waves,
            Let all dishonor be washed away from the body--
            His voice drowned out all the noise.
            O beautiful one, I garlanded your flowers--
            Remember that today, forget all the anger.
            Call again to the lotus flower of your song--
            He also got to redo the secret sudhakana.
            Give me Tari Renu's tilaklekha.
হাতে লয়ে দীপ অগণন চরাচর কার সি:
Innumerable Charachar car thrones with lamp in hand
               Circling silently.
Millions of people all around take their own happiness, sadness and grief
               I want to walk forever.
Surya said to him always, drink once in your mouth,
               I will give light to Dharani.'
The moon sings, "Smile, Lord, drink my drink."
               Jyotsnasudha Vitrib Swami.'
His body at the feet of the clouds, Lord, have mercy on you--
               I will give shade, I will give rainwater.'
Spring is blooming, say you are a promise,
হায় অতিথি, এখনি কি হল তোমার যাবার বেলা।\:
Hey guest, what is your departure time now?
Look at the seat of my heart all night long.
       You came hesitantly
              I want to understand something,
       If you take care of the evening with silent eyes, play.
If you don't tell the hope that you brought in the language of the song.
The bird sat on the branch, forgot to build a nest.
       Seen, not known--
              The question was, didn't Shudhal--
       Why do you do it to your heart's desire?
হায় কে দিবে আর সান্ত্বনা।\n সকলে গিয়:
Alas, who will give comfort.
     Everyone's gone, don't you go--
You want to look happy, Lord, the people under religion.
  Want on all sides, don't lose anywhere.
  Why leave alone in the dark?
  Hero, O empty world, Mom.
হায় গো, ব্যথায় কথা যায় ডুবে যায় গো--\n:
Alas, pain speaks and drowns--
                  Haralem is in tears.
          Swim to your ocean, I return to shore to shore,
              Your golden nose did not fit...
                  Where can I find the way in the dark?
Alas, my eyes are dying.
                  I stood at the door looking.
     No one tells the address of the room where that lamp burns,
            I sit on the road
                  Forever-night's path-can.
হায় হতভাগিনী,\n স্রোতে বৃথা গেল:
Oh poor thing,
         Vainly floated in the stream--
                 It didn't feel like water, it didn't feel like it.
Katali Bela tunes the harp, cries hard,
                     Ragini stopped at the broken wire.
              Coming to this side of the road
         He called you.
            Firay Dili Tare Ruddhdwara--
         My chest burned, why didn't I ask for forgiveness?
হায় হায় রে, হায় পরবাসী,\n হায় গৃহছাড়া:
Oh, oh, oh, sojourner,
    Woe to the homeless.
       At the call of the blind
    Where are you floating in the unknown?
To hear what is passing in the distant sky in any wind
          Whistle of Doom--
Oh, cruel disorder that is the gallows of death.
      In secret tears under colorful clouds
          God's great mockery
              Accumulated silent laughter.
হার মানালে গো, ভাঙিলে অভিমান হায় হায়।:
Go if you lose, shame if you break.
    The dish of the lamp dimmed in weak hands
                Hall khan khan hai ॥
    But now burn the light of your star,
May this twilight of colorful shadows be over.
                Come on mate--
    The wind of the road blew, nibbled the lamp of the house.
    Aji Bijan Bate, in the ghat of darkness
I have brought this song to all-losers.
হার-মানা হার পরাব তোমার গলে--\nদূরে রব ক:
I'll wear it around your neck--
How far is the Lord in the guise of his own ball?
     I know I know pride will be swept away--
     The soul will be torn apart by intense pain,
     The song will be played on the flute of zero hear,
         Then the stone will melt in the water.
Hundreds will be opened one by one,
Honey will not be hidden forever.
     Whose eye will seek the sky,
     Calling quietly outside the house,
     Nothing will remain on that day--
         Absolute death is at the feet of Lviv.
হাসি কেন নাই ও নয়নে ! ভ্রমিতেছ মলিন-আন:
Why is there no smile in the eyes!   Wandering in the dirt.
Look, dear, the flowers are blooming in the ear.
     Seeing you dirty, the flowers are crying, my love
     Banalata is trying to find out how many words are spoken.
     Come sakhi, come Hetha, say a word--
     Tell me, my friend, for whom you have got heartache.
     Tell me, my friend, your mind is in whose dream is the dawn.
হাসিরে কি লুকাবি লাজে।\nচপলা সে বাঁধা পড়:
Shame to hide with a smile.
He is nimble and doesn't get stuck.
Rudhiya jumped at the threshold
When he came to Nayanmazh.
হিংসায় উন্মত্ত পৃথ্বী, নিত্য নিঠুর দ্বন্:
The earth maddened with violence, the perpetual strife;
His crooked path is closed.
      As many animals as new ones are born--
      Do' relief Mahaprana, an' Amritbani,
      Develop 'Prempadma Chiramadhunishyanda'.
          O calm, O free, O eternal virtue,
          Karunaghana, dharanital kar' unblemished.
Come demon, give initiation to sacrifice.
Mahabhikshu, take alms for everyone's pride.
      Let the people forget the grief, refute the delusion,
      May the Sun of Knowledge shine bright--
      All the worlds are full of life, eyes are blind.
          calm down
হিমের রাতে ঐ গগনের দীপগুলিরে\nহেমন্তিকা:
The lights of the sky in the frosty night
Hemantika made secret anchal around.
Called from house to house - 'Light the Dipalika,
Light the light, your light, decorate the world with light.'
Empty now is the garden of flowers, the dueling cuckoo does not sing,
Cough falls on the river bank.
Let depression be black, light the candlestick--
Light the light, your light, listen to the victory of light.
The gods are here today--wake up, children of the catch,
Wake up in light, Yamini.
The dark day has come, light the lamp,
Light your light, your light, conquer this tamasir
হিয়ামাঝে গোপনে হেরিয়ে তোমারে\n ক্ষণে ক:
Hiamazhe secretly lost you
   Every now and then Pulak trembles in Kishloy,
       There is pain in the yolk.
হৃদয় আমার নাচে রে আজিকে ময়ূরের মতো নাচে:
My heart dances like a peacock today.
      Bikash has developed the mood of hundreds of barons like Kalap,
      Who wants to go to the sky with longing joy?
Ogo, who is swaying in the lonely branch today, swaying, swaying.
      It's raining raining, the sky is burning,
      Oriya Alak covers the eyelids - the grave has opened.
      Flowing thickly in the nabpallabe, trembling in the membrane of the Kanan membrane--
      The river crossed the river and came to the village.
হৃদয় আমার প্রকাশ হল অনন্ত আকাশে।\n বে:
My heart is revealed in the eternal sky.
    The pain-whistle rose in the air.
This is what I know about the longing for light--
    Come back and I'm bored in my life.
    Outside, you disguise yourself in various guises
    I don't know to whom I gave my garland.
Today I see all the garlands around your neck...
    If you catch everything at the end, it will be a deep disaster.
হৃদয়নন্দন বনে নিভৃত এ নিকেতনে\nএসো হে আন:
Hridayanandan is in the forest of Niketan
Come, O joyous one, come ever beautiful.
Show love, pass all sorrow
Be in the middle of the burning heart.
Good day, bring happiness to this life,
Make this Narjanam successful dear.
Make your heart sing in sweet eternal music,
Divanisha Sudhanijhar will be remembered in life.
হে সখা, মম হৃদয়ে রহো।\nসংসারে সব কাজে ধ্:
O friend, stay in mom's heart.
Stay in the heart in meditation and knowledge in all activities in the world.
Nath, you come slowly to happiness-sadness-smile-eyes,
       Let my life revolve around--
Stay in the heart in meditation and knowledge in all activities in the world.
হেথা যে গান গাইতে আসা, আমার হয় নি স:
The song that Hetha came to sing, I did not sing that song-
Even today, I only want to sing.
I don't like that tone, I don't like those words.
Only in the middle of life is the confusion of music.
Even today that flower has not bloomed, only a wind is blowing.
I have not seen his face, I have not heard his words,
I only hear the sound of his feet every now and then.
He used to come and go in front of my door.
Only asana leaves me through the day-
The lamp is not lit in the house, how will I call him?
I'm hoping to get it, tare
হেমন্তে কোন্‌ বসন্তেরই বাণী পূর্ণশশী ও:
In Hemante, the words of any spring have been brought by Purnashashi.
Jyotsna is like a dream of a flower on the branches of a branch.
No secret murmuring Purnashashi Oi-je Dil Ani.
Obsessed with the premature awakening of the white-tailed deer in the forest.
A sleepy unknown bird keeps calling.
Whose sweet memory did Purnashashi give to me?
হেরি অহরহ তোমারি বিরহ ভুবনে ভুবনে রাজে হ:
I miss you forever and ever,
   How many forms are you wearing in the land, in the sky, in the ocean?
       Sara Nishi Dhari Taraya Taraya Animesh stood silently in her eyes.
            You are bored in the listening stream.
How many pains do you feel at home today?
   How much love, how much desire, how much happiness, sadness, work.
       Bored of all life, how many songs melt and flow
             Your anger is rising in the middle of my shame.
হেরি তব বিমলমুখভাতি দূর হল গহন দুখরাতি।:
Heri Taba Bimalmukhbati far hal Gahan Dukhrati.
When the mind is broken, the heart is full, but the feet are red.
But the young ray of sunshine woke up.
Nayan Khuli Biswajan Badan Tuli Chahil but Darshparashukh Magi.
     The sky is full of white but smiling,
How many Kusumpanti rose up - Heri Taba Bimalmukhbhati.
In the resounding forest Vihagkaltan, Geet sab dhaya taba paan.
The world awoke in the east, full of songs written by then.
     I drink love and sing in my ears
Uil mind prana mam mati-- Heri Taba Bimalmukhbhati.
হৃদয়বাসনা পূর্ণ হল আজি মম পূর্ণ হল, শুন:
The desire of the heart is fulfilled today, the mother is fulfilled, listen to the world.
         Key Herinu Sobha, Nikhilbhubanath
            Sit in the middle of the mind.
হৃদয়বেদনা বহিয়া, প্রভু, এসেছি তব দ্বারে।:
Out of heartache, Lord, I have come to the door.
       You are the hearty hearted one, all know O--
       So much grief, shame, poverty crisis and who will tell?
       How many crimes have I committed, Nath, falling in love--
       Without you, Lord, no one will forgive in the world.
       I will surrender all my desires to your love stone,
       All sorrows and separation will be forgotten, but in union-amritdhar.
And I can't think of my thoughts, you take my burden--
       Lord, take the weary one across the ocean of worlds.
হৃদয়মন্দিরে, প্রাণাধীশ, আছ গোপনে।\nঅমৃতস:
In the temple of the heart, Pranadheesh, you are hidden.
A soul yearning for amritsaura, alas,
Bhramia is not found in the world--
Who can enter Anandabhaban?
In your mercy
হৃদয়শশী হৃদিগগনে উদিল মঙ্গললগনে,\n:
Hridiyashashi Hridigagane Udil Mangallagane,
  There is only one beautiful beauty in the world.
Where did sorrow and happiness drown in the ocean of immense peace,
  Only Sudhapurnima wakes up in the heart.
  Deep music echoes in the solemn pool,
      Bountiful radiance in sky-courtyard-light.
In the middle of the day, what is the song in the melodious mantra
      What is the limit of love in the poor system?
হৃদয়ক সাধ মিশাওল হৃদয়ে, কণ্ঠে শুখাওল ম:
Heartfelt Sadh Mishaol in the heart, Shukhaol Mala in the voice.
Birhabishe dahi bahi gal rayni, nahi nahi aol kala.
Understand, understand, fail, fail all, failure is piriti leha.
Life is a failure, youth is a failure, body is a failure!
Let's go home, let's go, Munch Nayanjal-- Let's go, let's do housework.
Maltimala raKh bala,-- Chhi chhi ki, moru moru laje.
Hello, this young youth of great leadership.
All, great love-hustle life did Aghor.
Trishit Pran Mom Diwas-Jamini Shyamak Darshan-Ashe.
The yearning for life does not stop, always burning hot.
            Sir, you are telling the truth
হৃদয়ে তোমার দয়া যেন পাই।\n সংসারে:
May I find your kindness in my heart.
       I will pay what the world gives,
              May I find you in my heart.
       But kindness will be remembered
       Nishidin in life and death,
In sorrow, in happiness, in wealth, in danger, I seek your mercy--
              May I receive your mercy.
But kindness will slowly descend into the heart of peace.
       But kindness is good-light
       Life-kindle in the dark--
Prem Bhakti Mama all the strength Mama I get by your grace,
              I have nothing to say.
হৃদয়ে মন্দ্রিল ডমরু গুরু গুরু,\n:
Mandrill Damru Guru Guru in the heart,
            Thick cloud's brow curled,
        is the thrill of the wild forest--
Who is he a guest in a dream of meeting with a fluttering bosom?
  Heavy rain, thunderous thunder,
           Malathiballari Kapaay Pallava Karun Kallole--
                Kanan is alarmed.
হৃদয়ে হৃদয় আসি মিলে যায় যেথা,\n:
Where hearts meet hearts,
          oh my friend
He is the awakened god of Punyatirtha
          Salute to him.
The universe is eternal under whose eternal rule
Death passes every moment,
Garbage goes away to dilapidation,
          Salute to him.
Yugantar day in bath of Yugantar
He who cleanses, renews,
At the end of the decline, the family is fulfilled,
          Salutations to him.
The traveler is filled with happiness in the sorrows of life
Kalatari walks with unknown purpose,
You can remove the fatigue,
          Salute to him.
হৃদয়ের এ কূল, ও কূল, দু কূল ভেসে য:
This root of the heart, that root, the two roots are swept away, oh man,
                          Shallow eyes.
              I look at the direction Ogo Sakhi,
                        I can't recognize anything anymore.
Parana has fallen in tension,
   Bun comes in a full river,
            What a storm today, Mr.
                 The dam and the dam.
Why did it happen in my youth?
  What's out of nowhere?
       Heart, you are bored, what are you desperate for?
             I don't know what desire, what pain go--
                  How can you control yourself?
হৃদয়ের মণি আদরিনী মোর, আয় লো কাছে আয়।\:
The jewel of the heart, my love, come and come.
Mishabi jochnahashi rashi rashi gentle honey jochna.
   Malay Kopol falls asleep in a kiss,
   Jochana dies in the eye of the cupola.
   The Yamunalharis want to cry at their feet.
হৃদিমন্দিরদ্বারে বাজে সুমঙ্গল শঙ্খ॥\nশত:
A conch shell sounds at the door of the heart temple.
Buildings light up with hundreds of moonshine,
      The pure smell of flowers.
হে অন্তরের ধন,\n তুমি যে বিরহী, তো:
O treasure of the heart,
       You are empty, your building is empty.
I left you alone in my house husband--
       Where do I wander all the time?
               O treasure of the heart,
       My entire world cries in this sadness.
Your flute seeks me far away with different tunes,
       Crazy is this Dakhin-Smiran of spring.
হে ক্ষণিকের অতিথি,\n এলে প্রভাতে কারে:
O transient guest,
    Who wants to come in the morning?
        The path of Jhara Shefali is Bahiya.
I did not want to return to the immortal Birhinire,
    Who comes to the dew of sadness?
        O Akaruna, what illusion do you know,
            Disrupt the meeting.
    You are going to the darkness in the light
        Sing a song in mind
হে চিরনূতন, আজি এ দিনের প্রথম গানে\n:
Oh eternal, today is the first song of the day
      Let my life grow in your water.
Endless hope in your words, eternal language of life--
   Inexhaustible wealth fills the mind with the gift of your hand.
        May the nectar of heaven wake up in these good times,
       Amal Ayyu of new birth in Anuk life.
All that is worn out, all that is in the frail new is gone--
              Let's wash the old dirt
                    In the bath of new light.
হে নবীনা,\n প্রতিদিনের পথের ধুলায় যায়:
O Nabina,
   The dust of the daily path does not go away.
   I hear words floating in the spring breeze,
   When I first wake up, I see a golden cloud.
Swapan dao catch what is full of fun.
   Garland your hair with flowers of any kind,
Play the harp in an unknown tune.
হে বিরহী, হায়, চঞ্চল হিয়া তব,\n নীর:
O wretched, alas, fickle yet,
      Wake up in silence alone in the empty temple long betrothed--
          Who is he awake?
Swapanrupini Aloksundari Alaksya Alkapuri-dweller,
      His idol is in pain in the middle of the heart.
হে ভারত, আজি তোমারি সভায় শুন এ কবির গা:
Oh India, listen to this poet's song in your meeting today.
         I have brought the gift of worship at your feet.
         I have brought the strength of my body, I have brought the devotion of my mind,
         I brought my religion, I brought my life
         I have brought my best gift to you.
         Kanchanthali nahi us, anna nahiko jute.
         I have brought what I have in the new Parnaput.
         Today there is no need for this worship of Deen in the ceremony, Deen arrangement
         Eternal poverty will wipe away the dust of the feet.
         Surdarlab is your offering
হে মহাজীবন, হে মহামরণ, লইনু শরণ, লইনু:
Oh great life, oh great death, take shelter, take shelter.
            Light a flame in the dark lamp,
Put on, put on Jyoti's vaccine -- do it O my shyness.
Parasharatan Tomari Charan-- Lainu Sharan, Lainu Sharan.
            All that is dirty, all that is black,
Whatever is bad is good -- cover it up.
হে মহাদুঃখ, হে রুদ্র, হে ভয়ঙ্কর, ওহে:
O Mahadukha, O Rudra, O Terrible, O Shankara, O Pralayankara.
Be the entwined agnibhujangam - the immovable jangam burdened with stings,
Frequent jing jing jing jing jing jing
হে মাধবী, দ্বিধা কেন, আসিবে কি ফিরিবে কি:
O Madhavi, why hesitate, whether to come or return--
Why did the mind go outside the courtyard?
Who called you from hiding in the air,
I wrote your letter on page after page.
Who knocked on the door from the south?
Jagi Chameli Nayan Meli was shocked.
Without having received it, Karbi has responded.
Shiris Shihri gets up and looks away.
হে মোর দেবতা, ভরিয়া এ দেহ প্রাণ\nকী অমৃত:
O my God, let this body be alive
What nectar do you drink?
    Your worldview in my eyes
    It is possible to see, but the poet,
    My rapturous hearing remained silent
       I want to hear your song.
Your creation is in my heart
The author has created strange words.
    Be with thee, Lord, may thy love be
    All my songs have awakened--
    You see in your sweet juice--
       Give yourself to me.
বল তো এইবারের মতো\nপ্রভু, তোমার আঙিনাতে:
Say it like this time
Lord, I am like a crop in your yard.
Some-or fruit has fallen, some-or fruit is still there,
           It's been a year...
A shepherd sits in the shade on a sunny day and plays the flute.
           If you order
Chaitra-to the wind I raise the sail--that river that flows.
I cross the full stream, I finish the work in the field,
           Go to housework--
I will not put the burden of my head on your feet.
